name: Team Crenshaw
subject: Youth Summit tickets on sale now!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Crenshaw Victory Committee
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| |
---
| Crenshaw Youth Summit is BACK at Hilton Americas in Houston, TX on October 8-9! This year's Youth Summit may be the best one yet. The real Wolf of Wall Street, Jordan Belfort. Babylon Bee CEO Seth Dillon. Conservative legend Dennis Prager. Country music star Randy Houser. All will be there.
Student tickets for as low as $15 are available NOW, along with Student+ and VIP. A limited quantity of tickets are available for young adults under 40 this year as well, and parents/guardians will have the option to accompany their teenager. And for people only interested in attending the live concert with Randy Houser, we have separate concert tickets available for all ages to purchase.
Scroll down to check out the full lineup (with more speakers to be announced soon) along with more information about ticket levels and general summit FAQ.
---
| |
---
| | | [CLAIM YOUR YOUTH SUMMIT TICKET NOW](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aSEl1WyhvtXGH7hQOQw-vS5sV08ElobKubt9Qw8ZLQ9Sb-96FwDCRE76BOkfqkfcIRWmxFhbUr9huIFP0SZtD4owsLul_SucfPeC858STyFsisvY7qdAan9W0h6L8tkint-CioKd_4v_hcS4BmhTrYaMTyitKYf2HY3OGeP6uM8w3gHV0lZvGsZJ6lMa7Ir_s7QJRoEVFMlwEzmuTEVkhzgMFhZmDTOH&c=VyX71E-D7xeHJpLF5-ulrFaCPT8HHP7GUiUsFpojd58mVyxiZSWipw==&ch=ckn3MR0-SCSsjVRkxB5wvOiZRVES30_37eeZrC9Tow3LiQ_C5CWekg==)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
Jordan Belfort's legendary early career was depicted by Leonardo DiCaprio in The Wolf of Wall Street. His redemption story is equally fascinating. Today, Jordan is a speaker, writer, entrepreneurship expert, and sales master who has trained millions of people across the globe. He's bringing that knowledge to the Crenshaw Youth Summit to teach you how to be a young entrepreneur and reach your fullest potential in business and life.
---
|
---
Seth Dillon is the CEO of The Babylon Bee. Taking on the tone of a traditional news media publication, The Bee hilariously satirizes real-world events and public figures. Seth joins us to talk about building the wildly successful conservative news satire site in an era of censorship and cancel culture.
---
| |
---
|
---
Country music star Randy Houser has multiple chart-topping hits including "How Country Feels", "Like A Cowboy", and "Running Out of Moonlight." Randy and his band are performing a live show on Saturday night that you and your friends will never forget.
---
|
---
Dave Rubin is an author, comedian, and TV personality best known for his political commentary. He is the host of The Rubin Report, a top-ranking talk show recognized as one of the most influential spaces for candid conversations about complex issues and current events. Dave returns for the second time to the Crenshaw Youth Summit to teach you how to think for yourself in an age when tribal outrage is the only available alternative.
---
| |
---
|
---
Dennis Prager is one of the most respected and influential thinkers, writers, and speakers in America. He is the founder of Prager University (PragerU) - the most viewed conservative video site in the world. He joins us to talk about preserving America, the West, and the Judeo-Christian value system.
---
|
---
JP Sears is a comedian who tours the country extensively doing stand-up comedy and publishing weekly online videos. His videos have been viewed more than 500 million times. In addition to inspiring laughter in a weird world, JP's work takes an unapologetic stand for freedom, free speech, and encouraging people to free themselves from fear.
---
| |
---
|
---
Born in a punishing society devoted to the worship of Kim Jong-Il, North Korean defector, human rights activist, and TED Speaker Yeonmi Park is a leading voice of oppressed people around the world. At the age of 13, she and her family made a daring escape to China in search of a life free of tyranny. She joins us to recount this incredible story, how we fight tyranny, and the fundamental concepts of freedoms that westerners take for granted.
---
|
---
Rich Lowry is the Editor of National Review, the legendary conservative editorial magazine founded by William F. Buckley. Rich joins us to make the case for conservatism and reinvigorating the American National Identity.
---
| |
---
|
---
Mike Solana is a tech entrepreneur and venture capitalist with Peter Thiel's Founders Fund. His substack Pirate Wires is a witty and insightful exploration of technology, politics, and culture. He's bringing that wisdom to the summit to teach us how to think like a tech billionaire.
---
| |
---
|
---
| | | [CLAIM YOUR YOUTH SUMMIT TICKET NOW](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aSEl1WyhvtXGH7hQOQw-vS5sV08ElobKubt9Qw8ZLQ9Sb-96FwDCRE76BOkfqkfcIRWmxFhbUr9huIFP0SZtD4owsLul_SucfPeC858STyFsisvY7qdAan9W0h6L8tkint-CioKd_4v_hcS4BmhTrYaMTyitKYf2HY3OGeP6uM8w3gHV0lZvGsZJ6lMa7Ir_s7QJRoEVFMlwEzmuTEVkhzgMFhZmDTOH&c=VyX71E-D7xeHJpLF5-ulrFaCPT8HHP7GUiUsFpojd58mVyxiZSWipw==&ch=ckn3MR0-SCSsjVRkxB5wvOiZRVES30_37eeZrC9Tow3LiQ_C5CWekg==)
---
| |
---
| TICKET LEVELS AND SUMMIT FAQ
---
|
---
| |
---
| |
---
| Summit Timeline
Saturday, October 8th; 12:00pm - 10:00pm
12:00 pm Registration opens. Attendees will have the opportunity to shop, take photos, and network. VIP registrants will have access to specialty lounge seating during this time. 3:00 pm - 7:00 pm General session day 1 begins with our Saturday speaker lineup. 7:00 pm - 8:30 pm Attendees will have the opportunity to take photos with speakers, and network, and get some food before the concert. 8:30 pm - 10:00 pm Randy Houser performs, all summit ticket holders have access to the concert.
Sunday, October 9th; 9:00am - 7:00pm
9:00 am Registration opens. Attendees will have the opportunity to shop, take photos, and network. VIP registrants will have access to specialty lounge seating during this time. 11:00 am - 11:45 am Specialty youth church service is offered to any ticket holder of the summit. Guest pastor to be announced. 12:00 pm - 7:00 pm General session day 2 begins with our Sunday speaker lineup.
More networking events and meet and greets will be added to the schedule soon!
Parking information Hilton Americas offers a self-parking garage for $15 per day. Valet parking is available for $21 per day. Metered street parking in downtown Houston is free after 6pm on Saturdays and free all day Sunday. If you plan to use metered street parking, please note that spaces are very limited around the hotel so you might end up parking several blocks away. Additional paid parking garages and parking lots with variable rates are available in the surrounding areas. Attire Casual. Clothing or items with offensive language, graphics, or any other item deemed inappropriate by Team Crenshaw is prohibited.
Is there assigned seating? Seating is first come first serve. VIP level tickets will get preferred seating in the first few rows of the ballroom until 5 minutes before show begins. At that point anyone with a general admissions ticket will be able to take an available seat.
What does the VIP level include?
Access to an exclusive room with lounge seating and a livestream of the summit, a private entrance into the main room, light bites, and reserved seating in the front of the stage.
What is the difference between Young Adult and Chaperone?
Parent/chaperone tickets are exclusively offered to parents/guardians who are interested in accompanying their child/dependent to the summit. Chaperones must be present with their child/dependent at summit registration to receive their wristband and be allowed admittance into the summit. Team Crenshaw has the right to refund the Chaperone ticket if they do not meet this requirement.
Young Adult tickets are open to anyone in the age bracket of 27-40 years old.
Do I need to bring my own food? No, we will provide food options at the networking event on Saturday for dinner as well as a boxed lunch option on Sunday. Limited snacks will be available on site as well during the sessions. Please reach out to Events@crenshawforcongress.com for requests due to dietary restrictions
If I'm traveling from out of town, where should I stay? If you are traveling from out of Houston, we suggest securing a room at the Hilton-Americas; same hotel as the events for the weekend. We do not have any affiliation with securing your hotel reservation, please go online or call the Hilton directly at 713-739-8000 for further assistance. Alternatively, nearby hotel Embassy Suites by Hilton Houston Downtown is within walking distance. Please go online or call the Hilton directly at 713-739-9100 for further assistance.
Do I need a Summit ticket to attend the concert?
No. We are selling separate concert tickets for anyone who only wishes to attend the Randy Houser concert. All ages welcome to attend the concert. All Youth Summit session tickets include concert ticket access.

---

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | Crenshaw Youth Summit is BACK at Hilton Americas in Houston, TX on October 8-9! This year's Youth Summit may be the best one yet. The real Wolf of Wall Street, Jordan Belfort. Babylon Bee CEO Seth Dillon. Conservative legend Dennis Prager. Country music star Randy Houser. All will be there. Student tickets for as low as $15 are available NOW, along with Student+ and VIP. A limited quantity of tickets are available for young adults under 40 this year as well, and parents/guardians will have the option to accompany their teenager. And for people only interested in attending the live concert with Randy Houser, we have separate concert tickets available for all ages to purchase. Scroll down to check out the full lineup (with more speakers to be announced soon) along with more information about ticket levels and general summit FAQ. | | | | | == | | | | Jordan Belfort's legendary early career was depicted by Leonardo DiCaprio in The Wolf of Wall Street. His redemption story is equally fascinating. Today, Jordan is a speaker, writer, entrepreneurship expert, and sales master who has trained millions of people across the globe. He's bringing that knowledge to the Crenshaw Youth Summit to teach you how to be a young entrepreneur and reach your fullest potential in business and life. | Seth Dillon is the CEO of The Babylon Bee. Taking on the tone of a traditional news media publication, The Bee hilariously satirizes real-world events and public figures. Seth joins us to talk about building the wildly successful conservative news satire site in an era of censorship and cancel culture. | | | Country music star Randy Houser has multiple chart-topping hits including "How Country Feels", "Like A Cowboy", and "Running Out of Moonlight." Randy and his band are performing a live show on Saturday night that you and your friends will never forget. | Dave Rubin is an author, comedian, and TV personality best known for his political commentary. He is the host of The Rubin Report, a top-ranking talk show recognized as one of the most influential spaces for candid conversations about complex issues and current events. Dave returns for the second time to the Crenshaw Youth Summit to teach you how to think for yourself in an age when tribal outrage is the only available alternative. | | | Dennis Prager is one of the most respected and influential thinkers, writers, and speakers in America. He is the founder of Prager University (PragerU) - the most viewed conservative video site in the world. He joins us to talk about preserving America, the West, and the Judeo-Christian value system. | JP Sears is a comedian who tours the country extensively doing stand-up comedy and publishing weekly online videos. His videos have been viewed more than 500 million times. In addition to inspiring laughter in a weird world, JP's work takes an unapologetic stand for freedom, free speech, and encouraging people to free themselves from fear. | | | Born in a punishing society devoted to the worship of Kim Jong-Il, North Korean defector, human rights activist, and TED Speaker Yeonmi Park is a leading voice of oppressed people around the world. At the age of 13, she and her family made a daring escape to China in search of a life free of tyranny. She joins us to recount this incredible story, how we fight tyranny, and the fundamental concepts of freedoms that westerners take for granted. | Rich Lowry is the Editor of National Review, the legendary conservative editorial magazine founded by William F. Buckley. Rich joins us to make the case for conservatism and reinvigorating the American National Identity. | | | Mike Solana is a tech entrepreneur and venture capitalist with Peter Thiel's Founders Fund. His substack Pirate Wires is a witty and insightful exploration of technology, politics, and culture. He's bringing that wisdom to the summit to teach us how to think like a tech billionaire. | | | | | | == | | | TICKET LEVELS AND SUMMIT FAQ | | | | | | Summit Timeline Saturday, October 8th; 12:00pm - 10:00pm 12:00 pm Registration opens. Attendees will have the opportunity to shop, take photos, and network. VIP registrants will have access to specialty lounge seating during this time. 3:00 pm - 7:00 pm General session day 1 begins with our Saturday speaker lineup. 7:00 pm - 8:30 pm Attendees will have the opportunity to take photos with speakers, and network, and get some food before the concert. 8:30 pm - 10:00 pm Randy Houser performs, all summit ticket holders have access to the concert. Sunday, October 9th; 9:00am - 7:00pm 9:00 am Registration opens. Attendees will have the opportunity to shop, take photos, and network. VIP registrants will have access to specialty lounge seating during this time. 11:00 am - 11:45 am Specialty youth church service is offered to any ticket holder of the summit. Guest pastor to be announced. 12:00 pm - 7:00 pm General session day 2 begins with our Sunday speaker lineup. More networking events and meet and greets will be added to the schedule soon! Parking information Hilton Americas offers a self-parking garage for $15 per day. Valet parking is available for $21 per day. Metered street parking in downtown Houston is free after 6pm on Saturdays and free all day Sunday. If you plan to use metered street parking, please note that spaces are very limited around the hotel so you might end up parking several blocks away. Additional paid parking garages and parking lots with variable rates are available in the surrounding areas. Attire Casual. Clothing or items with offensive language, graphics, or any other item deemed inappropriate by Team Crenshaw is prohibited. Is there assigned seating? Seating is first come first serve. VIP level tickets will get preferred seating in the first few rows of the ballroom until 5 minutes before show begins. At that point anyone with a general admissions ticket will be able to take an available seat. What does the VIP level include? Access to an exclusive room with lounge seating and a livestream of the summit, a private entrance into the main room, light bites, and reserved seating in the front of the stage. What is the difference between Young Adult and Chaperone? Parent/chaperone tickets are exclusively offered to parents/guardians who are interested in accompanying their child/dependent to the summit. Chaperones must be present with their child/dependent at summit registration to receive their wristband and be allowed admittance into the summit. Team Crenshaw has the right to refund the Chaperone ticket if they do not meet this requirement. Young Adult tickets are open to anyone in the age bracket of 27-40 years old. Do I need to bring my own food? No, we will provide food options at the networking event on Saturday for dinner as well as a boxed lunch option on Sunday. Limited snacks will be available on site as well during the sessions. Please reach out to Events@crenshawforcongress.com for requests due to dietary restrictions If I'm traveling from out of town, where should I stay? If you are traveling from out of Houston, we suggest securing a room at the Hilton-Americas; same hotel as the events for the weekend. We do not have any affiliation with securing your hotel reservation, please go online or call the Hilton directly at 713-739-8000 for further assistance. Alternatively, nearby hotel Embassy Suites by Hilton Houston Downtown is within walking distance. Please go online or call the Hilton directly at 713-739-9100 for further assistance. Do I need a Summit ticket to attend the concert? No. We are selling separate concert tickets for anyone who only wishes to attend the Randy Houser concert. All ages welcome to attend the concert. All Youth Summit session tickets include concert ticket access. | | | == | | | | | | | Paid for by Dan Crenshaw Victory Committee | | | | Dan Crenshaw Victory Committee | 5900 Memorial Drive, Suite 215, Houston, TX 77007 | | Sent by mailto:youthsummit@crenshawforcongress.com

| Folks,

JD Vance’s book, _Hillbilly Elegy_ , costs $7.85.

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: A historic opportunity
body:
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, In 1973, the U.S. Supreme Court decided the case Roe v. Wade. And since that day, more than 63 million babies have been killed through abortion in our country. It was the most destructive ruling in the history of our nation. And it led to an anti-life ideology that still infects America to this day. From what I’ve been told, you are someone who values and respects life in all its stages, and I’m guessing this makes you sick to your stomach just like it does to me. But the tide is changing, and that’s why I asked if I could send you this email today. [](http://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4c229a2ed02e46cea7d6e5b9df3855b2&_e=zRdKFi-trn1dV17x5AQ3m1u5skeIn5Vczp6LBaduHuSm9InX0z3AQWgiefh0rZk8-ZNp6e7UAdkwfCsOk-tuzeMPlbHAmzMuvtISpA1V14yVvPPHAtNqYDjFU80SiJxhQVuP1qymP_Ws9PO30d4kjBPvSr_jagNFwGy80ZsvHSkIVwZZ-7yNa2nIkzNyT9ROQFhVE5jOe2lSlSv7xV6olmV1_jWQ_xu5PcnvOdYHZeXj7BuOrwnClstisr_seqACBix7iXAKfNygag4buXvInKyJaQ5SvFnttQoqwtcVOkTcILM7k6oo93aElh1Qj3lhVGqoF0iPqpQshxyJ0pafxeOC1_J0KA6I5qDQZImpgARDyWjE05HresoFptmxvZMjKyL4RZGqVb3h9gwXGBmIhn4BNmE9RuarYfooe5rTsQ6kG-crb0jfEOI-8zMcFCrN)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ The U.S. Supreme Court’s decision to overturn Roe gives us a historic opportunity to rebuild a culture of life. The battle for life has returned to the states. And we have a lot of work to do. Because the laws and needs of each state vary, it will take a supercharged effort to fight for the protection of the unborn. But the American Cornerstone Institute is committed to providing resources to support pro-life efforts in each state. And that’s why we need YOU! **Will you help rebuild a culture of life in states across America by making a tax-deductible gift today?** We have seen that the opposition is more hostile than ever now that the official decision has come down. We got a glimpse at those who are anti-life have reacted since the leak was made public. That’s why we’re asking you to give right now to help us fight back to protect life for the unborn with every tool at our disposal. So, please don’t wait. You can make your tax-deductible gift to protect life in states across America using this secure link: **[https://secure.americancornerstone.org/pro-life-states-confirmation](http://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4c229a2ed02e46cea7d6e5b9df3855b2&_e=zRdKFi-trn1dV17x5AQ3m1u5skeIn5Vczp6LBaduHuSm9InX0z3AQWgiefh0rZk8-ZNp6e7UAdkwfCsOk-tuzeMPlbHAmzMuvtISpA1V14yVvPPHAtNqYDjFU80SiJxhQVuP1qymP_Ws9PO30d4kjBPvSr_jagNFwGy80ZsvHSkIVwZZ-7yNa2nIkzNyT9ROQFhVE5jOe2lSlSv7xV6olmV1_jWQ_xu5PcnvOdYHZeUPRHRxP9Xv3fI8yBBOfRoJg5-vBR9MGxXvaPG7BQBoWOD75tmC1I2xiyOkyMoGWuaUgBdVX5xYUg7y5oKMUkP3LT1iovlI3u1Yq7TkhG3KpK6H8q8NqBRZd8Ki_ZTDPB0ycwwxrYCSk7N8Xo9jgUOEyHLAanv7AA2q2fxOZdhEguAT6yyUqtSKvtoMw1r3FND59LOC1X7buhbBWZfPh5IX)** Thank you so much for any support you can offer. Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

name: Lashrecse Aird
subject: Honoring the Legacy of Breonna Taylor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Lashrecse Aird
body:
https://www.lashrecseaird.com [https://www.lashrecseaird.com]
Friends,
Let me take you down a painful journey, but one with a hopeful future. On March 13, 2020, at least 7 officers no-knock raided Breonna Taylor’s apartment and killed her. This week, the Department of Justice finally charged four of those officers with federal civil rights violations for killing Breonna Taylor.
While these charges may bring some level of accountability, I’ve always believed that the best way to honor Breonna’s life and legacy is to ensure we protect our neighbors from future such crimes. That’s why I was so proud that on December 8, 2020, less than nine months after the murder of Breonna Taylor, Governor Ralph Northam signed my bill, Breonna’s Law, into law.
I proudly sponsored Breonna’s Law, the first of its type in Virginia’s 400 year history, to ban law enforcement from entering our homes without notifying us first. Experts estimate that law enforcement conducts more than 70,000 no-knock raids annually, largely for minor marijuana possessions, and disproportionately of Black and brown citizens. I knew justice couldn’t wait on someone else to act. As your delegate, I saw this injustice and acted immediately. I worked with my colleagues in the House of Delegates, my district law enforcement and with my colleagues in the Virginia State Senate, to ensure this bill passed with expediency. And now, Virginians are safe from this unjust violation of our privacy and homes. We did that—together.
Nothing will bring Breonna back, but the steps we’ve taken since her murder will ensure that Virginians are better protected from harm in the future. Breonna was an EMT, she dedicated her life to serving humanity. I am inspired by her courage, motivated by her conviction, and driven by her compassion. As I now run for the Virginia Senate, I do so on a proven platform of championing justice, accountability, and safety for all our neighbors. Thank you for being part of this journey with me. Let’s continue to champion justice for all people, together.
Sincerely,
Lashrecse

name: Green Beret Jay Collins
subject: It’s time we fight back. Will you join me? 🙏
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Jay Collins, Republican, for State Senate, District 14
body:
| | |
---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60945991:6URwspVyN:m:1:3317145305:1C06C11D2AFCA76B84311E39EFA89185:r)
---
|
---
| | Peter,
---
I've been shot, I lost a leg, I've committed my life to serving our country. Why? Because of the passion and respect that I feel for the American people.
---
[**JOIN MY FIGHT**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60945991:6URwspVyN:m:1:3317145305:1C06C11D2AFCA76B84311E39EFA89185:r)
---
As a retired Green Beret and a Purple Heart recipient, I know a thing or two about commitment to service. That's why I've pledged every day of my life to serving my country, my state, and my community. That's why I'm standing up and fighting back against the Woke Left. For too long they've worked unopposed to transform America.
* They've introduced drag queens into our classrooms
* They've added Critical Race Theory to our textbooks
* They've enforced pronoun identification into our military

It's time we fight back. **[Will you join me in the fight?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60945991:6URwspVyN:m:1:3317145305:1C06C11D2AFCA76B84311E39EFA89185:r)**

[**FIGHT BACK WITH $25**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60945993:6URwspVyN:m:1:3317145305:1C06C11D2AFCA76B84311E39EFA89185:r)

subject: share your thoughts

body:
Help us keep the Senate blue.
#
Peter,
We can’t afford to lose a single seat this November. A GOP majority would attack everything from Social Security to contraceptive care — with Mitch McConnell leading the way.
The best way to fight back against the GOP’s vision for our future is by doing everything we can to keep the Senate blue this November, but we need your help.
**[Tell us: What races do you think are most important in our fight to protect and expand the Democratic majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48875040/359915989/160344500?ms=dd_email_2200806_1&refcode=dd_em_220806_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Mzk1ODA4Ni1hMTE1LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_a-LIHriaVb_9y86XzGqDZ-_54O3Qg6JQaoMol67qnQ=&emci=39b71cd5-2714-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=53958086-a115-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=2727974)**
Republicans will stop at nothing to take back the Senate. People across the country are counting on us to help stop them.
We’ve been supporting candidates in crucial races throughout the cycle, and now it’s time to enter the final stretch until November.****
****[Will you share your thoughts on keeping the Senate blue with us? Take our short survey now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48875041/359915990/160344500?ms=dd_email_2200806_1&refcode=dd_em_220806_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Mzk1ODA4Ni1hMTE1LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_a-LIHriaVb_9y86XzGqDZ-_54O3Qg6JQaoMol67qnQ=&emci=39b71cd5-2714-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=53958086-a115-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=2727974)****

name: Trudy Busch Valentine
subject: Peter, I'd love your input on this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trudy Busch Valentine for Senate
body:
Could you please take a few minutes to complete our campaign's first general election priorities survey?
| | |
---
Peter,

I’m Trudy Busch Valentine: a nurse, mother, children’s advocate, proud fourth-generation Missourian, and, **as of a few days ago, your Democratic nominee for U.S. Senate in Missouri.** I’ve spent my life giving back and helping others, and now I’m running to do the same thing in Washington. I hope you’ll take just a moment to read about what’s at stake and why I'm in this race.
As a young girl growing up in Missouri, I watched my parents live the American Dream. They always told me, “To whom much is given, much is expected.” That sense of obligation to help others is what drove me to choose a life of service.

It’s why I volunteered as a candy striper when I was only 13 years old. It’s what led me to attend nursing school, work in hospitals, and later, work for the Salvation Army.
It’s also why I’ve decided to run for U.S. Senate;** Missourians deserve a senator who will put politics aside, put people first, and work to make sure that everyone is able to live out the American Dream. Now, as we head into the general election, I need to hear from top Democratic supporters like you, Peter. **
[**So I'm asking a favor: Could you please take a few minutes to complete our campaign's first general election priorities survey? Your feedback is essential to helping me understand where to focus our efforts so that we can develop a winning strategy for November.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48875014/359915955/-2043110283?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk202-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTk1ODA4Ni1hMTE1LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_PtaNnoAWKtDkopyr3Bkp1hnaZZVSNAruAqw33xRJaY=&emci=c18815b2-7d13-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=4e958086-a115-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=4450063)
| | [Take the Survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48875016/359915956/-2043110283?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk202-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTk1ODA4Ni1hMTE1LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_PtaNnoAWKtDkopyr3Bkp1hnaZZVSNAruAqw33xRJaY=&emci=c18815b2-7d13-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=4e958086-a115-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=4450063)
---
I've been fortunate in life. I’ve never had to fight to get the healthcare I need. I’ve never seen an eviction notice on my door. I’ve never worried about paying my electric bill.

But too many Missourians have.
These days, the American Dream seems to come with a price tag – and that price is way too high. That’s why I’m ready to help lower the cost of basic necessities. I’m ready to expand access to affordable healthcare. I’m ready to fight for a person’s right to choose. And I’m ready to put an end to our state’s tragic opioid epidemic.
Peter, we’ve known for too long that Washington is broken, with leaders dividing rather than uniting us. Missourians know that we need more compassion and less politics. To truly solve problems, we need leadership that puts politics aside and puts people first – and that’s exactly what I’m ready to do as your next U.S. senator.
**But look: I believe leaders should talk less and listen more – and that’s why I’m reaching out to you as we kick off this campaign.[This is our campaign’s very first general election priorities survey, and your answers today will help guide the strategy to fix a broken Washington and rebuild our great state. I’d be so grateful for your input.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48875018/359915957/-2043110283?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk202-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTk1ODA4Ni1hMTE1LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_PtaNnoAWKtDkopyr3Bkp1hnaZZVSNAruAqw33xRJaY=&emci=c18815b2-7d13-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=4e958086-a115-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=4450063)**
While working in the hospital, I cared for children, seniors, and people from all walks of life. It’s also where I learned the importance of quality healthcare. As a nurse, I believe that every person deserves access to the very best medical care, and as a parent, I believe that every person should have access to contraception and abortion care – full stop.
Now that the Supreme Court has overturned Roe v. Wade, we're in an uncertain and scary time. **We don’t know what will happen next, but here’s what I do know: You can count on me to fight for the rights of ALL Missourians.**
But I can only run a winning campaign if grassroots input is at the center of our strategy. **[So, Peter, will you help start the general election strong by responding to our priorities survey? Your opinion means a lot to me.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48875020/359915958/-2043110283?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk202-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTk1ODA4Ni1hMTE1LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_PtaNnoAWKtDkopyr3Bkp1hnaZZVSNAruAqw33xRJaY=&emci=c18815b2-7d13-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=4e958086-a115-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=4450063)**
| | [Take the Survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48875022/359915959/-2043110283?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk202-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTk1ODA4Ni1hMTE1LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_PtaNnoAWKtDkopyr3Bkp1hnaZZVSNAruAqw33xRJaY=&emci=c18815b2-7d13-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=4e958086-a115-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=4450063)

Trudy

Hi everyone,
Garret Moore with Team Olikara here. I wanted to reach out to share our TV ad hitting the airwaves this morning.

Steven is willing to do what’s right for you, no matter the political repercussions.

Today, our whole team will be out on the doors talking to voters about this very message but a TV ad like this can reach the folks we can’t so please help our team out with a donation if you can. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/teamolikara?refcode=augemail6]

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Are the Biden administration’s energy policies affecting you?
body:
Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pum
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdfemhmfkbav1p3857e50q6fk415hu8qjmv0btp0_rp22sh2s8i66pb4s3g68or4s9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq9dhkumqb7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65slgmlg72sbicurj7dr7c2qnctdn6armao70smrr7ctge5ijdd1mc1ir6d30sirrfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1p32pjmcspm1ptie5j79o5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3erfqtia10evnkcnpg3ta5va42kcv7qcj11trrg_rp22sh2s8i66pb4s3g68or4s9h2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family. [**Would you be willing to share your thoughts in this brief 8 question survey?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4fjfdh509b48b315mnj9etsh1vqb5d39j9b5eao_rp22sh2s8i66pb4s3g68or4s9h2bs) By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think—and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. **You can get started right now using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/energy-independence-survey/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zec8pi2vo08f2ef25d4og45fahh1gmlr7ffe83g8_rp22sh2s8i66pb4s3g68or4s9h2bs)** Thank you so much for your time. I am truly grateful. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

name: Kelly Hall, Executive Director
subject: Re: winning in Kansas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Fairness Project
body:
https://www.thefairnessproject.org/ [https://www.thefairnessproject.org/]
Dear friend,

I’ll be honest with you: When Fairness Project started powering ballot measures campaigns more than 7 years ago, we never could have imagined protecting access to abortion would come down to this.

Back in 2015, we were laser-focused on fights that had already made their way to the states. We knew ballot measures were perhaps the most powerful tool voters had at their disposal, and we were readily using this tool to expand health care access, raise wages, and help workers secure paid family leave.

But back then, we never imagined that ballot measures and the arsenal of tools direct democracy empowers us with would become the most vital and likely way for us to preserve every American’s reproductive freedom.

This past week in Kansas, we saw voters from all backgrounds come together and overwhelmingly strike down a measure politicians had put on the ballot to ban access to abortion.

Team, our work has always been important, but now ballot measures are quite literally our last line of defense to protect reproductive choice.

This win proves again that voters in blue, purple, and red states all agree: Politicians shouldn’t have the last say on what decisions we make with our bodies — we will.

We’ve been working to advance progress and protect our fundamental rights through direct democracy for years, but the results out of Kansas are one of the most exciting moments we’ve ever seen.

Now, we must keep up the momentum to make sure that no matter which attacks come our way, we’re successful in protecting abortion in Michigan and Vermont. That’s why we’re throwing every resource we can behind these two movements, and team, we’d love to have your support alongside us. If you’re with us in the fight to power both of these campaigns to victory, please contribute $25 now to help us win in Michigan and Vermont this November. clean_body: [] Dear friend, I’ll be honest with you: When Fairness Project started powering ballot measures campaigns more than 7 years ago, we never could have imagined protecting access to abortion would come down to this. Back in 2015, we were laser-focused on fights that had already made their way to the states. We knew ballot measures were perhaps the most powerful tool voters had at their disposal, and we were readily using this tool to expand health care access, raise wages, and help workers secure paid family leave. But back then, we never imagined that ballot measures and the arsenal of tools direct democracy empowers us with would become the most vital and likely way for us to preserve every American’s reproductive freedom. This past week in Kansas, we saw voters from all backgrounds come together and overwhelmingly strike down a measure politicians had put on the ballot to ban access to abortion. Team, our work has always been important, but now ballot measures are quite literally our last line of defense to protect reproductive choice. This win proves again that voters in blue, purple, and red states all agree: Politicians shouldn’t have the last say on what decisions we make with our bodies — we will. We’ve been working to advance progress and protect our fundamental rights through direct democracy for years, but the results out of Kansas are one of the most exciting moments we’ve ever seen. Now, we must keep up the momentum to make sure that no matter which attacks come our way, we’re successful in protecting abortion in Michigan and Vermont. That’s why we’re throwing every resource we can behind these two movements, and team, we’d love to have your support alongside us. If you’re with us in the fight to power both of these campaigns to victory, please contribute $25 now to help us win in Michigan and Vermont this November. [] CONTRIBUTE → [ you for stepping up, friend . We can win this. [] Kelly Hall Executive Director Fairness Project [] = [ to grassroots supporters like you, our team at the Fairness Project has won 24 people-powered ballot measure campaigns since 2016, changing over 18 million lives by expanding health care, raising wages, guaranteeing paid leave, and ending predatory lending directly at the ballot box when politicians refuse to act. Your support allows us to make this progress possible. We know we’re up against a flood of GOP money. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48877922/359921666/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzEwOTJhOC1hNDE1LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aljoJToRbxuoZBtsoLIcyCx0RQId0fFA9PjH_2mxXXY=)
Friend, Campaigns are expensive. From hiring staff and training volunteers, to keeping our ads on TV and digital platforms and shoring up our get-out-the-vote operation, there are countless moving pieces that require sustained funding in order to win. Building a campaign that’s built to win tough races like this one requires discipline, so preparation is the name of the game. And here’s what we know: **We’re up against a flood of money.** Whether it’s the $200 million-plus warchest that Mitch McConnell and the National GOP built to target seats like Michael’s or Mitch McConnell calling our self-funding opponent his “perfect candidate” and vowing to go “all-in in Colorado,” we can know for sure there will be huge sums of money spent against us in this critical stretch. So as our team works to create plans from A to Z, knowing how much money we have coming in the door **each month** goes a long way. A monthly donation starting today will make our campaign as efficient as possible. With your help, we’ll be able to plan ahead and know how many ads we can run, how many organizers we can hire, and so much more. Michael doesn’t take a dime from federal lobbyists or corporate PACs, which is why we’re asking you for help. We are powered by your support, and the best way to show that support is by starting a monthly donation today. **So we're asking: Can you commit to being a monthly supporter today? | We sadly know all too well what Sisolak's tenure in Carson City has looked like by the numbers...
3rd highest unemployment rate... 95,000 small businesses permanently closed because of his lockdowns... An extra $805 per month being spent by Nevada families because of inflation...

body:
What direction will we choose?

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48878014/359922211/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmViYTkwMy1hNTE1LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FOxa3t5vSpFL1McvOr3e9T5g0IbdiebaNdSMTao_lds=&emci=e2769e9a-e314-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=a6eba903-a515-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=43566853)

| | The nation, and the world, will watch what happens in Georgia on November 8. Why? Because America’s future runs through Georgia.

On November 8, we’ll find out:
* Will we re-elect Rev. Warnock and keep the Senate blue, or hand the Senate back to Mitch McConnell, who will block all our progress?
* Will we elect Stacey Abrams as our next governor, or will Georgia continue lurching right under Brian Kemp’s extremist rule?
* Will we re-elect Sanford Bishop, or will the House be taken over by an insurrectionist GOP that wants to destroy our democracy?

The stakes could not be higher.

[_**If we lose in 2022, the stage will be set for Donald Trump, or someone even worse, to make a comeback in 2024 as America and the world watches in horror.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48878015/359922212/-32001499?refcode=20220806.2_DPG_8R_A&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmViYTkwMy1hNTE1LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FOxa3t5vSpFL1McvOr3e9T5g0IbdiebaNdSMTao_lds=)

But the good news is that we still have time to win this year. So we are begging and pleading with you, Peter, [_**Rush a $10 donation to the Democratic Party of Georgia**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48878017/359922214/-32001499?refcode=20220806.2_DPG_8R_A&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmViYTkwMy1hNTE1LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FOxa3t5vSpFL1McvOr3e9T5g0IbdiebaNdSMTao_lds=) so we can keep control of Congress, oust Brian Kemp, and protect our democracy.

[_**Please, use the button below to donate right away >>>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48878019/359922216/-32001499?refcode=20220806.2_DPG_8R_A&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmViYTkwMy1hNTE1LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FOxa3t5vSpFL1McvOr3e9T5g0IbdiebaNdSMTao_lds=) | [RUSH $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48878021/359922218/710125701?refcode=20220806.2_DPG_8R_A&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmViYTkwMy1hNTE1LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FOxa3t5vSpFL1McvOr3e9T5g0IbdiebaNdSMTao_lds=)

name: Josh Shapiro
subject: I’ve fought some hard fights
body:
I’ve fought and won before, but I’m not taking anything for granted.
| | |
---
Derek, there’s been a lot of talk about how this race is going to be a tough one for us to win.

But here’s what I want you to know: I’ve been in tough races before — and I’ve never lost, because I’ve always had a strong team on my side. [**Can you contribute to our campaign and to Chrissy so we can keep our momentum going?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48878196/359922909/1812624574?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk642-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTYzZWNiNC1hNTE1LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=71qg8FBOkrwOPjQQJV67IGESbSSCLdbwfo7-jCj44Z0=)
**2004** : I won my State Representative race in a Republican district as a Democrat. I knocked on 18,000 doors and wore out two pairs of shoes in the process. I won re-election in my district for three more terms, too.

**2011** : I ran for the Montgomery County Board of Commissioners and won — marking the first time in history that Republicans lost control of the Board of Commissioners and the first time Democrats controlled the Board since the Civil War.

**2016** : I ran for Pennsylvania Attorney General and won with 51% of the vote — at the same time Donald Trump won Pennsylvania, too.

**2020** : I ran for re-election as the People’s Attorney General — and received more votes than any candidate in Pennsylvania history.
**[Let me be clear: We need to win this time too because our rights and our freedoms are on the line. I’ve only won races because I’ve had supporters on my side — which is why I'm going to need your help to do this. Can you chip in today to help me win this race and to help Chrissy?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48878197/359922910/1812624574?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk642-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTYzZWNiNC1hNTE1LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=71qg8FBOkrwOPjQQJV67IGESbSSCLdbwfo7-jCj44Z0=)**
| | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48878198/359922911/1812624574?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk642-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTYzZWNiNC1hNTE1LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=71qg8FBOkrwOPjQQJV67IGESbSSCLdbwfo7-jCj44Z0=)
---
I’ve fought and won before, but I’m not taking anything for granted. Neither should any of us. We need everyone off the sidelines and in the game because it’s our time.
Thanks folks,

Josh Shapiro
_Democratic Nominee for Pennsylvania Governor_
| Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
P.O. Box 222
Devon, PA 19333
United States Emails are a crucial way for us to stay in touch with our top supporters; however, we understand if you need a break from political emails right now. If you'd like to pause emails for the next few weeks, you can click [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48878199/359922912/-1727112621?refcode=jtk642-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTYzZWNiNC1hNTE1LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=71qg8FBOkrwOPjQQJV67IGESbSSCLdbwfo7-jCj44Z0=&emci=ea29a461-0013-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=2e63ecb4-a515-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=21278485). subject: Republicans are threatening your right to vote again, 57 years later.

body:
Bob is asking you to show that you're ready to defend our sacred right to vote. Join us in supporting the Freedom to Vote Act today. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48878354/359923612/-744169294?refcode=Header&ms=Header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjRjYTVhZi1hNjE1LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VCG1n1Ttp2IG5vMrNDWB7P_ZvJ-5-fFGw7GpsjOcSWc=&emci=d16628e8-2714-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=3f4ca5af-a615-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=8943725) Peter,

Fifty-seven years ago today, the Voting Rights Act of 1965 was finally signed into law in an effort to ensure every eligible person could vote.

It wasn't an easy road to get there. Brave men and women like Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr., John Lewis, Rosa Parks, and countless others put their lives on the line to build the public pressure needed to finally win the right to vote.

Sadly, extremists have worked to gradually chip away at that victory. In just the 18 months since the January 6 insurrection, **Republicans have launched an all-out assault on voting rights, introducing well over 400 voter suppression bills in 49 state legislatures.**

Our rights and our democracy are under siege. Yet Senate Republicans continue voting to block the Senate from even debating legislation to protect voting rights as we approach one of the most important elections of our lives.

[**Bob is asking you to take action now and show that you're ready to defend our sacred right to vote. Join us in supporting the Freedom to Vote Act today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48878355/359923613/939826977?ms=em22_220806_votrts_adv_gq_act___tc_ettx&refcode=em22_220806_votrts_adv_gq_act___tc_ettx&source=em22_220806_votrts_adv_gq_act___tc_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220806_votrts_adv_gq_act___tc_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=8CDeK6MYrZyTik1BrKXV84xzEZ%2B2FtZro3fPE1la1urc%2BRV6mUYuarBcYPbM5TVTCd4EBDJnGRuAnRrzs7r0kXYm4tEwRh2zW%2FzoiZ5Wb1uMRPZbldUQElIY2w71Yu49zPXDFiEpuFSFPS1GlHc0J2XVqnEeZZQ%2BQPoR9wFia%2FOzI%2BvZP6novBK0YUNTogcD&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjRjYTVhZi1hNjE1LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VCG1n1Ttp2IG5vMrNDWB7P_ZvJ-5-fFGw7GpsjOcSWc=&emci=d16628e8-2714-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=3f4ca5af-a615-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=8943725)

The right to vote is a fundamental right, and central to our entire democratic system. Without free and fair access to the ballot, our democracy is lost.

The Freedom to Vote Act would defend and expand voting rights for all Americans, reduce the influence of money in politics, prevent politicians from picking their voters through gerrymandering, and create new ethics rules to hold office holders to a higher standard. It has already passed in the House, but Republican obstruction has blocked the bill from receiving a vote.

If Republicans are unwilling to do their part to defend democracy, then it's up to the rest of us. That's one reason why Bob is committed to reforming Senate rules so we can finally end Republican obstruction of our democracy and protect your voting rights.

**[Bob is counting on you to stand with him. Will you join us in supporting the Freedom to Vote Act? Add your name now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48878356/359923614/939826977?ms=em22_220806_votrts_adv_gq_act___tc_ettx&refcode=em22_220806_votrts_adv_gq_act___tc_ettx&source=em22_220806_votrts_adv_gq_act___tc_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220806_votrts_adv_gq_act___tc_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=8CDeK6MYrZyTik1BrKXV84xzEZ%2B2FtZro3fPE1la1urc%2BRV6mUYuarBcYPbM5TVTCd4EBDJnGRuAnRrzs7r0kXYm4tEwRh2zW%2FzoiZ5Wb1uMRPZbldUQElIY2w71Yu49zPXDFiEpuFSFPS1GlHc0J2XVqnEeZZQ%2BQPoR9wFia%2FOzI%2BvZP6novBK0YUNTogcD&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjRjYTVhZi1hNjE1LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VCG1n1Ttp2IG5vMrNDWB7P_ZvJ-5-fFGw7GpsjOcSWc=&emci=d16628e8-2714-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=3f4ca5af-a615-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=8943725)**

Thank you for defending our democracy,

Team Casey | [Add your name >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48878357/359923615/939826977?ms=em22_220806_votrts_adv_gq_act___tc_ettx&refcode=em22_220806_votrts_adv_gq_act___tc_ettx&source=em22_220806_votrts_adv_gq_act___tc_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220806_votrts_adv_gq_act___tc_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=8CDeK6MYrZyTik1BrKXV84xzEZ%2B2FtZro3fPE1la1urc%2BRV6mUYuarBcYPbM5TVTCd4EBDJnGRuAnRrzs7r0kXYm4tEwRh2zW%2FzoiZ5Wb1uMRPZbldUQElIY2w71Yu49zPXDFiEpuFSFPS1GlHc0J2XVqnEeZZQ%2BQPoR9wFia%2FOzI%2BvZP6novBK0YUNTogcD&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjRjYTVhZi1hNjE1LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VCG1n1Ttp2IG5vMrNDWB7P_ZvJ-5-fFGw7GpsjOcSWc=&emci=d16628e8-2714-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=3f4ca5af-a615-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=8943725)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Renewing America – update from Mississippi’s favorite think tank
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-8132544?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear #VALUE!,

**Many young Americans are being taught contempt for their own country.** Progressive professors encourage students to believe that America is always in the wrong.

The United States was built on the idea that everyone is an individual, each in possession of their own inalienable rights. **Today, tragically, young Americans are often invited to think of themselves as victims, defined by where they sit in an imagined hierarchy of victimhood. **
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=0c41435186&e=5703353baa)
---
**Watch the truth: America is an exceptional success**
|
The Mississippi Center for Public Policy led the fight to pass a law in our state to combat Critical Race theory. We are delighted that we won, but legislation is not enough.

**To win a battle of ideas, bad ideas about America need to be replaced with good ideas.**

To help do this, we have today launched the [**_America Explained_** series](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=67886c4b48&e=5703353baa), a collection of short videos that we will be posting online, intended for a young audience. The aim is to show that America is an exceptional country, founded on principles that have elevated the condition of all of humankind.

For most of human history, hierarchy and hereditary were seen as the natural order. People were defined in terms of class, birth and caste. **America was instead founded on a very different idea; that everyone was created equal, in possession of their own set of rights. **

To be sure, this principle has not always been perfectly applied. The United States has produced laws and leaders that often failed to live up to such noble sentiments. But using every history and civics class to undermine America’s founding principles, as some progressive professors seem to do, is simply wrong.

**America’s founding principles cannot be bettered. **

One hundred and fifty years after the Declaration of Independence, Calvin Coolidge said that “If all men are created equal, that is final. If they are endowed with inalienable rights, that is final. No advance can be made beyond these [principles]."

He went on to warn that if anyone rejects the principles on which America was founded, the only direction in which they will take America is backward.

**Our America Explained collection will, we hope, ensure that young Mississippians – and indeed people across the country – hear the counter arguments to the progressive propaganda that they are often exposed to.**

As someone engaged in the battle of ideas, I can’t help noticing that many ‘woke’ academics seem to be curiously reluctant to engage in public debate or have their ideas subject to scrutiny. Could it be that deep down they know that their ideology won’t survive contact with the counter arguments?

Our new initiative aims to ensure that there is a free and fair competition of ideas. Let battle begin!

Have a great weekend ....

clean_body: | | | | | | Dear #VALUE!, Many young Americans are being taught contempt for their own country. Progressive professors encourage students to believe that America is always in the wrong. The United States was built on the idea that everyone is an individual, each in possession of their own inalienable rights. Today, tragically, young Americans are often invited to think of themselves as victims, defined by where they sit in an imagined hierarchy of victimhood. | Watch the truth: America is an exceptional success | The Mississippi Center for Public Policy led the fight to pass a law in our state to combat Critical Race theory. We are delighted that we won, but legislation is not enough. To win a battle of ideas, bad ideas about America need to be replaced with good ideas. To help do this, we have today launched the , a collection of short videos that we will be posting online, intended for a young audience. The aim is to show that America is an exceptional country, founded on principles that have elevated the condition of all of humankind. For most of human history, hierarchy and hereditary were seen as the natural order. People were defined in terms of class, birth and caste. America was instead founded on a very different idea; that everyone was created equal, in possession of their own set of rights. To be sure, this principle has not always been perfectly applied. The United States has produced laws and leaders that often failed to live up to such noble sentiments. But using every history and civics class to undermine America’s founding principles, as some progressive professors seem to do, is simply wrong. America’s founding principles cannot be bettered. One hundred and fifty years after the Declaration of Independence, Calvin Coolidge said that “If all men are created equal, that is final. If they are endowed with inalienable rights, that is final. No advance can be made beyond these [principles]." He went on to warn that if anyone rejects the principles on which America was founded, the only direction in which they will take America is backward. Our America Explained collection will, we hope, ensure that young Mississippians – and indeed people across the country – hear the counter arguments to the progressive propaganda that they are often exposed to. As someone engaged in the battle of ideas, I can’t help noticing that many ‘woke’ academics seem to be curiously reluctant to engage in public debate or have their ideas subject to scrutiny. Could it be that deep down they know that their ideology won’t survive contact with the counter arguments? Our new initiative aims to ensure that there is a free and fair competition of ideas. Let battle begin! Have a great weekend .... | "Forward this email to a friend!" | | Warm regards, Douglas Carswell President & CEO | | |

name: Herschel Walker
subject: RACISM is real at MSNBC
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I’ll repeat what I said before: this is racist, disgusting, and sad. |
---
Fellow American,

Every morning I wake up, determined to get the most out of each day. I'm an optimist and firmly believe it takes more effort to have a bad day than a good one.

But I've got to tell you, MSNBC and their cast of far-Left characters do their best to ruin my day as often as they can. You might recall that earlier this year one of their regular panelists began attacking our Senate campaign.

In April, he called me an **"ignorant neophyte,"** and said that my candidacy is **"a white insult to Black people."**

Then he called Senator Tim Scott and me _**"tokens"**_ who are _**"shucking and jiving for their white handlers."** _

Now, he's back at it again, saying this about me on MSNBC earlier this week:

| _**"Walker is doing what he's told, and that is what Republicans like. That's what Republicans want from their negroes: to do what they're told."**_
---

I'll repeat what I said in April: **this is racist, disgusting, and sad.**

What's also disturbing is that our opponent, who also happens to be Black, has never once condemned any of these blatantly racist remarks. _Can you imagine if these comments were made by a conservative about a Black Democrat? The outrage would be instantaneous and overwhelming - and rightly so._

_**Senator Warnock's silence is deafening and disappointing.**_

The loudest and clearest way to push back against these kinds of disgusting attacks is to defeat them at the ballot box. **[Please help me stand up against MSNBC, reject racist commentators, and defeat silent Democrats by donating $10, $20, $50, or even $100 right now.](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=69c73627e05644c883cae01bd03b7114&_e=yiPmudkdajpXtFpaOzdEM5iSKYvyEW-7y0r2GD1wic55WUsqitaKLh1tuG3hGGw_4s9Rwe9YJALtHPrNtaFoY658rPanQqqfVrUJlQqBeRShKOih-h0XncKbg-SbmmvDvAX_yD6hPCPMM65BQpeZmnBc1HQJwZRBBnTQQCTrqM_woT1ARLCiqsTgI4kJ3p267A4LKET3KpfSASR8wy7jSs-o2sg_FUTBe-RFd8MoQFqVSi9COxIyd7wQFMBjhBnqwV2SmSxdfpRVvL8-DLDLf2kN88ZX-Es9LmA7Nwwc5YvvCDs4tJi0kbaZXv3gz9Rs9le8apMuQ4FwO1_dK1eCzNNiekgwfz2jXda5M4i1KGtWtni0lE_G8SM3lXuVLD4lIgksgjoWNWtFWXt2OhXD1nTdLRV80UE6ppWX1Io3HhlN03k5akxW1a-h5zAE_y7Fhok-QwngOK2p3GdHDJ0b-Nm691mSPcMRz8IoLZGAqcGqGuLaQv8GBpPxPvL4jyJu)**

clean_body: I’ll repeat what I said before: this is racist, disgusting, and sad. | Fellow American, Every morning I wake up, determined to get the most out of each day. I'm an optimist and firmly believe it takes more effort to have a bad day than a good one. But I've got to tell you, MSNBC and their cast of far-Left characters do their best to ruin my day as often as they can. You might recall that earlier this year one of their regular panelists began attacking our Senate campaign. In April, he called me an "ignorant neophyte," and said that my candidacy is "a white insult to Black people." Then he called Senator Tim Scott and me "tokens" who are "shucking and jiving for their white handlers." Now, he's back at it again, saying this about me on MSNBC earlier this week: | "Walker is doing what he's told, and that is what Republicans like. That's what Republicans want from their negroes: to do what they're told." I'll repeat what I said in April: this is racist, disgusting, and sad. What's also disturbing is that our opponent, who also happens to be Black, has never once condemned any of these blatantly racist remarks. Can you imagine if these comments were made by a conservative about a Black Democrat? The outrage would be instantaneous and overwhelming - and rightly so. Senator Warnock's silence is deafening and disappointing. The loudest and clearest way to push back against these kinds of disgusting attacks is to defeat them at the ballot box. Enough is enough. It's time to show them a groundswell of grassroots support from across Georgia and around the country. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

body:
If we don’t pull off a major win in Georgia, it’s likely that the far Left will expand their razor-thin majority and trample our conservative values,

| | Friend,

In about 3 months, I will face Democrat Raphael Warnock on Election Day.

If he wins, there will be dire consequences for our country. Not only will we be reelecting a Democrat who has supported the disastrous Biden agenda nearly 100% of the time, but we’ll also be risking our chance of taking back the Senate majority. _**If we don’t pull off a major win in Georgia, it’s likely that the far Left will expand their razor-thin majority and trample our conservative values, pushing them into the shadows forever.**_

In the face of constant attacks from the media and the national Democrat machine, it’s never been more important that hardworking, dedicated conservatives like you join our fight.

_**[It’s important that we band together and show the Democrats that we’re willing to do _whatever it takes_ to pull off a win.](http://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=44d148241a7945e182620233ada091f1&_e=FbP8Kp_52-1DkCeahe-NMLGfAoDkXFxOSH83quEmF3vwyzLzQSUzFj8hn63kPNmCPyb_DYgA_jgVu6NcDWM95F9C9OxeO4Gxhrcwq6-_32EqjUWtioyhe4G3U0mkrLI5MnWv7s1mWFEPIvM-pKm4TagPtGXhd3SRIi9Ks9SHNsAOUHZ_KlNnYYk_YIuFj17-c69c21CFVPIZnMTnw9DzI2LLRlIpliLxHGVVRbnx986-vZPMTsqu0-k1PH_7OAz8yDoBHiqYWeppR6xwh9NZUgUrfgt7zJy98EI7BepRnmx70z2tErdlIlPx5dkMdJgh7XbAq4I4vfRU6YycOxGbVpxQxi0Zn3o_W1m8aqLQHzlUOP_Tp3nDPbRpQlcWDX-nFR8CPbHXAtlGaKz8vLRvO_ivM83iuNSBqQIJDbc05RQViREdiCUOgQH1JjbIAo6IsMUTyh20Y1Xvc0x5WZAX1QanZP1pRrcXztRFpp0Lvs6e4-PLiTHYWfXwrv59MBMZywHoidDU-ROwBxLb-Ry1Ew%3D%3D "It’s important that we band together and show the Democrats that we’re willing to do whatever it takes to pull off a win.")**_

We must show them that no matter how much dark money they raise or how many false attack ads they run against me, it doesn’t matter. Republicans WILL prevail. We WILL come out victorious on November 8, 2022.

_**[Friend, I’m humbly asking – if you have anything to spare, anything at all – please step up today to help us win big in Georgia and reclaim the conservative majority in the Senate. There’s so much on the line, and we NEED your help.](http://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=44d148241a7945e182620233ada091f1&_e=FbP8Kp_52-1DkCeahe-NMLGfAoDkXFxOSH83quEmF3vwyzLzQSUzFj8hn63kPNmCPyb_DYgA_jgVu6NcDWM95F9C9OxeO4Gxhrcwq6-_32EqjUWtioyhe4G3U0mkrLI5MnWv7s1mWFEPIvM-pKm4TagPtGXhd3SRIi9Ks9SHNsAOUHZ_KlNnYYk_YIuFj17-c69c21CFVPIZnMTnw9DzI2LLRlIpliLxHGVVRbnx986-vZPMTsqu0-k1PH_7OAz8yDoBHiqYWeppR6xwh9NZUgUrfgt7zJy98EI7BepRnmx70z2tErdlIlPx5dkMdJgh9tB-90nKqZfQ-hQ8oPGFWIVAqz4z3OveXYHCE-LooidSvrXZS7qZ0WU9NgFjSk68pkpaSMfWJf54yOPborbQ44AWAkRQjidJSSot0w7NWj2YiFNj4MobBDJUR81DKfnGKJdcv_tQSSYv0PJXXIWTWTZg6oa-JwvlgkOX7CUwhc1tLI8b0ZO_Z9xYYmUsjTFivPzGu9m_MxbPbb0kdZCitg%3D%3D "Friend, I’m humbly asking – if you have anything to spare, anything at all – please step up today to help us win big in Georgia and reclaim the conservative majority in the Senate. There’s so much on the line, and we NEED your help.")**_

_**[What happens in Georgia will determine the fate of the country for years to come.](http://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=44d148241a7945e182620233ada091f1&_e=FbP8Kp_52-1DkCeahe-NMLGfAoDkXFxOSH83quEmF3vwyzLzQSUzFj8hn63kPNmCPyb_DYgA_jgVu6NcDWM95F9C9OxeO4Gxhrcwq6-_32EqjUWtioyhe4G3U0mkrLI5MnWv7s1mWFEPIvM-pKm4TagPtGXhd3SRIi9Ks9SHNsAOUHZ_KlNnYYk_YIuFj17-c69c21CFVPIZnMTnw9DzI2LLRlIpliLxHGVVRbnx986-vZPMTsqu0-k1PH_7OAz8yDoBHiqYWeppR6xwh9NZUgUrfgt7zJy98EI7BepRnmx70z2tErdlIlPx5dkMdJghkZQEouJ87kqzkXAs3qAm20D8KsH8pLx4QtqKFJnJDmSN8HiK_9N5sfD3LPhnEmOyDqEADNbjHhTgQoqw056xX9LOzumDP9jZAhXNrW2U67cn19JLYrle8iiXtzmiHYpbCRkPtLFkBcrwz8Y7U7-jJlWtpb0TQ6zAz7aWM2zUMfmdbnNYauzASYXdNp392Pq9wSHErLNxOEOh1Tk5LIlDwg%3D%3D "What happens in Georgia will determine the fate of the country for years to come.")**_

All eyes are on Georgia, and we cannot let the Democrats win the Peach State again. **_[Will you please help close the gap and defeat Democrat Senator Raphael Warnock and his far-left allies?](http://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=44d148241a7945e182620233ada091f1&_e=FbP8Kp_52-1DkCeahe-NMLGfAoDkXFxOSH83quEmF3vwyzLzQSUzFj8hn63kPNmCPyb_DYgA_jgVu6NcDWM95F9C9OxeO4Gxhrcwq6-_32EqjUWtioyhe4G3U0mkrLI5MnWv7s1mWFEPIvM-pKm4TagPtGXhd3SRIi9Ks9SHNsAOUHZ_KlNnYYk_YIuFj17-c69c21CFVPIZnMTnw9DzI2LLRlIpliLxHGVVRbnx986-vZPMTsqu0-k1PH_7OAz8yDoBHiqYWeppR6xwh9NZUgUrfgt7zJy98EI7BepRnmx70z2tErdlIlPx5dkMdJght_rId-J6igK0SSTAUe4gFDi2JBln7aC6zB0e3ChbOW5T62gLW45RjmjnLOWfQ4Nz3dXCSq6AM6J-2Bkfwsr2R64U-DFxWf8Xes16Qbx2sneeBQ_sds1wOvERH8du2fkJ0kuHs2DHg8Yq-dEjHot0Qu1Y_PZRxPxBcyVZhDU-SOPusHGj4WVRJzYv3_RSeHodAfXf8RrnEhkGaFE5Px_Ljg%3D%3D "Will you please help close the gap and defeat Democrat Senator Raphael Warnock and his far-left allies?")_**

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: A historic opportunity
body:
In 1973, the U.S. Supreme Court decided the case Roe v. Wade. And since that day, more than 63 million babies have been killed through abortion in our |
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, In 1973, the U.S. Supreme Court decided the case Roe v. Wade. And since that day, more than 63 million babies have been killed through abortion in our country. It was the most destructive ruling in the history of our nation. And it led to an anti-life ideology that still infects America to this day. From what I’ve been told, you are someone who values and respects life in all its stages, and I’m guessing this makes you sick to your stomach just like it does to me. But the tide is changing, and that’s why I asked if I could send you this email today. [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=cde3bce84d9e4352a48853e000e34a61&_e=hcCxa9vyCwSW7fi-GsOtjvPdcn1m-l3vg8fXSkbVq_j2vebnLM0v7IxDt81d3zyYmlCyGeYfotwaF7FDZTCLcwgKFdl1x2VBSKvYGVDhRE4a1NLYxVLOgyFB7UyEfrDv9aZWZ-jUdAvBT45RGAcmubnvEg0bQZit5tg-x1Un8W1serhvpw43CLrmLrPCScHAQ4lnt0-nih7BV0QoHEgE3UWsjFM2BbVw-cVFpJGMXvPVrNBfWoOy8aOz7v5qBMrPb99T7srRyu1ina1GkbrqHFJRXMC-Tcp8Fl8ka688eHbuc9V4sElpYa1v9MRW6v9qQ0AGYaEfMDQ7tKrkwUt2leemV8eNk1NE6BZyvWkPya6V92sIvuIRY1a35FHvChqbSQgc42WB8WUqVCdqXoIEyBHDYKiSKgeKawf9K3raf8tsNUThsiYLXYsSc2TSSMJo)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ The U.S. Supreme Court’s decision to overturn Roe gives us a historic opportunity to rebuild a culture of life. The battle for life has returned to the states. And we have a lot of work to do. Because the laws and needs of each state vary, it will take a supercharged effort to fight for the protection of the unborn. But the American Cornerstone Institute is committed to providing resources to support pro-life efforts in each state. And that’s why we need YOU! **Will you help rebuild a culture of life in states across America by making a tax-deductible gift today?** We have seen that the opposition is more hostile than ever now that the official decision has come down. We got a glimpse at those who are anti-life have reacted since the leak was made public. That’s why we’re asking you to give right now to help us fight back to protect life for the unborn with every tool at our disposal. So, please don’t wait. clean_body: In 1973, the U.S. Supreme Court decided the case Roe v. Wade. And since that day, more than 63 million babies have been killed through abortion in our | | | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, In 1973, the U.S. Supreme Court decided the case Roe v. Wade. And since that day, more than 63 million babies have been killed through abortion in our country. It was the most destructive ruling in the history of our nation. And it led to an anti-life ideology that still infects America to this day. From what I’ve been told, you are someone who values and respects life in all its stages, and I’m guessing this makes you sick to your stomach just like it does to me. But the tide is changing, and that’s why I asked if I could send you this email today. Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute The U.S. Supreme Court’s decision to overturn Roe gives us a historic opportunity to rebuild a culture of life. The battle for life has returned to the states. And we have a lot of work to do. Because the laws and needs of each state vary, it will take a supercharged effort to fight for the protection of the unborn. But the American Cornerstone Institute is committed to providing resources to support pro-life efforts in each state. And that’s why we need YOU! Will you help rebuild a culture of life in states across America by making a tax-deductible gift today? We have seen that the opposition is more hostile than ever now that the official decision has come down. We got a glimpse at those who are anti-life have reacted since the leak was made public. That’s why we’re asking you to give right now to help us fight back to protect life for the unborn with every tool at our disposal. So, please don’t wait. name: Delina DiSanto
subject: What a ride! Let me thank you here.
body:
Let's ensure Jevin Hodge wins in November!
| | | [](https://hmabrz.fd51.fdske.com/ec/gAAAAABi7mbhp9mgp7RdCZ4YynCfPLHLxQyg1pEJtqXvMu8oq7fol06tycLRV5xG3w60oLZvN86T_M6QPhucoaOBbqlG_vFfKRJ6sjtdJOXzhrk7zmVQTs7GvsiFQVhATaYDdm7l3yWokz0bkovxjhdLcQjHZCp95loLJUbCIl5vWDvKaDYM5n1xR2jfXvBqSnY3uULkWnwJJDj8GfxpduFP5sj9YRGzcY9XG80B-V-94edhKlxI8EELg63xIfNMn5lnY4B1frjgZ744RoWM_ITrBfHReZKsaL1UQ3sLp94gqpWxiUeCvlyd8oBkSxtiUL5In-__cD7He4NuqaJHzM0BYU8oKKfppuat7PQdR4CfNaHTV1skAQqUPiw1z_kQEWexQRnbOKqR)
---
| Dear Peter,

Wow, what a ride this has been! (Literally, too!) It's been 4 years since I started campaigning around 40,000 square miles of Arizona, countless times, and loving every minute of it. I have been fighting for our issues of Women's Rights, Healthcare for all, world class Public Education funding, Gun Reform, Veterans mental and physical health, combating our climate crisis and ensuring Environmental justice, higher wages for a better quality of life, small business investment and community incentives to create more jobs, and so much more. Running in 2018 and 2020 against Paul Gosar let me reach voters, especially in rural areas to broadcast our policies and progressive ideas, but it also gave them a voice, their chance to be able to speak their minds to someone they knew would listen and fight for them. Then in January 2022, redistricting gave me the opportunity to run against David Schweikert. I live, work and shop in AZ01, it's my home. Just like Gosar, Schweikert was involved in the Jan 6th insurrection and is a criminal. We knew my life experiences along with listening to hundreds of thousands of voters across AZ, I should run in a district and bring my strength and fight to a seat we can win. Congressional District 1 is a 2% sway to Republicans; Gosar's new 9th Congressional district is over 29%. As you all know, once our decision to change districts from Gosar's to Schweikert's put time against us to gather enough signatures to have my name on the ballot. Not having enough "certified" registered Democratic voter signatures to hand in April, and knowing we would have our signatures challenged, we decided that I should be a write-in candidate. Time was not on our side. On Tuesday, Arizona's Primary election, the people have spoken and Jevin Hodge won. **We are in good hands.** He has a great team and it's time we get behind him and ensure his win in November. We can beat David Schweikert in this very competitive race and [Jevin Hodge](https://hmabrz.fd51.fdske.com/ec/gAAAAABi7mbh3rbPUO7gQ_4zf9xthg8oz12V0sUm3Uz7vk6FXJAmBJt6j0uQFJRqAM40BPfSpn5yhXN6Xbjbl8sbOW2dO0345yFUx6R9YunJYDfY5vmyx4CuPHmGU6c66zTUb2Sqc-Q65nZrOUzyl3tMYgksofqoT7ObOfHGhvyCGZZJTI8k-cwNG7VINfn1O4iCTh8nTlUjryukxPm7G4-sF93dlBLI-64EBQGVSSoy219x9n52xMbb3VeTHbeN_Y4TAoJB8Q9ivgps7ppbYUo-yrTOliUPdoN7q25wo3y1RtTImNzYqvS2i4cKE3LBQaTbfniJlYGsdQP9R4X0Pka_NcxiTpuXdyC73JbBjhvp7VkYiwCtUzcCH7YIOCH42BM7Y0LWJ0Ro) is the candidate that will make this happen! I want to say Adam Metzendorf was a great opponent in this primary as well. He worked hard and I saw him everywhere around our Democratic events. You will see more of him, at least I hope so. I want to thank all my supporters. Every one of you. Whether you supported this campaign with your hard-earned dollars or you helped us get out the word by knocking on doors, calling voters, and using your social media to amplify our message... I could not have gone this far without all of you. You helped me every step of the way. Thank you! But, most important, I can't forget to mention my Campaign Manager, Dakota, and my volunteers. I could not be who I am or where I am, if it was not for them. They were at my side since 2018. Never wavering and always, always giving me the strength I needed. They helped with everything ... and I mean everything, even caring for Archie and Simba on my campaign trails. So again, thank you all for everything. Let's all support Jevin Hodge in his race against David Schweikert, because this seat is winnable here in Arizona. I know we can win this race. We just need to let the voters know who is the best choice in November in AZ01 and that's Jevin. Oh yeah ... this is not the end. I'm not done fighting for our issues. You'll see me around! Until then, my friends, thank you again.-Delina
---
