name: Jena Griswold
subject: Celebrating progress, fighting for the future!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2208-q3-jg?refcode=220805-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2208-q3-jg?refcode=220805-email]
On the Anniversary of the Voting Rights Act of 1965, sign our petition urging the Senate to reform the filibuster and move forward on voting rights legislation. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/OMHnJ4N4h0G0YtalsWli_A2]
Sign now [https://secure.ngpvan.com/OMHnJ4N4h0G0YtalsWli_A2]
Friends,
Today is an important anniversary, and I couldn’t let it pass by without taking the time to reach out and encourage our campaign supporters to take action. In 1965, Congress passed the Voting Rights Act, which was then ratified by President Lyndon Johnson. This Act created federal protections for voters across the country, mandating that every eligible American had the opportunity to participate in democracy.
However, in recent years the Supreme Court has put our democracy at risk by weakening the Voting Rights Act and paving the way for voter suppression. On the 57th anniversary of The Voting Rights Act, we’re asking our supporters to sign the petition encouraging the Senate to reform the filibuster and move forward with voting rights bills. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/OMHnJ4N4h0G0YtalsWli_A2]
Sign now [https://secure.ngpvan.com/OMHnJ4N4h0G0YtalsWli_A2]While we celebrate the progress made during the Civil Rights movement, we must remain vigilant about the threat of far-right extremism and intentional voter disenfranchisement that we face today. The freedoms in this country are never a given. They have to be won and defended.
As your Secretary of State, I stand in solidarity with the generations of suffragettes, civil rights activists, and voting rights advocates. Colorado now has the best election system in the country. But it is crucial that we continue to work toward progress and fight off the regressive attempts of the MAGA far-right.
So, sign on today and join me in the fight to protect voting rights on the federal level! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/OMHnJ4N4h0G0YtalsWli_A2]
Sign now [https://secure.ngpvan.com/OMHnJ4N4h0G0YtalsWli_A2]Thanks for being on our team,
Jena Griswold
Secretary of State
My name is Jena Griswold. In 2018, I was elected as the first democratic Secretary of State in Colorado since 1958, the first democratic woman Secretary of State in Colorado’s history, and only the 10th woman in Colorado’s history to hold the statewide constitutional office of governor, attorney general, secretary of state, or treasurer!
CONTRIBUTE MONTHLY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2208-q3-jg?refcode=220805-email&recurring=true]
Follow Jena Online:
https://www.facebook.com/Jenaforcolorado/ [https://www.facebook.com/Jenaforcolorado/] https://twitter.com/JenaGriswold [https://twitter.com/JenaGriswold] https://www.instagram.com/jenagriswold [https://www.instagram.com/jenagriswold]
Paid for by Jena for Colorado. Rachel Gordon, Registered Agent.
Jena for Colorado
P.O. Box 270218
Louisville, CO 80027
United States

body:
I want to DRAIN IT
[](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJxdUUFvpSAY_DV6wyAo6MHDdk0PfUm72cu-PREEVFpAg9AX--sXzevupgkh-Wbmm0zmU11J6pa2Ja5JLjskGiRErjsEEYINJCWGbVkWQ4VLSTluKgVhidusgjftCrk4buRr8NGuhVhsPncDpbKkDa6FoAMcmpaXZBhhyxuKMGlwbro5hHXL8LcMPaa3KRG9KpKdV_IwOTD-rgC3ymvBweuiXQBjdNJzvWk3gSSyOgSlDqmYlYxGgRGsizGHJ370h6dP0gz3KVzSEbs4tbPVKDmpfyi3S3QhzTVMUwyWWSV1tAlRlmvD5vGOb0v04th0wjBEEJPuzghuV64nl7jP1tiXVMDw6MTM_u-LbfzTYHFBnSm26N9TSrHufmMVoTgpmDNaJu731e_P0_7288cJzlqmDvsnef2Y-5enj9x3cr1pY_RGaDrPdMQ_b5LiGT3uXUYfMoTOPYTO-tGlerg-k8uvSw8skQ3oSV3dDhZ9T3_YV_VXencpzloOlPZ_AN2_uLY)

**[It's time to Drain the Swamp.](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJxdUctq5DAQ_Br7JqOHLdsHH5I1OWQge9zchEZqjxUk2cjSDJOvX9lMkmVBCLqquiiqYSC86duesIaXeqCqo0qVZqCYUtxhThjuCanONSO6layrAWPC-qLGN-MrvXhp9UcMya2VWlw5Dx3DUpOurXvNOnwmjcwOTDbnaWJwVqy0wxzjuhXsqaAv-W2gUoAq2wXQu8mOySsg6SAYJdHHYnxEU_I6SLMZf0FZ5EyMALtUzaCTBTShdbF292QvYfcMWVqwMYfLOu4WD3exWtAX-EGlW5KPeW5wnlJ0woE2yWUEnDRWzNMD35YU1L7plRWUU6H9g1HSrdJcfOa-WhP_pUJWJq9m8W9fYpNfBouPcKTYUrjmlGq9h03UvGVZIbw1OnNvbdyuTx3z6QBno3OH46t-_5zH36-fZRj0ejPWmo23-TyXPf5xkxzPmuk-FO1zQemxR-lRPz3Vz-9v_PTnNCLHdYdG3tS3naW_8h_vK3xLHy7VUcuOtuNfIyG4mw)**

Do you remember Schedule F, Friend?

When I was in the White House, I took executive action with Schedule F to make it possible to fire federal employees who are _**bypassing our democracy to advance wokeism and corruption.**_

I promised to **Drain the Swamp** and **root out the Deep State** , and to do that, we need to make it much easier to fire rogue bureaucrats who are deliberately undermining democracy. That is exactly what SCHEDULE F accomplishes, and I want to know what YOU think about it.

body:
Here are just a few reasons why we can win in November.
| | |
---
Team, we've got the momentum behind us in this competitive New Hampshire race – and we wanted to share with you exactly why we're going to win in November.

**[But before we do, can you rush a donation to Maggie Hassan's reelection campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48879420/359928652/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk1373-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MGM2M2JlOC1hOTE1LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YW9SfCyQgp2K4jKHN0tsOjfDo-vYsHIyJJ1OUGTY2Ig=) With Election Day less than 100 days away, we need each and every one of you to come through for Maggie right now.**
| | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48879421/359928653/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk1373-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MGM2M2JlOC1hOTE1LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YW9SfCyQgp2K4jKHN0tsOjfDo-vYsHIyJJ1OUGTY2Ig=)
---
|
---
Here are just a few reasons why we can win in November, and why this race is so important:

**1) Maggie is committed to lowering the cost of health care and protecting and expanding the Affordable Care Act.** That's why she took on the entire health care industry to ban surprise medical billing.

**2) Maggie is dedicated to protecting every woman's constitutional right to an abortion.** That's why she helped secure federal funding for Planned Parenthood in New Hampshire after the state defunded it.

**3) Maggie believes that every American should have the opportunity to succeed.** That's why she took on corporate special interests to get results for the people of New Hampshire.

**But most of all, team, Maggie knows that our democracy is worth fighting for – and she's ready to fight for you. **
|
---

That's why she took on the entire health care industry to ban surprise medical billing. 2) Maggie is dedicated to protecting every woman's constitutional right to an abortion. That's why she helped secure federal funding for Planned Parenthood in New Hampshire after the state defunded it. 3) Maggie believes that every American should have the opportunity to succeed. That's why she took on corporate special interests to get results for the people of New Hampshire. name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: New survey for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=Io6qJW6h2E8c%2BNz%2F1c56s17YXRjfcEBE&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend,
Our nation is approaching a critical turning point - and the fates of _millions_ all depend on whether we take decisive action right now. Just look at what's at stake:
* Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans are threatening to institute a _nationwide_ ban on abortions if they take back the Senate in November - all made possible by the Supreme Court's egregious decision to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ and strip millions of women of their reproductive freedom.
* Justice Clarence Thomas signaled that the precedents protecting contraception and same-sex marriage could be in jeopardy next.
* Formerly "once-in-a-lifetime" climate-related disasters are happening with almost weekly frequency, but the fate of historic climate protecting legislation hangs in the balance in this Senate, with its 50-50 split.

The facts are clear: We _must_ do everything we can to protect and expand our control of the Senate and stop the GOP's extremist agenda - or millions of Americans will be in danger of losing their most fundamental personal rights. **That 's why, as Election Day closes in on us, my campaign is ramping up its efforts to protect this seat - and your direct feedback is critical to improving my strategy. **
**[So Friend, I have to ask: Will you please take a moment to share your top priorities and concerns with me? My team just put together this quick survey, and I'm counting on 38 more grassroots supporters to respond before midnight. ](https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-august-prio-2022?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1228-su-nd)**
The Supreme Court's latest term was awful for progress, but it wasn't random. For decades now, the GOP has been gearing up to restrict the rights of women, block our attempts to stop the gun violence epidemic, and limit our ability to fight climate change - and they've finally built the Supreme Court of their dreams.
But there are signs of hope. This week, voters in Kansas - traditionally a politically conservative state - voted overwhelmingly to reject an amendment that would have removed the right to a safe and legal abortion from their state constitution.**
Friend, this much is clear: The GOP's far-right, extremist agenda is not representative of the majority of Americans' priorities - but if we don't do everything we can to maintain and strengthen current control of the Senate, we may be powerless to stop them. That's why I'm committed to doing everything in my power to keep this seat blue, but first I need your support to help me build the best possible strategy.**
**[Please, will you share your feedback on our newest strategy now? We just added a number of campaign strategy meetings to our calendar for next week, and I wanted to give this powerful grassroots team a chance to be centered in our work.](https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-august-prio-2022?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1228-su-nd)**
Thank you,
Dick
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=a2B7%2BKX5%2F7ou9M8sTkwNk17YXRjfcEBE&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)
Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

name: Kermit Intern Squad
subject: Yard Signs are here!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kermit Jones for Congress

name: Team Sinema
subject: Show your support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sinema for Arizona
body:
|
#
---
Kyrsten firmly believes that all women — no matter where they live — should have the ability to make decisions about their families and their futures. **That’s why she introduced the _Reproductive Freedom For All Act_ to protect the health and wellbeing of women in Arizona and across the country.** This is a bipartisan effort to protect women’s ability to make personal health care decisions by codifying the core protections of _Roe v. Wade. _ This bill prohibits state laws that restrict women's access to care. It also protects access to contraceptives. Now, we need to come together and show our support for this bill. Together, we can work to protect women’s ability to make their own decisions about their futures.**** So we’re asking: [**Will you add your name to our petition and show your support for Kyrsten’s work to protect women’s access to care through the _Reproductive_ _Freedom For All Act_?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48880041/359931272/361231308?refcode=AU_KLS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220806_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84OTMxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjk1Yjg3NS1hZDE1LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1wRIHLus0i9C3S3HZ3Ei2ScQYYLxobFrdMAnGe6uomE=&emci=fa95b875-ad15-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=fb95b875-ad15-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=2415496) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48880042/359931273/361231308?refcode=AU_KLS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220806_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84OTMxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjk1Yjg3NS1hZDE1LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1wRIHLus0i9C3S3HZ3Ei2ScQYYLxobFrdMAnGe6uomE=&emci=fa95b875-ad15-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=fb95b875-ad15-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=2415496)

clean_body: you’ve never seen this before - I promise. | Friend! If you were to ever donate off of a fundraising email, it should be this one. Keep reading. I know you’ve already heard from my team and me a ton this last week, but I’m so anxious, and this couldn’t wait. You’re hearing this straight from the mouth of Dr. Oz: we missed ANOTHER major deadline. It is so important that we meet our fundraising goals. So I’m doing something I’ve never done before, or ever even considered doing before today. I need your help more than ever. | This opportunity is fleeting; trust me when I say this will not come around again before November. This is it. I know it seems like we keep saying it, but these are REAL goals and REAL deadlines. Thank you SO MUCH!!! name: Charlie Crist
subject: sick to my stomach
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
When I think of all the ways Gov. DeSantis has ruined Floridians’ lives for the sake of his political ambitions, I feel sick to my stomach ... |
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48880205/359932037/-1696682215?amount=25&refcode=20220806_f_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzk1ZDNlMi1iMDE1LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AOExhXzuL94Kpypk51fB6a531Ke97CTslp5OwqAo6ZQ=)
---
Folks,

When I think of all the ways Gov. DeSantis has ruined Floridians’ lives for the sake of his political ambitions, I feel sick to my stomach ...

... **but I also feel even more determined to defeat him in November.** And with the primary election only _17 days away_ , I’m asking grassroots Democrats like you to do everything you can to help me win this race.
[Make an urgent grassroots donation](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48880206/359932038/-1696682215?amount=25&refcode=20220806_f_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzk1ZDNlMi1iMDE1LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AOExhXzuL94Kpypk51fB6a531Ke97CTslp5OwqAo6ZQ=)
---
In the name of building his national profile so he can run for president in 2024, Gov. DeSantis has:
* Signed **the most restrictive anti-choice legislation in Florida’s history** , which banned almost all abortions, with zero exceptions for horrific situations like rape or incest.
* Suspended a democratically elected State Attorney because he refused to enforce his draconian 15-week abortion ban — just like a dictator.
* Vowed to eliminate background checks and gun permits, putting our children and our families in even greater danger.
* Silenced the LGBTQ+ community with his vile “Don’t Say Gay” bill.
* Attacked corporations like Disney and organizations like the Special Olympics (yes, really) for opposing his far-right agenda.
* Suppressed the vote of communities of color through extreme gerrymandering.

And those are just _some_ of DeSantis’s authoritarian policies.

In their endorsement of my campaign, the _South Florida Sun Sentinel_ said, **“Crist is Democrats’ best hope to prevent four more years of authoritarianism from DeSantis,”** and of course, I agree.

But I know I can’t possibly do this alone. Only together can we dethrone this wannabe tinpot dictator.
**[_Folks, with only 17 days left to go before the primary election, I’m humbly asking for your support in this race. Gov. DeSantis has a massive, billionaire-funded war chest, and we know he’s ready to use it the very _second_ I win the primary and enter the general election. _](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48880207/359932039/-1696682215?amount=25&refcode=20220806_f_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzk1ZDNlMi1iMDE1LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AOExhXzuL94Kpypk51fB6a531Ke97CTslp5OwqAo6ZQ=)**

**[_Please give what you can!_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48880208/359932040/-1696682215?amount=25&refcode=20220806_f_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzk1ZDNlMi1iMDE1LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AOExhXzuL94Kpypk51fB6a531Ke97CTslp5OwqAo6ZQ=)**

clean_body: When I think of all the ways Gov. DeSantis has ruined Floridians’ lives for the sake of his political ambitions, I feel sick to my stomach ... | | | | = Folks, When I think of all the ways Gov. DeSantis has ruined Floridians’ lives for the sake of his political ambitions, I feel sick to my stomach ... ... but I also feel even more determined to defeat him in November. And with the primary election only 17 days away , I’m asking grassroots Democrats like you to do everything you can to help me win this race. = In the name of building his national profile so he can run for president in 2024, Gov. DeSantis has: Signed the most restrictive anti-choice legislation in Florida’s history , which banned almost all abortions, with zero exceptions for horrific situations like rape or incest. Suspended a democratically elected State Attorney because he refused to enforce his draconian 15-week abortion ban — just like a dictator. Vowed to eliminate background checks and gun permits, putting our children and our families in even greater danger. Silenced the LGBTQ+ community with his vile “Don’t Say Gay” bill. Attacked corporations like Disney and organizations like the Special Olympics (yes, really) for opposing his far-right agenda. Suppressed the vote of communities of color through extreme gerrymandering. And those are just some of DeSantis’s authoritarian policies. In their endorsement of my campaign, the South Florida Sun Sentinel said, “Crist is Democrats’ best hope to prevent four more years of authoritarianism from DeSantis,” and of course, I agree. But I know I can’t possibly do this alone. Only together can we dethrone this wannabe tinpot dictator. = = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = — Charlie = | Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor Charlie Crist for Governor P.O. Box 1547 St. Petersburg, FL 33731 United States

subject: Come join us tomorrow

Friend, All day tomorrow we’ll be out meeting people and we want to see you out there! We’ll be making appearances at two major Vermont events! **** From 10:30 AM to 1:30 PM, we’ll be at the Franklin County Field Days. In Highgate Vermont: 10:30 to 11:00 Brenda will spend time at the Franklin County Democrats Booth 11:00 to 12:30: Brenda will walk around for some Vermont fairtime goodies and rides. 12:30 to 1:30: Brenda will have lunch and walk around the tables to meet Field Day attendees. Come stop by to spend time with Brenda! The event will be at Franklin County Fairgrounds Airport Road, Highgate, VT 05488. We hope to see you there! **** **4 PM to 6 PM:** Join Brenda and our team at a Candidate Meet And Greet at Parker Pie in Glover, VT.
The event will be hosted by Power Of Persistence Group, and Katherine Sims For Vermont House. Join us in the Northeast Kingdom to meet candidates and enjoy food together. clean_body: | | Friend, All day tomorrow we’ll be out meeting people and we want to see you out there! We’ll be making appearances at two major Vermont events! ** From 10:30 AM to 1:30 PM, we’ll be at the Franklin County Field Days. In Highgate Vermont: 10:30 to 11:00 Brenda will spend time at the Franklin County Democrats Booth 11:00 to 12:30: Brenda will walk around for some Vermont fairtime goodies and rides. 12:30 to 1:30: Brenda will have lunch and walk around the tables to meet Field Day attendees. Come stop by to spend time with Brenda! The event will be at Franklin County Fairgrounds Airport Road, Highgate, VT 05488. We hope to see you there! 4 PM to 6 PM:** Join Brenda and our team at a Candidate Meet And Greet at Parker Pie in Glover, VT. The event will be hosted by Power Of Persistence Group, and Katherine Sims For Vermont House. Join us in the Northeast Kingdom to meet candidates and enjoy food together. Address is 161 County Rd, West Glover, VT 05875. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | Thank you for supporting our campaign! We’re really excited to meet you today and hear what you want to see from our Government. Best, Team Brenda PS: Brenda will be the featured speaker at the Primary Night Watch Party for the Vermont Democratic Party in Waterbury. She'll share her vision for a Vermont that works for all of us. Proceeds go to the Vermont Democratic Party! | | | | | | Copyright (C) 2022 Brenda for Vermont. All rights reserved.

Ted Budd knows what’s at stake: reckless spending, family values under attack, the integrity of our constitutional rights.

That’s why Ted is running for U.S. Senate in one of the most competitive races in the country.

But Ted won’t win without support from grassroots conservatives across our country. [**That’s why I’m asking if you can pitch in $24 to help Ted get elected in North Carolina.**](http://links.tedbudd.co/u/click?_t=13365b87b52649cc8d23e393a66fd89d&_m=6c09368570394d5da00fdb4d9bcf2646&_e=haluZWCAui02U6Ym2a6P-U6g3doZ-a860GwNFpq1On-AG1cTdfpfhLNAHxpEnoYUvqA8Gj2IlFwPbQXmGgmyZwR4uX326pOs-Bid2euMfv07LPnhwZa0G-oZBVoDoerFym2-5rcJi9sUJZAKWacENeaaAta19KF1vI6Pb7mO6LYyOT0JixvX_kk7zjXCTQIRrWKf6S88kxz-y2eoeosJzZaM7n-_qHuf1kb9Td_RYDxzG4flOJ92h72ppPcTQaJBBcEPevwbc-G8pNTkKF8lBRqubVFy39Tb4UFWVVyQJIMN09Z0w5Q2J4fDoRT78Jjjv4-HQBU24QxRclJUoGQ71KRV6q0IWQlQqqRTY-ByC4ZjJIW3TBX4PdU5IP_ZKTEwTyxqiCg4BbiFeOOYpApCbiHbJPbuOs6IYyAopvW9huiZTaZEy_9-ElT91LFMYoEpOgEFvhzeuntLEq9eXUfT9bSPeN-rPEa7vpb9e8mOaFRQtj01eVjde8AEBbvGVj1XJlZviqtS30-V4q1k4em-fn7sIuMdlJEggWQHEvrMHM-5pjS30lkHjG2NTpviXARN)

body:
Hear me on this:

Dear Friend,
**This is Governor Kristi Noem. I have some pressing news for you.** I just got wind that the Democratic National Committee is unleashing a tidal wave of cash to help Liberals in red states. They’re striking us in must-win GOP strongholds and I’m worried it’s having a major effect...
Republicans and Democrats are virtually TIED in the latest polls.
I’m partnering up with Republican Whip Steve Scalise because this is an emergency -- we just set up a [**rapid-response goal**](http://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=10cce67a2a6640c1bb2e6385196e5baa&_e=6L0mL5DZKQ8aVnvnlP49Yov33DaQR2KkwjrfRe6NfleCBSf-MVw9T4zk2r9DoiMZnc1_2mbvyYZSWQaAoydqMxfgno1-hmgrKJyotl-CU0oB6Cy1Ddni5BLQhdLWeo0kwjTjGAYxkJYbDR287mIefnj7NrmuiS4z9w0GZrP8S-V2zG2Juomq-YTsfzJD2JSFvpPHctmV7n1u_GHpO61PFsOvAdvFDej_EZcgsEnjiDBBlJowqJrr5r8HgQjdJrP1JxKl0QJ0OuHO2KoforjF8qXRxuIeub5i8-1SI48BK4apssbgyJQ086IQVyQEpwVVfqCFyQnM2DYbboFDQHB-Qp63s4kw3LGua8kySO-LlQpiArb871DYPeHKqq_fr_XUFtMNcO3sH4-PtDE1oZbhsV0bFwDrhyXn6tGRKc03mHr6maT9zSLS1kZjuaB9ATRz) of $150,000 before our top GOP allies are completely overwhelmed. **According to the latest intel, the DNC is mobilizing quickly to:**
* Launch anti-Trump ad campaigns across America
* Deploy Liberal field teams to battleground districts
* Train an army of door-knockers to reach new voters
* Organize high-profile fundraisers to prop-up vulnerable Democrats
* Flood the airwaves with false and misleading stories about Republicans

**[Rapid Response Goal: Add Support Now →](http://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=10cce67a2a6640c1bb2e6385196e5baa&_e=6L0mL5DZKQ8aVnvnlP49Yov33DaQR2KkwjrfRe6NfleCBSf-MVw9T4zk2r9DoiMZnc1_2mbvyYZSWQaAoydqMxfgno1-hmgrKJyotl-CU0oB6Cy1Ddni5BLQhdLWeo0kwjTjGAYxkJYbDR287mIefnj7NrmuiS4z9w0GZrP8S-V2zG2Juomq-YTsfzJD2JSFvpPHctmV7n1u_GHpO61PFsOvAdvFDej_EZcgsEnjiDBJO3OPD4b4KOjJBbHRfGYb6pVgHjgL-xAM6pbTPlQK9mnLGEhLNDPx5EzuDNdU9AT7ukZRkfnBOxfPo6yq_zBZ2N0723hff9Q6l8RuBPrgYTP0ed_uaZ5WPqilhGn80fSSA7a2vHBW5q1wP4I_UBbrpIOL8bqJXvW0uepXQ9_RcrW_Uc4jF8MICCmnDBdVg3OXXZWN0Bzd53ru-jHKWt2w)**
I’m sending this email out to a select group of our most reliable, freedom-loving American Patriots...
I have a hunch you’re not one to give up when the going gets tough -- or when a bunch of Liberals try to buy an election. **That’s why your name is at the top of the list.**
[**Do you have the courage and determination to help stop them? I think so.**](http://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=10cce67a2a6640c1bb2e6385196e5baa&_e=6L0mL5DZKQ8aVnvnlP49Yov33DaQR2KkwjrfRe6NfleCBSf-MVw9T4zk2r9DoiMZnc1_2mbvyYZSWQaAoydqMxfgno1-hmgrKJyotl-CU0oB6Cy1Ddni5BLQhdLWeo0kwjTjGAYxkJYbDR287mIefnj7NrmuiS4z9w0GZrP8S-V2zG2Juomq-YTsfzJD2JSFvpPHctmV7n1u_GHpO61PFsOvAdvFDej_EZcgsEnjiDCfOdNMw6XT9-E9ijgiqsgTd4YtFTcCQqcVzIg2AKbsyi_R-kiq9I9h7uaUur8SXX3to_QwTQqSTBmHxN-A6IBFr0jHCtUT5XbrVk7t0VZuSwrZsCBhyaTTiC09u2bPv6pFwxKFNl93SugKTvo2NCNIwFF7-Txq6vJMpB_q4bWOsb7GkwljnzagQsyjj2aOCGHVYdA9amm2_NC6AxaYewJa)

name: Senator Kennedy
subject: A message about Joe Biden.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
He’s a fool. Let’s vote him out.

| [](http://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=76651db3d6ff4a9c92f854a9cef2e35a&_e=jBWs6i1c8pgUcUYmNBueJfX5mnsFwKe02Iw7x1r5LyaHsNpttZgpFgOqM9eXtLt34E_XrwoObNzJCv6DKZukC2hBCK6KLTFC3rw8jAV8poylaWFv305JAnVVH15G5UljmjZQCEvVAfQOVZYWxEM8xVvbGSrRu1H1f4YeNzsFxTwDjXtVobDI9X99kYTFb-jh0Dmj5zRyVrIIEL3C5_TBLuUmjWARambroAE-wgWtIK1im2gFIR3TNh-VVgkwxoMew4PSRCaueB19yjordqCiTB0UUEXMvzzKmrM7q9cgFUjRUsD8wkE-H2v25mQ40nmSbgwanOdZgPvotXNJX8eOIBy4tqCbCeENoi6n89KbuvodxRXjLxwB3zjxQGjbjtJmtaFMkMLvkw-TfWRG8ECHvZ_grC_NmmYmhLXydVrbNbPs--IJ1wSF4CZobBvypq3pjQ7JIN3b0CSutejv3G9UgHxxpvHtkwz1e1fsJyO_PbGyey3GI4EsyHARFWNyYX4s38HmdbfuYpgzfSnGDY2yQjtYGYffPKgkmDHVnMewNkMME5P_iWqoP3oQQLZCtYcm)
---
**With this President in the White House, sometimes I have to laugh to keep from crying.**

clean_body: gay. | | | = Folks, = I don’t have much to say except... = = | | | = | | = = The vaguely worded law opens up queer youth to even MORE persecution, empowers bigots to sue teachers and school districts, and even FORCES school counselors to ‘out’ LGBTQ+ children to their parents. This law is disgusting and I promise, as the next Representative of Florida’s 15th District, = But right now I’m running against extreme MAGA Republicans — including two who voted for the very same “Don’t Say Gay” bill! We can’t let these anti-LGBTQ+ assaults go unanswered. = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for defending Florida’s LGBTQ+ kids! subject: Hillbilly on the street

body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/18562?t=1014&amount=25&akid=4913%2E3611125%2EGciq2B ][IMG]

You don’t have to read JD Vance’s book (cannot stress that point enough)
to hear exactly what he thinks about the working class, team.

His book boils down to the dangerous and downright false claim that the
problems working people are facing are their own fault.

We’re on the ground talking to Ohio voters about JD, and to exactly NO
ONE’S surprise, they’re not liking what they’re hearing.

We know Tim’s got a winning message and the vision Ohioans want for our
future, but we need to make sure people can hear it over all the
right-wing noise flooding the airwaves right now.

This race is so close, folks, and it will have far-reaching
consequences. Ohio WILL decide Senate control. [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/18562?t=1015&amount=25&akid=4913%2E3611125%2EGciq2B ]Can you chip in $25 to
support Tim and flip Ohio blue?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/18562?t=1016&amount=25&akid=4913%2E3611125%2EGciq2B ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/18562?t=1017&amount=50&akid=4913%2E3611125%2EGciq2B ]Donate $50

JD claims to be a champion of the working class, but his record proves the
exact opposite.

He bailed on Ohio to make millions working in Silicon Valley boardrooms.

He blames working-class families for their struggles, and even profited
off of them with his book.

He wants to give huge tax cuts to his wealthy friends while Ohio families
struggle just to stay afloat.

We need to expose JD for who he really is—an out-of-touch Silicon Valley
millionaire—and the best way to do that is through targeted ads and
building up a strong ground game.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/18562?t=1007&amount=25&akid=4913%2E3611125%2EGciq2B ]We need to increase our ad spending in order to do that,
team. Can we count on you to pitch in $25 right now to expose

name: Will Rollins
subject: I’m still getting used to this.
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48881365/359937065/-707005773?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjdmMTU5YS1iNDE1LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WR8FhgwhtQyiIvF436szpbUtC1kClA1SCpinFGsdU-c=)
Peter,

As a federal prosecutor, my job was to help take down the bad guys.

I prosecuted white-collar criminals who defrauded seniors. I put away shady doctors who illegally sold opiates. I also helped shut down a smuggling operation that sent American-made microchips to China.

Truth be told, I loved my old job, and I’m still getting used to calling up supporters for endorsements and contributions. Because when I introduce myself as a former federal prosecutor, the question I typically get in response is:

**_“Am I in trouble?”_**

My answer is always the same:

**_“No, but we’re all in trouble if we don’t flip this seat and Ken Calvert goes back to Washington. Can you send in a donation today?”_**

Jokes aside, I’m running for Congress because I’ve seen the threats to our country change as America has become more divided due to hyper-partisanship and misinformation. It’s time we start agreeing on the basic facts again, but it will take thoughtful legislation to tackle this problem at its roots.

**[My race is shaping up to be one of the most competitive House races in the country. Now that we’re in the General Election, it’s critical to stay on track with our fundraising goals to fund our voter contact efforts. If you have the means -- please chip in a donation of $3 today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48881366/359937066/192312732?refcode=em-8.6.22-nopnrs-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjdmMTU5YS1iNDE1LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WR8FhgwhtQyiIvF436szpbUtC1kClA1SCpinFGsdU-c=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | ****[Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48881367/359937067/192312732?refcode=em-8.6.22-nopnrs-b&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjdmMTU5YS1iNDE1LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WR8FhgwhtQyiIvF436szpbUtC1kClA1SCpinFGsdU-c=)****

I’m under no illusion that change will be easy, but I do know that it’s much more likely when we all work together.

And if our shared contribution to change is replacing an extremist like Ken Calvert with someone who is willing to actually move our country forward -- I’d chalk that up as a *huge* win for our community and America.

So thanks in advance for your support.

Will Rollins

clean_body: | = Peter, As a federal prosecutor, my job was to help take down the bad guys. I prosecuted white-collar criminals who defrauded seniors. I put away shady doctors who illegally sold opiates. I also helped shut down a smuggling operation that sent American-made microchips to China. Truth be told, I loved my old job, and I’m still getting used to calling up supporters for endorsements and contributions. Because when I introduce myself as a former federal prosecutor, the question I typically get in response is: “Am I in trouble?” My answer is always the same: “No, but we’re all in trouble if we don’t flip this seat and Ken Calvert goes back to Washington. Can you send in a donation today?” Jokes aside, I’m running for Congress because I’ve seen the threats to our country change as America has become more divided due to hyper-partisanship and misinformation. It’s time we start agreeing on the basic facts again, but it will take thoughtful legislation to tackle this problem at its roots. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | **= | = | | = | = | | = | = !-- This is the "ghost" td close/open tags for Outlook. --> I’m under no illusion that change will be easy, but I do know that it’s much more likely when we all work together. And if our shared contribution to change is replacing an extremist like Ken Calvert with someone who is willing to actually move our country forward -- I’d chalk that up as a huge win for our community and America. So thanks in advance for your support. Will Rollins =** | = Democrat Will Rollins is a former national security and counter-terrorism prosecutor running for Congress in California's 41st Congressional District. Consider supporting Will's campaign by = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . name: John Fetterman
subject: Dr. Oz: “We need to end abortion NOW”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
I mean, just look at the sh*t he actually says
#
Derek,
My opponent Dr. Oz wants to take away a woman’s right to make choices about her body, family + future.👇
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220806-1?refcode=em20220806-6766&refcode2=6766_434096_vZq4zB&akid=6766%2E434096%2EvZq4zB)
**We cannot let someone with such dangerous views even get close to the U.S. Senate.**
Especially when Mitch McConnell + the Republicans want to pass a national abortion ban.
**[_Derek, help me beat Dr. Oz and I’ll go to Washington as the 51st Democratic vote to codify _Roe_ into law. Make a donation of any amount today so we can win this race, flip this seat, and protect the right to an abortion. _](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220806-1?refcode=em20220806-6766&refcode2=6766_434096_vZq4zB&akid=6766%2E434096%2EvZq4zB)**
**[Contribute »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220806-1?refcode=em20220806-6766&refcode2=6766_434096_vZq4zB&akid=6766%2E434096%2EvZq4zB)**
__
I really do mean it when I say he’s an extremist, Derek.
**Dr. Oz called**** _Roe v. Wade_****“wrong” + supports an extreme ban on abortions with no exceptions for rape or incest.**
If he buys his way into the U.S. Senate, he’d be a vote for a full-on national abortion ban.
My message to Dr. Oz and the Republicans is simple: **Don’t f*ck with a woman’s reproductive freedom.** It’s a sacred right, and we won’t let these extreme attacks stand.
**[_But I need you with me. Help me defeat Dr. Oz + his virtually unlimited ca$h by chipping in whatever you can, and send me to the Senate as Democrats’ 51st vote to codify _Roe_ into law. _](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220806-1?refcode=em20220806-6766&refcode2=6766_434096_vZq4zB&akid=6766%2E434096%2EvZq4zB)**
We won’t let Dr. Oz spend his way into the U.S. Senate, and we won’t let Republicans strip women of the right to choose. We’ve got to do whatever it takes to win.
Thanks for being in this fight,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220806-6766-footer&t=1&refcode2=6766_434096_vZq4zB&akid=6766%2E434096%2EvZq4zB)**

body:
Become a Senior Democratic Strategist today!
| | | [ ](https://go.dscc.org/go/8682?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220806-Christie-ActiveDemsGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220806-Christie-ActiveDemsGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=5621%2E9716520%2EgmDJdL)

Hi there -- When I looked through our past survey responses, I was very impressed with your level of enthusiasm. In fact, you were **more active than 92 percent of Democrats in our database!**

As one of our **_most active supporters_** , you're who we NEED to hear from to lock in our strategy to defend President Biden's Democratic Senate majority.

[**That’s why I’m proud to offer you my personal invitation to become a Senior Democratic Strategist and join an _exclusive_ focus group. Click here to start >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/8682?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220806-Christie-ActiveDemsGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220806-Christie-ActiveDemsGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=5621%2E9716520%2EgmDJdL)

name: Herschel Walker
subject: UPDATE: Our latest TV ad
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I can take the cheap shots from our opponent and his liberal Super PACs, but I need YOU in my corner. |
---
Fellow American,

**I'm emailing you today because I released my latest campaign ad that speaks to the terrible job Raphael Warnock is doing as a U.S. Senator. The problem that we're having is this:_we cannot afford to air it everywhere we need it._ **

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=40acc112701a4f0281f1a7d1c22321b8&_e=Kz0B_3TRrxDEJoIni_ieRqcSgsahxGmChOo4Q_TMaIwplFvshSb3I6tZ1Mg69eH5Y2Tpb_J80CvL4A7pFGVeYbxDGvUHp3Ta2yBW2jSwP3TUByTRNUT7nmM69Juhm0uVxQG2iX2JNWVcUCdH86YZXU_THolE_e227UMerT7_pF4YuqhDGuxu5qu1kWdHAU-3PvgDcFvtdynruSQFYC8_M-VW6Iy2CKtDPDHQrV-F9d2_5AzFFJ_VtZxsU0YaAPdJ-J9uGz4WPtBhZ-pqpRDj4PaU3fb9HqstNY6_zqbc5r2V1C-xbuZrPJxPpaChJ_T-lzHv8JyMp4U8JoGrlhKBbR9jUcQJT1YZ2e2JFajsecy4eTdxinWqHea0m7ObxcDBoxH0kCUOfzMTAMTS-HeLsGUSdPg35NYjb-PrIgT-rwFigdFCb1o9R--egHcWsB8HLouMEFEDP-IIYXjPqRjyIavYCmXGFj87A-0fB9_51VE%3D)
**[Fellow American, please watch our ad and be one of the 96 conservatives we need to chip in before the end of today to help us expand where this ad is running.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=40acc112701a4f0281f1a7d1c22321b8&_e=Kz0B_3TRrxDEJoIni_ieRqcSgsahxGmChOo4Q_TMaIwplFvshSb3I6tZ1Mg69eH5Y2Tpb_J80CvL4A7pFGVeYbxDGvUHp3Ta2yBW2jSwP3TUByTRNUT7nmM69Juhm0uVxQG2iX2JNWVcUCdH86YZXU_THolE_e227UMerT7_pF4YuqhDGuxu5qu1kWdHAU-3PvgDcFvtdynruSQFYC8_M-VW6Iy2CKtDPDHQrV-F9d2_5AzFFJ_VtZxsU0YaAPdJ-J9uGz4WPtBhZ-pqpRDj4GyjI2dstCnUcLLQtWANkvAMtkfFNMzlgixcbvP4ibe9Z7l9NFz7hNFpPGo4VU3f0_DIVydv13sbaWGwOCbJIl5xIDzEZ9AEV36iIJyrHAQhba5-EWMHtwVBTczCfas6StdxmjcnmHd_ePWemyUaTPyOhgbmbB5DBOLXQQKviTlwlUR-9oNxguw6MO9T2lu066TdaYqtjZXqWTLW4G_PuY4%3D)**

Our opponent - _who has received nearly 90% of his campaign cash from Democrats outside Georgia_ - is being rewarded by far-left donors around the country for voting with Joe Biden 96% of the time.

He doesn't want Georgians to know that, though. He wants voters to believe he is a moderate senator who votes with Georgia.

**He's not, and his voting record proves it.[The more people know about our opponent and his record, the less inclined they are to vote for him.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=40acc112701a4f0281f1a7d1c22321b8&_e=Kz0B_3TRrxDEJoIni_ieRqcSgsahxGmChOo4Q_TMaIwplFvshSb3I6tZ1Mg69eH5Y2Tpb_J80CvL4A7pFGVeYbxDGvUHp3Ta2yBW2jSwP3TUByTRNUT7nmM69Juhm0uVxQG2iX2JNWVcUCdH86YZXU_THolE_e227UMerT7_pF4YuqhDGuxu5qu1kWdHAU-3PvgDcFvtdynruSQFYC8_M-VW6Iy2CKtDPDHQrV-F9d2_5AzFFJ_VtZxsU0YaAPdJ-J9uGz4WPtBhZ-pqpRDj4FMCPi9Ip6GEjz-pOyDUGk28WRq7d6-S3wK64sA5vKH5FNSPTu-GMCgM-jRUz2moCDh_WcdNs3Agwc9COZe7vesFJb-bII-wl_9wDbUmoaYAwdxq19aXCravUAaRbCWH7UB4HDngLKIJnM1qT9cVZUMJcWD8FW5GpI4Sod0PsJnGyXckb1gqUPE7f5Jn6KQA95lwooTasK9DU8CwP0bqm9E%3D)**

_I've had $25 million in false attack ads run against me so far in this election. Senator Warnock and his allies have lied about me, my business, and my work with veterans._

Look, I can take the cheap shots the Democrats are throwing at me. I'm used to hard hits. Their attacks are merely an effort to distract from Senator Warnock's horrible record and not talk about critical issues like the high cost of food, skyrocketing gas prices, an open border, and crime waves rippling through our neighborhoods.

**[I really could use your help right now, Fellow American, to ensure everyone sees our new ad.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=40acc112701a4f0281f1a7d1c22321b8&_e=Kz0B_3TRrxDEJoIni_ieRqcSgsahxGmChOo4Q_TMaIwplFvshSb3I6tZ1Mg69eH5Y2Tpb_J80CvL4A7pFGVeYbxDGvUHp3Ta2yBW2jSwP3TUByTRNUT7nmM69Juhm0uVxQG2iX2JNWVcUCdH86YZXU_THolE_e227UMerT7_pF4YuqhDGuxu5qu1kWdHAU-3PvgDcFvtdynruSQFYC8_M-VW6Iy2CKtDPDHQrV-F9d2_5AzFFJ_VtZxsU0YaAPdJ-J9uGz4WPtBhZ-pqpRDj4LUAzBNLiEllSR1a2Nc9sODwlyrrbsarpnfdh6zkEzuXG1g-smomwUodDEMwknAevcWSQkEN-Wfrpg87XH8QCyFFLYjnqIbsFtAZ9Hw4yIbiqQ8E2um2tLXP3p0CqRcgExsey97kcj-GpVj79oIyyesfVse1IFezvz3QmV6MH6PXw25rp83AmRjaYFWr7Se-b9o7jSnCTQLijfHTz5Qc5tU%3D)** This race is neck and neck. Voters have a tough decision to make, and they need to know the facts.

Thank you,

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=40acc112701a4f0281f1a7d1c22321b8&_e=Kz0B_3TRrxDEJoIni_ieRqcSgsahxGmChOo4Q_TMaIwplFvshSb3I6tZ1Mg69eH5Y2Tpb_J80CvL4A7pFGVeYbxDGvUHp3Ta2yBW2jSwP3TUByTRNUT7nmM69Juhm0uVxQG2iX2JNWVcUCdH86YZXU_THolE_e227UMerT7_pF4YuqhDGuxu5qu1kWdHAU-3PvgDcFvtdynruSQFYC8_M-VW6Iy2CKtDPDHQrV-F9d2_5AzFFJ_VtZxsU0YaAPdJ-J9uGz4WPtBhZ-pqpRDj4N_OLRG3VThFogSb-yVI81jSEVWBYiBz5s7QjqBg3a_2haPWqPUHherVaEKrL9jtt9qI6oXZ3dBMPY7G0eaYXctIqwpDiaUHSdGdvbpTcrCh0rhl69IyzP_p8XFx4qoWG5O2onGGLFbHVmv9ZjrrF7_oScbgNcX2cpkFP1SBTPzvsuGjJAH3wHyxQC4nJ0R7_cdev3YkMJjA6vA6LmfPeI8%3D)

clean_body: I can take the cheap shots from our opponent and his liberal Super PACs, but I need YOU in my corner. | Fellow American, I'm emailing you today because I released my latest campaign ad that speaks to the terrible job Raphael Warnock is doing as a U.S. Senator. The problem that we're having is this:we cannot afford to air it everywhere we need it. Our opponent - who has received nearly 90% of his campaign cash from Democrats outside Georgia - is being rewarded by far-left donors around the country for voting with Joe Biden 96% of the time. He doesn't want Georgians to know that, though. He wants voters to believe he is a moderate senator who votes with Georgia. He's not, and his voting record proves it. I've had $25 million in false attack ads run against me so far in this election. Senator Warnock and his allies have lied about me, my business, and my work with veterans. Look, I can take the cheap shots the Democrats are throwing at me. I'm used to hard hits. Their attacks are merely an effort to distract from Senator Warnock's horrible record and not talk about critical issues like the high cost of food, skyrocketing gas prices, an open border, and crime waves rippling through our neighborhoods. This race is neck and neck. Voters have a tough decision to make, and they need to know the facts. Thank you, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

subject: Get your yard sign today >>

|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48862929/359891435/-1752180686?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDRlY2Q1Yy05NDE1LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GlU8t5enylElBe-KJy1iigAQ4uAGXicQ9sRd3AauidQ=)
I have an exciting update, Peter. The team here at HQ is in the process of getting our yard signs up across Rockford, Quad Cities, and Peoria! If you live in the district and would like a sign of your own, **[please sign up to receive one here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48862930/359891436/536865776?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDRlY2Q1Yy05NDE1LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GlU8t5enylElBe-KJy1iigAQ4uAGXicQ9sRd3AauidQ=&emci=0ed87652-9415-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=404ecd5c-9415-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=18052858)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48862931/359891437/536865776?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDRlY2Q1Yy05NDE1LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GlU8t5enylElBe-KJy1iigAQ4uAGXicQ9sRd3AauidQ=&emci=0ed87652-9415-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=404ecd5c-9415-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=18052858)
_They're finally here!_ Call me old-fashioned, but in a district as large as ours, I think yard signs are a _great_ way to increase our visibility and name ID. And the more of these signs voters see go up, the **stronger** our grassroots campaign will be viewed across this district. That's important for our momentum! This race is officially ***the most*** competitive race in the effort to keep the House blue. The good news is that voters know the GOP will be a disaster for our community. Now, they need to know there's a strong Democrat running to stop them. _That’s what these signs help us accomplish._ [**We’re hoping to get even more signs up on lawns and on busy intersections across this district, but these don't come cheap! Will you chip in to help us cover the cost of one ($5), two ($10), or five ($25) yard signs today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48862932/359891438/-295409223?refcode=em-8.6.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDRlY2Q1Yy05NDE1LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GlU8t5enylElBe-KJy1iigAQ4uAGXicQ9sRd3AauidQ=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48862933/359891439/-295409223?refcode=em-8.6.22-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDRlY2Q1Yy05NDE1LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GlU8t5enylElBe-KJy1iigAQ4uAGXicQ9sRd3AauidQ=)

subject: I’m sorry, but this can’t wait
body:
| | | [](https://links.standforamericanow.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=f21e867a722c44f98a0c5f53517234d6&_e=F8N5-IGE0oxhsegokUHy8jRS6rY4WBOE0PrkUNW6RjXQqV6sG8CLHOHEfuiiylMmpR_HVw84uAYKBXao8XJgBfPR4boYfgZt86XhN4ieVrkmyNskU2-cU9NE9uiqUdYe2WwBvWEai2Ot3iMoEPqyzlJAE2XI7P8oHhI0QavtdIA6vYnkJFpFESxjysaF6gnK3nH4MFDPDjP8G2J02YU9PEj_v0PYNP84mu9o6SJrMHDUDQiF8KQWVouQSf0QqWlPTWbhl_-duLw-61hwqS27rSHx8g242pvRwyQdseItN0EHRL8ACFAs97SnQOEgbQncY0tISB9doFYSrjMsOaNqqDBtEsfbRm4AfszqJX8XXbqTEkd0Z0k-ZckvuV9r53HzgpAoSS9v-HxZo5ipcapYYTOhLSb-S3dx9Y5sye1u2y-ymlWWgogX8wSFrnGu0Jd2)
---
Fellow conservative,
---
My election for governor is **in 3 DAYS,** and I’m behind on the most critical fundraising goal I’ve ever had. Wisconsin is a bellwether for the rest of the nation — and elections here can be costly when the stakes are this high. I know the value of a dollar — between paying for your groceries and filling up your gas tank, I know money is tight. With such a tight race, any amount donated today can make a difference. _But my opponent’s billionaire buddies will spare no expense to keep my opponent in office. They’ve seen what I can do, and they know if I am elected governor, I’ll stop at nothing to support Wisconsin families and fight Joe Biden’s failed policies._ [**That’s why I’m coming to you with an important question: will you rush to donate whatever you can spare to help me bring home a win?**](https://links.standforamericanow.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=f21e867a722c44f98a0c5f53517234d6&_e=F8N5-IGE0oxhsegokUHy8jRS6rY4WBOE0PrkUNW6RjXQqV6sG8CLHOHEfuiiylMmpR_HVw84uAYKBXao8XJgBfPR4boYfgZt86XhN4ieVrkmyNskU2-cU9NE9uiqUdYe2WwBvWEai2Ot3iMoEPqyzlJAE2XI7P8oHhI0QavtdIA6vYnkJFpFESxjysaF6gnK3nH4MFDPDjP8G2J02YU9PEj_v0PYNP84mu9o6SJrMHAVIY6kT5lt_-KAG0CL8HBk0lzFfF7kWmwymCTcdq6wKQILtnVeUXOKKGNbJTNbJE0W4VXvnhFoWAUMjdVjyyc4U0mWbhZVnUsEM7MIrzl9btekqrhdWXGTxmgCty-F6SqpzOZgS_3qMtqNMQ5XtqQtosZm9fMwURJTyHgrHXbcIUboNQtOFcv5Uy7SjC4cTPlRqJYl7MMTACCcK4Pv3Kdn)

name: Our Revolution
subject: NEWS: Dems’ Senate deal, Kansas win, electing progressives!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Insider News from the Political Revolution!

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

HEADLINES: Wins - Kansas, Rashida Tlaib, Cori Bush, Pramila Jayapal |
Senate Deal Concerns | MN Vote Tues - Ilhan Omar, Keith Ellison | VT Vote
Tues - Balint, Zuckerman, Welch | Bust Big Tech | Unions for M4A |& MORE!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6228?t=1011&akid=3235%2E5885482%2ERxqyo8 ][IMG]

California’s 500,000 fast food workers are on the verge of a historic
victory, but they need our solidarity!

Join us Wednesday, Aug. 10 at 7:30 ET/4:30 PT for our live organizing call
with Our Revolution, US Rep. Ro Khanna, and worker activists to win AB 257
- the FAST Recovery Act - to give workers a seat at the table!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6204?t=1012&akid=3235%2E5885482%2ERxqyo8 ]RSVP

★ ★ ★

[ http://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6187?t=1013&akid=3235%2E5885482%2ERxqyo8 ]Become a recurring monthly donor to Our Revolution to maximize our
collective impact in Washington. We’re shifting the window of what’s
possible.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6228?t=1014&akid=3235%2E5885482%2ERxqyo8 ][IMG]

Less than 100 days from the midterms, Dems need to deliver. On Tuesday,
voters in Kansas rose up to defend abortion rights and now it seems a
compromise deal has been struck with rightwing Sens. Manchin and Sinema.

“Everyone is looking at this reconciliation bill, and it’s something, but
it’s late and it’s little,” Our Revolution Political Director Aaron
Chappell told [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6229?t=1015&akid=3235%2E5885482%2ERxqyo8 ]Politico. “Is it enough to deal with widespread
frustrations with the president, especially with the progressive base?
We’ll have to see.”

The Inflation Reduction Act is a real mixed bag - investments in clean
energy but more drilling on federal lands, drug price cuts but only a
handful in 2026, stock buyback limits while saving tax loopholes, etc.

Our Revolution is part of a Climate Justice Coalition of 350 groups
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6230?t=1016&akid=3235%2E5885482%2ERxqyo8 ]urging Biden and Schumer to deny Manchin’s huge giveaway to Big Oil —
toxic drilling provisions written by the American Petroleum Institute,
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6231?t=1017&akid=3235%2E5885482%2ERxqyo8 ]Common Dreams reports.

Bernie also laid out the good, the bad, and the ugly of the deal in a
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6232?t=1018&akid=3235%2E5885482%2ERxqyo8 ]senate speech this week — waging the fight for measures on childcare,
homelessness, student debt. He’ll introduce [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6233?t=1019&akid=3235%2E5885482%2ERxqyo8 ]amendments to let Medicare
negotiate drug prices like the VA and eliminate new fossil fuel subsidies.

[ http://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6187?t=1020&akid=3235%2E5885482%2ERxqyo8 ]The only reason the battle for any budget deal is still alive is
because of massive activism and pressure from our progressive movement -
thank you for keeping up the fight for Democrats to Deliver.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6228?t=1021&akid=3235%2E5885482%2ERxqyo8 ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6228?t=1022&akid=3235%2E5885482%2ERxqyo8 ][IMG]

US Rep. Rashida Tlaib overcame Big Money to claim victory Tuesday evening,
heading into another term in Congress, representing the people of
Michigan’s 12th District.

Rashida is a bold leader and a champion for progressive legislation in the
US House. We need more elected allies like her willing to speak out in the
fight for justice and equity.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6228?t=1023&akid=3235%2E5885482%2ERxqyo8 ][IMG]

Sadly, US Rep. Andy Levin - a lifelong advocate of working people and
labor organizer - put up a good fight on Tuesday, but couldn’t outmatch
the $11 million from rightwing billionaires and AIPAC.

We won’t take this sitting down, and this isn’t the last we’ll see of
Andy. He isn’t capable of giving up the fight — and neither are we.

Also this week, Our Revolution Michigan notched wins with State Sen. Erika
Geiss, a proud “economic justice warrior” in SD-1, and State Rep. Abraham
Aiyash, a proud “lover of environmental justice” in HD-9.

[ http://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6187?t=1024&akid=3235%2E5885482%2ERxqyo8 ]Join our inside-outside work with elected allies like Rashida, Erika
and Abraham in the fight for living wages, climate action, immigrant
rights, Medicare for All and so much more.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6228?t=1025&akid=3235%2E5885482%2ERxqyo8 ][IMG]

US Rep. Pramila Jayapal dominated in her primary in Washington’s 7th
District on Tuesday - pulling in over 80-percent of the vote!

Rep. Jayapal is on to the general election and will likely keep her seat
in the US House, where she serves as Chair of the Congressional
Progressive Caucus. “Our Revolution candidates aren’t just progressive,
they’re organizers — we need more organizing on the inside,” she said on
our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1026&akid=3235%2E5885482%2ERxqyo8 ]National Organizing Call.

[ http://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6187?t=1027&akid=3235%2E5885482%2ERxqyo8 ]Become a recurring donor to fund our mission of building progressive
power in Congress. The more of us there are, the more we can accomplish
together.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6228?t=1028&akid=3235%2E5885482%2ERxqyo8 ][IMG]

Tuesday was a big win in Missouri with progressive champion Cori Bush
(MO-1) winning her primary and heading to the November ballot for what
should be an easy re-election!

In 2020, Our Revolution members and volunteers worked to help Cori defeat
10-term corporate incumbent Lacy Clay. Now, Rep. Bush will head into her
second term as a bold progressive ally in Congress.

“We build power by getting more of us in there who are willing to put our
minds, our bodies and our reputations on the line to deliver equity and
justice for our communities,” Cori told us on our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6234?t=1029&akid=3235%2E5885482%2ERxqyo8 ]National Organizing
Call.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6228?t=1030&akid=3235%2E5885482%2ERxqyo8 ][IMG]

Election Day is this Tuesday in Minnesota, where progressive champions US
Rep. Ilhan Omar and Our Revolution board member and Attorney General Keith
Ellison are on the ballot!

Leading national voices for the progressive movement, Ilhan is the whip of
the progressive caucus and Keith successfully prosecuted Derek Chauvin for
the murder of George Floyd.

If you’re in Minnesota, find your polling place [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/489?t=1031&akid=3235%2E5885482%2ERxqyo8 ]HERE!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6228?t=1032&akid=3235%2E5885482%2ERxqyo8 ][IMG]

All of Our Revolution’s candidates are also endorsed by Bernie in
Tuesday’s primary in Vermont - Peter Welch for US Senate, Becca Balint for
Congress, and David Zuckerman for Lt. Governor!

“At a time when so many of our people are hurting, we need leaders with
experience who will help lead the fight for economic, racial, social, and
environmental justice,” Bernie said. In Congress, Peter Welch is a
cosponsor of the Green New Deal and he’s led on lowering drug prices,
childcare, rural broadband, and protecting our imperiled democracy.

As VT Senate Majority Leader, Becca Balint passed the first gun safety
laws in state history, invested in affordable housing, and passed the
strongest reproductive rights in the nation.

David Zuckerman is an organic regenerative farmer, father, and small
business owner living in Hinesburg, who has long served as a progressive,
independent voice in the VT House and Senate and as Lt. Governor.

If you’re in Vermont - or know someone who is - find polling locations
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6235?t=1033&akid=3235%2E5885482%2ERxqyo8 ]HERE!

★ ★ ★

MD RESULTS STILL TRICKLING IN!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6228?t=1034&akid=3235%2E5885482%2ERxqyo8 ][IMG]

Our Revolution Maryland is celebrating Kristin Mink’s victory in the
Montgomery Co. primary and Prince George’s County’s pivot left.

Our members and allies worked to elect Eric Olsen and Wala Blegay to
Prince George’s Council, creating the first progressive council majority.
The Washington Post reports the council will favor residents and tenants
rather than developers and landlords for the first time in many years.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6228?t=1035&akid=3235%2E5885482%2ERxqyo8 ][IMG]

The contest for Montgomery Co. Executive remains a dead heat. Progressive
incumbent Marc Elrich now leads Big Pharma CEO David Blair by 154 votes as
of Friday with thousands still to be tallied. Election officials estimate
all ballots may not be counted before August 12th. A recount will very
likely follow.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6236?t=1036&akid=3235%2E5885482%2ERxqyo8 ]Become a recurring donor TODAY to help us take down the worst
corporate Dems and give voters the most electable AND progressive
candidates in November!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6228?t=1037&akid=3235%2E5885482%2ERxqyo8 ][IMG]

This 2022 primary season, Our Revolution Phonebank Force has made more
than 500,000 calls o voters across the country. Right now, we have shifts
for incredible candidates for Congress like Brittany Ramos-DeBarros
(NY-11), David Segal (RI-2), Melanie D’Arrigo (NY-3), and many others!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4329?t=1038&akid=3235%2E5885482%2ERxqyo8 ]COMMIT TO A CALL SHIFT

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6228?t=1039&akid=3235%2E5885482%2ERxqyo8 ][IMG]

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6228?t=1040&akid=3235%2E5885482%2ERxqyo8 ][IMG]

CALLING OUT CHUCK SCHUMER

BRING ANTITRUST BILLS TO A VOTE!

Our Revolution activists have been bird-dogging Senate Majority Leader
Chuck Schumer on two antitrust bills - which can PASS - and now he’s
agreed to bring them for a Senate vote in September.

The American Innovation and Choice Online Act and the Open App Markets Act
would enable fairer competition on platforms, and ban self-dealing.

Our members and activists have also driven 1300 calls to senators, urging
them to back bills to Bust Big Tech’s monopoly power.

Here’s your last chance to [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6237?t=1041&akid=3235%2E5885482%2ERxqyo8 ]CALL YOUR SENATORS before they go on August
recess to get them to stand up Google, Amazon, Facebook and other
mega-corporations damaging our democracy!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6228?t=1042&akid=3235%2E5885482%2ERxqyo8 ][IMG]

Our Revolution New Jersey is coordinating with 11 unions and labor
organizations in New Jersey are calling on Rep. Andy Kim (NJ-3) to
co-sponsor Medicare for All in Congress.

This is a coalition of low-income workers, immigrant workers, and union
workers from locals CWA, Teamsters, UAWA, and others - as well as
organizations like New Labor, [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6238?t=1043&akid=3235%2E5885482%2ERxqyo8 ]Insider NJ reports.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6239?t=1044&akid=3235%2E5885482%2ERxqyo8 ]Labor for Single Payer believes it’s time to take healthcare off the
bargaining table

Through rallies, op-eds, sign-on letters, legislative visits, and more,
our members and allies are keeping up the pressure on Rep. Kim to do the
right thing.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6228?t=1045&akid=3235%2E5885482%2ERxqyo8 ][IMG]

Our Revolution Massachusetts followed up its April Alternatives to
Policing Forum with the Alternative Emergency Response Teams Forum last
Sunday on how unarmed caregivers can generate better outcomes than police.

Earl Miller from Cambridge HEART (Holistic Emergency Alternative Response
Team said Amherst’s Community Responders will take “everything from noise
complaints to non-violent disputes and working with homeless and mentally
challenged folks.”

Barbara Ortiz said HEART prioritizes helping people “right there when they
need it without the barriers of language or filling out papers or online
applications.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6240?t=1046&akid=3235%2E5885482%2ERxqyo8 ]WATCH HERE

Also last week, Our Revolution NJ joined 25 NJ groups in a statement of
collective opposition to a plan by rightwing Democrat US Rep. Josh
Gottheimer to send even more funding to police departments.

Data shows police are already funded at historically unprecedented levels,
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6241?t=1047&akid=3235%2E5885482%2ERxqyo8 ]Insider NJ reports, and our members are standing with the ACLU, NAACP,
faith organizations, and a diverse coalition to demand better alternatives
in NJ.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6228?t=1048&akid=3235%2E5885482%2ERxqyo8 ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6228?t=1049&akid=3235%2E5885482%2ERxqyo8 ][IMG]

Congratulations to Our Revolution Ohio member Susan Haas for winning her
election to the Democratic State Central Committee in District 20. This is
how we make an impact on the direction of the Party in Ohio.

All told, Our Revolution Ohio ran nearly 400 progressives for Central
Committee positions across the state’s 58 counties, outmaneuvered the
Party Machine, and WON!

[ http://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6187?t=1050&akid=3235%2E5885482%2ERxqyo8 ]Become a member of Our Revolution today to help transform the party
and change who has power in politics!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6228?t=1051&akid=3235%2E5885482%2ERxqyo8 ][IMG]

As you know, Bernie founded Our Revolution six years ago to wage the fight
for our progressive policy solutions and elect allies who will work with
our activists on the outside.

Our Revolution is the largest progressive grassroots-funded organization
in the country — [ http://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6187?t=1052&akid=3235%2E5885482%2ERxqyo8 ]but we need to double our coalition and max out our
power to beat back the big money dominating American politics. Become a
sustaining member TODAY.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6228?t=1053&akid=3235%2E5885482%2ERxqyo8 ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6228?t=1054&akid=3235%2E5885482%2ERxqyo8 ][IMG]

WORKPLACE DEMOCRACY IN CALIFORNIA

We need YOU to stand up with fast-food workers, Our Revolution, SEIU, and
Fight for $15 and a Union to demand the California State Senate pass
AB-257 - The FAST Recovery Act. This bill would give these essential
workers a say in setting health, safety, and employment standards while
holding major food chains accountable.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/sign/petition-support-fast-recovery-act?t=1055&akid=3235%2E5885482%2ERxqyo8 ]TAKE ACTION - add your voice in solidarity with worker activists -
tell your state senator to pass AB 257 for more democracy in the
workplace.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6228?t=1056&akid=3235%2E5885482%2ERxqyo8 ][IMG]

Our Revolution is making calls to David Segal to Congress (RI-2) — He will
be a key ally in the fight to rein in corporate power and corruption. Join
us to make an impact on one of the most critical primaries of 2022.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5385?t=1057&akid=3235%2E5885482%2ERxqyo8 ]VOLUNTEER HERE!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6228?t=1058&akid=3235%2E5885482%2ERxqyo8 ][IMG]

Melanie D’Arrigo is an incredible advocate for Medicare for All, the Green
New Deal, and our popular progressive agenda – let’s beat out the
establishment and send her to Congress! Help us reach voters directly in
NY-3.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6134?t=1059&akid=3235%2E5885482%2ERxqyo8 ]MAKE CALLS FOR MELANIE

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6228?t=1060&akid=3235%2E5885482%2ERxqyo8 ][IMG]

Sign up to help elect Our Revolution member and endorsed candidate
Brittany Ramos DeBarros to Congress in NY-11. We’ll be calling thousands
of Our Revolution supporters in this Staten Island-based Congressional
District.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5564?t=1061&akid=3235%2E5885482%2ERxqyo8 ]RSVP HERE

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6228?t=1062&akid=3235%2E5885482%2ERxqyo8 ][IMG]

We’ll also be calling voters for Megan Green, a 2016 Bernie delegate we
helped elect to the St. Louis Board of Alderman last election cycle. Now,
Our Revolution is standing with her in her run for Board President.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6242?t=1063&akid=3235%2E5885482%2ERxqyo8 ]CALL FOR MEGAN IN ST. LOUIS

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6228?t=1064&akid=3235%2E5885482%2ERxqyo8 ][IMG]

Become a sustaining member of Our Revolution for just $5 a month and get
your own official Membership Card. For $10, get our collectible sticker
6-pack — $15, get the stickers and a poster — $27, get both PLUS a tote
bag — and at the $50 level, get it all and a T-shirt.
[ http://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6187?t=1065&akid=3235%2E5885482%2ERxqyo8 ]BECOME A MOVEMENT BUILDER

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6242?t=1066&akid=3235%2E5885482%2ERxqyo8 ]★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6242?t=1067&akid=3235%2E5885482%2ERxqyo8 ][IMG]

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6242?t=1068&akid=3235%2E5885482%2ERxqyo8 ]★ ★ ★

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=3235%2E5885482%2ERxqyo8 ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=3235%2E5885482%2ERxqyo8 ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=3235%2E5885482%2ERxqyo8 ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=3235%2E5885482%2ERxqyo8 ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=3235%2E5885482%2ERxqyo8 ]Website |

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America. Last year alone, we elected 74% of our 450 endorsed
progressive candidates by mobilizing on the ground AND in the halls of
power.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5924?c0=OR_EM_NEWS_90DO_20220805_1_1.5mUrmh&t=1008&akid=3235%2E5885482%2ERxqyo8 ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to a 2022 Movement Builder recurring
donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5925?c0=OR_EM_NEWS_90DO_20220805_1_1.O4WA1L&t=1009&akid=3235%2E5885482%2ERxqyo8 ]GIVE MONTHLY
