We’re shifting the window of what’s possible. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Less than 100 days from the midterms, Dems need to deliver. On Tuesday, voters in Kansas rose up to defend abortion rights and now it seems a compromise deal has been struck with rightwing Sens. Manchin and Sinema. “Everyone is looking at this reconciliation bill, and it’s something, but it’s late and it’s little,” Our Revolution Political Director Aaron Chappell told [ ]Politico. “Is it enough to deal with widespread frustrations with the president, especially with the progressive base? We’ll have to see.” The Inflation Reduction Act is a real mixed bag - investments in clean energy but more drilling on federal lands, drug price cuts but only a handful in 2026, stock buyback limits while saving tax loopholes, etc. Our Revolution is part of a Climate Justice Coalition of 350 groups [ ]urging Biden and Schumer to deny Manchin’s huge giveaway to Big Oil — toxic drilling provisions written by the American Petroleum Institute, [ ]Common Dreams reports. Bernie also laid out the good, the bad, and the ugly of the deal in a [ ]senate speech this week — waging the fight for measures on childcare, homelessness, student debt. He’ll introduce [ ]amendments to let Medicare negotiate drug prices like the VA and eliminate new fossil fuel subsidies. [ ]The only reason the battle for any budget deal is still alive is because of massive activism and pressure from our progressive movement - thank you for keeping up the fight for Democrats to Deliver. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] US Rep. Rashida Tlaib overcame Big Money to claim victory Tuesday evening, heading into another term in Congress, representing the people of Michigan’s 12th District. Rashida is a bold leader and a champion for progressive legislation in the US House. We need more elected allies like her willing to speak out in the fight for justice and equity. [ ][IMG] Sadly, US Rep. Andy Levin - a lifelong advocate of working people and labor organizer - put up a good fight on Tuesday, but couldn’t outmatch the $11 million from rightwing billionaires and AIPAC. We won’t take this sitting down, and this isn’t the last we’ll see of Andy. He isn’t capable of giving up the fight — and neither are we. Also this week, Our Revolution Michigan notched wins with State Sen. Erika Geiss, a proud “economic justice warrior” in SD-1, and State Rep. Abraham Aiyash, a proud “lover of environmental justice” in HD-9. [ ]Join our inside-outside work with elected allies like Rashida, Erika and Abraham in the fight for living wages, climate action, immigrant rights, Medicare for All and so much more. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] US Rep. Pramila Jayapal dominated in her primary in Washington’s 7th District on Tuesday - pulling in over 80-percent of the vote! Rep. Jayapal is on to the general election and will likely keep her seat in the US House, where she serves as Chair of the Congressional Progressive Caucus. “Our Revolution candidates aren’t just progressive, they’re organizers — we need more organizing on the inside,” she said on our [ ]National Organizing Call. [ ]Become a recurring donor to fund our mission of building progressive power in Congress. The more of us there are, the more we can accomplish together. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Tuesday was a big win in Missouri with progressive champion Cori Bush (MO-1) winning her primary and heading to the November ballot for what should be an easy re-election! In 2020, Our Revolution members and volunteers worked to help Cori defeat 10-term corporate incumbent Lacy Clay. Now, Rep. Bush will head into her second term as a bold progressive ally in Congress. “We build power by getting more of us in there who are willing to put our minds, our bodies and our reputations on the line to deliver equity and justice for our communities,” Cori told us on our [ ]National Organizing Call. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Election Day is this Tuesday in Minnesota, where progressive champions US Rep. Ilhan Omar and Our Revolution board member and Attorney General Keith Ellison are on the ballot! Leading national voices for the progressive movement, Ilhan is the whip of the progressive caucus and Keith successfully prosecuted Derek Chauvin for the murder of George Floyd. If you’re in Minnesota, find your polling place [ ]HERE! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] All of Our Revolution’s candidates are also endorsed by Bernie in Tuesday’s primary in Vermont - Peter Welch for US Senate, Becca Balint for Congress, and David Zuckerman for Lt. Governor! “At a time when so many of our people are hurting, we need leaders with experience who will help lead the fight for economic, racial, social, and environmental justice,” Bernie said. In Congress, Peter Welch is a cosponsor of the Green New Deal and he’s led on lowering drug prices, childcare, rural broadband, and protecting our imperiled democracy. As VT Senate Majority Leader, Becca Balint passed the first gun safety laws in state history, invested in affordable housing, and passed the strongest reproductive rights in the nation. David Zuckerman is an organic regenerative farmer, father, and small business owner living in Hinesburg, who has long served as a progressive, independent voice in the VT House and Senate and as Lt. Governor. If you’re in Vermont - or know someone who is - find polling locations [ ]HERE! ★ ★ ★ MD RESULTS STILL TRICKLING IN! [ ][IMG] Our Revolution Maryland is celebrating Kristin Mink’s victory in the Montgomery Co. primary and Prince George’s County’s pivot left. Our members and allies worked to elect Eric Olsen and Wala Blegay to Prince George’s Council, creating the first progressive council majority. The Washington Post reports the council will favor residents and tenants rather than developers and landlords for the first time in many years. [ ][IMG] The contest for Montgomery Co. Executive remains a dead heat. Progressive incumbent Marc Elrich now leads Big Pharma CEO David Blair by 154 votes as of Friday with thousands still to be tallied. Election officials estimate all ballots may not be counted before August 12th. A recount will very likely follow. [ ]Become a recurring donor TODAY to help us take down the worst corporate Dems and give voters the most electable AND progressive candidates in November! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] This 2022 primary season, Our Revolution Phonebank Force has made more than 500,000 calls o voters across the country. Right now, we have shifts for incredible candidates for Congress like Brittany Ramos-DeBarros (NY-11), David Segal (RI-2), Melanie D’Arrigo (NY-3), and many others! [ ]COMMIT TO A CALL SHIFT ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] [ ][IMG] CALLING OUT CHUCK SCHUMER BRING ANTITRUST BILLS TO A VOTE! Our Revolution activists have been bird-dogging Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer on two antitrust bills - which can PASS - and now he’s agreed to bring them for a Senate vote in September. The American Innovation and Choice Online Act and the Open App Markets Act would enable fairer competition on platforms, and ban self-dealing. Our members and activists have also driven 1300 calls to senators, urging them to back bills to Bust Big Tech’s monopoly power. Here’s your last chance to [ ]CALL YOUR SENATORS before they go on August recess to get them to stand up Google, Amazon, Facebook and other mega-corporations damaging our democracy! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Our Revolution New Jersey is coordinating with 11 unions and labor organizations in New Jersey are calling on Rep. Andy Kim (NJ-3) to co-sponsor Medicare for All in Congress. This is a coalition of low-income workers, immigrant workers, and union workers from locals CWA, Teamsters, UAWA, and others - as well as organizations like New Labor, [ ]Insider NJ reports. [ ]Labor for Single Payer believes it’s time to take healthcare off the bargaining table Through rallies, op-eds, sign-on letters, legislative visits, and more, our members and allies are keeping up the pressure on Rep. Kim to do the right thing. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Our Revolution Massachusetts followed up its April Alternatives to Policing Forum with the Alternative Emergency Response Teams Forum last Sunday on how unarmed caregivers can generate better outcomes than police. Earl Miller from Cambridge HEART (Holistic Emergency Alternative Response Team said Amherst’s Community Responders will take “everything from noise complaints to non-violent disputes and working with homeless and mentally challenged folks.” Barbara Ortiz said HEART prioritizes helping people “right there when they need it without the barriers of language or filling out papers or online applications.” [ ]WATCH HERE Also last week, Our Revolution NJ joined 25 NJ groups in a statement of collective opposition to a plan by rightwing Democrat US Rep. Josh Gottheimer to send even more funding to police departments. Data shows police are already funded at historically unprecedented levels, [ ]Insider NJ reports, and our members are standing with the ACLU, NAACP, faith organizations, and a diverse coalition to demand better alternatives in NJ. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Congratulations to Our Revolution Ohio member Susan Haas for winning her election to the Democratic State Central Committee in District 20. This is how we make an impact on the direction of the Party in Ohio. All told, Our Revolution Ohio ran nearly 400 progressives for Central Committee positions across the state’s 58 counties, outmaneuvered the Party Machine, and WON! [ ]Become a member of Our Revolution today to help transform the party and change who has power in politics! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] As you know, Bernie founded Our Revolution six years ago to wage the fight for our progressive policy solutions and elect allies who will work with our activists on the outside. Our Revolution is the largest progressive grassroots-funded organization in the country — [ ]but we need to double our coalition and max out our power to beat back the big money dominating American politics. Become a sustaining member TODAY. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] WORKPLACE DEMOCRACY IN CALIFORNIA We need YOU to stand up with fast-food workers, Our Revolution, SEIU, and Fight for $15 and a Union to demand the California State Senate pass AB-257 - The FAST Recovery Act. This bill would give these essential workers a say in setting health, safety, and employment standards while holding major food chains accountable. [ ]TAKE ACTION - add your voice in solidarity with worker activists - tell your state senator to pass AB 257 for more democracy in the workplace. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Our Revolution is making calls to David Segal to Congress (RI-2) — He will be a key ally in the fight to rein in corporate power and corruption. Join us to make an impact on one of the most critical primaries of 2022. [ ]VOLUNTEER HERE! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Melanie D’Arrigo is an incredible advocate for Medicare for All, the Green New Deal, and our popular progressive agenda – let’s beat out the establishment and send her to Congress! Help us reach voters directly in NY-3. [ ]MAKE CALLS FOR MELANIE ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Sign up to help elect Our Revolution member and endorsed candidate Brittany Ramos DeBarros to Congress in NY-11. We’ll be calling thousands of Our Revolution supporters in this Staten Island-based Congressional District. [ ]RSVP HERE ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] We’ll also be calling voters for Megan Green, a 2016 Bernie delegate we helped elect to the St. Louis Board of Alderman last election cycle. Now, Our Revolution is standing with her in her run for Board President. [ ]CALL FOR MEGAN IN ST. LOUIS ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Become a sustaining member of Our Revolution for just $5 a month and get your own official Membership Card. For $10, get our collectible sticker 6-pack — $15, get the stickers and a poster — $27, get both PLUS a tote bag — and at the $50 level, get it all and a T-shirt. [ ]BECOME A MOVEMENT BUILDER [ ]★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] [ ]★ ★ ★ [ ]Facebook | [ ]Twitter | [ ]Instagram | [ ]Youtube | [ ]Website | [ ]Sign Up [ ]Our membership swag Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive group in America. Last year alone, we elected 74% of our 450 endorsed progressive candidates by mobilizing on the ground AND in the halls of power. [ ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the establishment by committing to a 2022 Movement Builder recurring donation of just $5 or more a month! We also saw on Tuesday that even in a formerly-purple, now-red, state like Kansas the broad majority of voters who disagree with the extremist anti-abortion and anti-choice policies of politicians like Ann Wagner show up when they recognize the stakes of the election. Trish is working to do just that right here in MO-02. Ann Wagner refuses to meet voters throughout this district and simply won't speak with or listen to her constituents, evidenced by the fact that over nearly 10 years of holding this seat in Congress she has never—not once—held a public town hall to hear from the people. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Trish has assembled an energetic and passionate team of Missourians, young and older folks alike, with dozens of volunteers from across this new district to forge the coalition of voters we will need to defeat Wagner. Thank you for joining the team. In Solidarity, -Trish Gunby for Congress Trish Gunby for Congress PO Box 430114 Saint Louis, MO 63143 United States Paid for by Trish Gunby for Congress

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: I want to share my mother's story, Derek
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ABRAMS FOR GOVERNOR |
body:
[1]Stacey Abrams for Governor

Derek,

I’m building a campaign that reaches out to voters in every corner of the
state. But to do that, we have to hit our goals.

I wanted to share with you a story about why I’m committed to running a
campaign that lifts up all Georgians. [ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1619?refcode=sa_em_220806_B1_PersonalStory_S1_T1_SYA_30open_RS&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1002&akid=1334%2E1862389%2EpyumcR ]I hope you will read it, and then
make your first
donation today.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1619?refcode=sa_em_220806_B1_PersonalStory_S1_T1_SYA_30open_RS&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1003&akid=1334%2E1862389%2EpyumcR ]DONATE

My mother was in third grade when she dropped out of her segregated public
elementary school with no plans to return. A next door neighbor understood
how poverty made this seem like the only choice. Instead, over and over,
she encouraged my mom to go back to school.

When my mother gathered up the courage to return to school, she expected
to repeat the third grade. But when she arrived, she learned that when she
dropped out, one of her teachers wrote a letter to the principal:

“If Carolyn Hall ever comes back to school, move her on to the next grade.
She’s smart enough."

Guidance and care from a neighbor, grace and faith from a public school
teacher. That’s what worked. My mom went into the fourth grade, and when
she became the first in her family to finish high school, she graduated as
valedictorian. Eventually, she watched her own daughter also graduate as
valedictorian from DeKalb County Public Schools.

That’s the power of a community that cares. Our power and strength as
Americans live in our willingness to lift one another up.

Because we do not succeed alone.

In this country, when times are tough, we can persevere because our
friends and neighbors will come for us. Our first responders will come for
us. It is this mantra, this uncommon grace of community that has driven me
to become an attorney, a small-business owner, an author and the
Democratic nominee for governor of Georgia.

And while my name may be on the ballot, this election is not about me.

This campaign is about the people of Georgia, who have had to spend too
many years with barriers and stumbling blocks between them and the
opportunities they deserve.

From now until November, this campaign will have many twists and turns,
but one thing will remain constant: I am running for governor to create a
stronger Georgia and will work for all Georgians. But I cannot succeed
alone, Derek.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1619?refcode=sa_em_220806_B1_PersonalStory_S1_T1_SYA_30open_RS&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1004&akid=1334%2E1862389%2EpyumcR ]That’s why I’m asking: can I count on you to make your
first donation to
power our campaign?

Let’s get it done,

Stacey

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

+---------------------------------+
| PAID FOR BY ABRAMS FOR GOVERNOR |
+---------------------------------+

Abrams for Governor
931 Monroe Dr NE
Ste A102 #363
Atlanta, GA 30308
United States

Contributions to Abrams for Governor are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most critical
tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can click here to let
us know if you would like to [ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1468?t=1001&akid=1334%2E1862389%2EpyumcR ]receive fewer emails or

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.staceyabrams.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1334%2E1862389%2EpyumcR

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Tudor Dixon wants to force 14-year-olds give birth, and Michigan (like every other state,) deserves so much better.
body:
Where do these throwbacks come from?
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **She thinks a 14 year old molested by her uncle is the "perfect example" of who should be forced to give birth.** **Yes, this is the position of right-wing lunatic Tudor Dixon, whom the Michigan Republican Party nominated on Tuesday as their gubernatorial candidate in Michigan. She is heartless, she is mindless and she is all too happy to torture young girls with forced birth, cause emotional anguish for women raped and impregnated and control the bodies and lives of women who just believe it's their own damn right to control their own damn bodies, not turn them over to Tudor Dixon!** Dixon is also an election denier who has consistently lied, saying the 2020 election was "stolen" the kind of violence that led to January 6th in Washington. But, in Michigan, it's even more personal. You may remember a plot was stopped by the authorities that had been planned by far-right militias who support Dixon, a plot that included plans to kidnap Governor Gretchen Whitmer and other statewide officials and Democrats, and execute them. Dixon, like so many in the GOP today, is playing with fire, and we can't let her burn us all. **Governor Whitmer, meanwhile, is one of the most talented, toughest and most accomplished governors in the country. Whitmer, who came close to becoming a victim of this insane right-wing plot, didn't stop, slow down, or apologize for a second. ** [**Can you join me in giving whatever you can, be it $2, $5 ,$10 or any amount** ,** to progressive, Democratic hero Gretchen Whitmer in her effort to stop a forced-birth-for-molested-14-year-olds, radical seditionist from taking control of the government in Michigan?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tad242dbc-65db-401b-897d-79549ef567ec/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) She could have let it scare her into inaction. She didn't. She could have let it convince her to walk away. She didn't. She instead has compiled a record in a key swing state--one we must hold if we are going to re-elect President Biden in 2024--that is the envy of most governors around the country.
---
|
---
| | | | [DONATE NOW: GRETCHEN WHITMER FOR MICHIGAN!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8b4405bb-fa0f-47ba-92a8-ca6fcc030655/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Whitmer enacted tough COVID prevention measures, and fought for them. She is unapolagetically pro-choice, and will fight for this position until there's no fighting left to be done. She's fought for in universal voting rights, universal background checks, bringing manufacturijng back to its incestral home of Michigan while greening the economy to prevent climate change. And this year, we have a strong chance of taking both houses of the Michigan legislature, which along with Whitmer's holding the governorship, would lead to the kind of groundbreaking and lasting change that would move the state ahead a half century. **Tudor Dixon is a threat to democracy in Michigan, a threat to democracy in this country, and she intends to control the bodies of every girl and woman of child-bearing age so Michiganders live in the warped Handmaid's Tale of Dixon's fantasies. ** **Whitmer must win reelection in 2022. It is that simple. She will protect Michigan women. She can help Democrats hold Michigan and the presidency, protecting its electoral votes from the attempted thievery of the Republican Party. ** [**Can you join me in giving whatever you can, be it $2, $5 ,$10 or any amount** ,** to progressive, Democratic hero Gretchen Whitmer in her effort to stop a forced-birth-for-molested-14-year-olds, radical seditionist from taking control of the government in Michigan?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T83594abb-a8bd-4a27-a7be-003ebca706e2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thanks as always my friends. For engaging in this fight and every other one like it. Cliff

name: Peter Welch
subject: More problem-solving, less Mitch McConnell
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
We can’t let the Senate go red and lose progress we’re making for working families

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=761%2E61531%2E9OYuLQ)
Hello,
It took me no time at all to realize I wanted to make Vermont my home.
After spending my early 20s as a community organizer fighting housing discrimination in Chicago and going to law school, I felt a pull—away from the corporate Wall Street jobs and the big D.C. jobs on K Street that many of my classmates sought—toward a community I could call home. I found it in White River Junction.
Much like my organizing work, serving as a Vermont public defender gave me an opportunity to fight for what is right every day and give voice to those vulnerable to an unjust system. In the courtroom, on the sidewalk on Bridge Street, and on my favorite hiking trails, I met my community and was welcomed with the Vermont values I now hold most dear—like self-reliance, mutual support, and cooperation built on trust.
Those are values I want to bring with me to the Senate. [**With your support today, you can continue to grow this grassroots campaign and help me fight for Vermont as its Senator. If you’re able to, please chip in:**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/3731?t=3&akid=761%2E61531%2E9OYuLQ)
_If you’ve saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

---
| [$3](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/3731?t=17&amount=3&akid=761%2E61531%2E9OYuLQ)
---
| [$15](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/3731?t=19&amount=15&akid=761%2E61531%2E9OYuLQ)
---
| [$28](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/3731?t=21&amount=28&akid=761%2E61531%2E9OYuLQ)
---
| [$50](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/3731?t=23&amount=50&akid=761%2E61531%2E9OYuLQ)
---
| [$100](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/3731?t=13&amount=100&akid=761%2E61531%2E9OYuLQ)
---
| [OTHER](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/3731?t=15&akid=761%2E61531%2E9OYuLQ)
---

---
[](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/3731?t=8&akid=761%2E61531%2E9OYuLQ)
Since 2007, I’ve had a dream job, representing Vermont in the U.S. House. I’ve met incredible people across this great state, heard their concerns and listened to their needs, and then I’ve worked hard to pass real solutions in Congress. It seems clear to me that we need more of that problem-solving in the Senate—and less of Mitch McConnell’s political division and stagnation.
Vermont isn’t your traditional swing state, but as an open seat this year, it is a key Senate race. We know it and so do Senate Republicans. They’re spending big money to regain their majority and if they succeed then the progress we’ve made in recent years will be lost.
[**We must keep the Senate blue. Can you pitch in now to power this grassroots campaign so I can fight for you in the Senate next year?**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/3731?t=9&akid=761%2E61531%2E9OYuLQ)
I’m so proud to call Vermont my home, and to be in this fight alongside you.
Thanks,
Peter

---

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Two big wins for Justice Democrats
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Great news: Cori Bush and Rashida Tlaib won their primaries against
corporate Democrats! With your help, we lifted Cori and Rashida to big
primary wins, and we beat back corporate super PACs and the political
establishment.

We can only do this work with the help of our grassroots
donors, Peter.
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/113306?refcode=em20220806-24594&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=24594%2E1203867%2EloiRep ]Chip in $3 or anything at all right now to re-elect more
JDs (like Jamaal Bowman on 8/23) and expand our JD bloc in Congress.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/113306?refcode=em20220806-24594&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=24594%2E1203867%2EloiRep ]Pictures of Cori Bush and Rashida Tlaib with text 'Big Wins for Justice
Democrats. Chip in to fuel more JD victories.

Every one of our wins helps grow our movement for progressive change in
this country and our work to transform the Democratic Party. Cori’s win is
special because she was our first ever JD recruit. And now, after losing
her first election, we’ve shown what she can do — defeat a corporate 20+
year incumbent in 2020 and then win again in 2022.

Rashida battled a tough redistricting process in Michigan and more than $1
million in corporate super PAC money to win this primary. She’s an
outspoken leader for the working class, Palestinian rights, and so much
more.

Every day, we’re fighting to protect the Squad (our fiercest progressive
leaders in Congress) and expand the JD bloc in Congress. We have another
Squad primary coming up soon and the general election in November to
ensure we elect our new Justice Democrats, Summer Lee and Greg Casar.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/113306?refcode=em20220806-24594&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=24594%2E1203867%2EloiRep ]So, can you help us re-elect Jamaal, expand the Squad, and continue
our fight to transform the Democratic Party? Contribute $3
now and help us build on this momentum.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/113306?refcode=em20220806-24594&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=24594%2E1203867%2EloiRep ]Contribute $3

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1024&akid=24594%2E1203867%2EloiRep ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1025&akid=24594%2E1203867%2EloiRep ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220806-24594-footer&t=1026&refcode2=24594_1203867_loiRep&akid=24594%2E1203867%2EloiRep

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1027&akid=24594%2E1203867%2EloiRep

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

| | **Sunset cocktails. At a beach-front mansion. All expenses paid. Must be nice to be Millionaire Madeleine Dean!**

I don't know about you, but I know many families who are having a tough time getting away for a vacation this year. Sidewalks in our neighborhood are not the only thing scorching this summer.

_**Compared to last summer gas prices are up 50%, airline fares are up 25% - HELL, the increase in beef prices makes it tough to justify slapping a steak on the grill!**_

But don't worry about Millionaire Madeleine. Tonight she'll have her feet up, cocktail in hand, ocean breeze waving through her hair, and a conga line of liberal beach buddies each with a check in hand.

Think we're kidding? Here's the invitation.
** **
**Help us combat the liberal fundraising machine supporting the disastrous Madeleine Dean and the policies that are gouging each one of us this summer with a donation[ _RIGHT NOW_](https://cn4pa.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2d1d8e72981035507cd4628e7&id=742287fc24&e=0a4d873a55)**.

Please consider making a contribution today and share this email with your friends and family. [**Even $10, $15, or $25 will make a considerable difference in this race**](https://cn4pa.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2d1d8e72981035507cd4628e7&id=8b3a2e7e23&e=0a4d873a55).

[**Our country deserves much better than the failed Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, AOC, and Madeleine Dean liberal agenda. With your help today, we have a real shot to stop this insanity on November 8.**](https://cn4pa.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2d1d8e72981035507cd4628e7&id=6835ad3ef4&e=0a4d873a55)

**Thank you for your continued support. Let's win this race!**

For Pennsylvania,

Christian Nascimento
Republican Nominee for Congress, Pennsylvania

name: Col. Mike Waltz
subject: I believe in Hung Cao
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hung Cao for Congress
body:
Serving as a Green Beret was the greatest honor of my life. There is no feeling like pushing your body to its limits to serve your country, and there| | |
---
Peter, Serving as a Green Beret was the greatest honor of my life.

There is no feeling like pushing your body to its limits to serve your country, and there is no brotherhood like that with my fellow soldiers across our great military.

**Hung Cao served in the Navy on the front lines dismantling bombs and thwarting the most dangerous terrorists in the world. He embodies what makes a great patriot - and when he gets to Washington, he’ll embody what it takes to be a great leader.**

Hung understands like few others that our freedom isn’t free, Peter.

His family escaped communist Vietnam and legally immigrated to America after his father was put on a kill list for speaking out against their home country’s evil regime.

Growing up, Hung never took his freedom in America for granted, which is why he attended the U.S. Naval Academy and went to the most dangerous corners of the world to protect our God-given rights.

**With more and more young people falling for socialisms’ lies, we need leaders like Hung Cao more than ever who can stand up for the TRUTH - that America is the _greatest country on Earth._ **

**[Leaders like Hung are the key to taking back the House, but with Democrat mega-donors pouring MASSIVE resources into his race, he needs your help. clean_body: Serving as a Green Beret was the greatest honor of my life. There is no feeling like pushing your body to its limits to serve your country, and there| | | Peter, Serving as a Green Beret was the greatest honor of my life. There is no feeling like pushing your body to its limits to serve your country, and there is no brotherhood like that with my fellow soldiers across our great military. Hung Cao served in the Navy on the front lines dismantling bombs and thwarting the most dangerous terrorists in the world. He embodies what makes a great patriot - and when he gets to Washington, he’ll embody what it takes to be a great leader. Hung understands like few others that our freedom isn’t free, Peter. His family escaped communist Vietnam and legally immigrated to America after his father was put on a kill list for speaking out against their home country’s evil regime. Growing up, Hung never took his freedom in America for granted, which is why he attended the U.S. Naval Academy and went to the most dangerous corners of the world to protect our God-given rights. With more and more young people falling for socialisms’ lies, we need leaders like Hung Cao more than ever who can stand up for the TRUTH - that America is the greatest country on Earth. In Service, Col. Mike Waltz Special Forces Green Beret U.S. Congressman (FL-6) | | Paid for by Hung Cao for Congress | | Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. [ ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/48882394/359942393/-1839819742?refcode=lee_headerlogo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTg0MmI3Ny1iZDE1LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dY5w6v650VzwCBovyNDMJeIr4_VOMw7dLz0CcA20soE=)

| | Hi, I have to be quick because I only have 5 minutes before my next campaign call. It feels like our campaign has been getting bad news after bad news. Team, in Congress, I want to fight to make sure that everyone has a shot to thrive in the middle class.

**But it’s no secret that our middle class is shrinking** – from COVID-19, to inflation, to gas prices, our middle class has been under incredible economic pressure.

We can rebuild the middle class by bringing our supply chains back to America and creating good paying, union jobs, but it’s going to take electing leaders willing to stand up for American workers and our middle class.

[**That’s why I’m asking you to chip in $3 today so we can continue to strengthen our economy and create good paying jobs »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48882498/359942725/161715659?amount=3&refcode=NBFC_20220806_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmJhMzcyYS1iZTE1LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XAJ-NzNspJfOXDgBWOOAD8TTjlRBYRLRoVzom9JNywU=) | [$3,500 GOAL: CHIP IN $3 NOW TO ELECT NIKKI BUDZINSKI »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48882499/359942726/161715659?amount=3&refcode=NBFC_20220806_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmJhMzcyYS1iZTE1LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XAJ-NzNspJfOXDgBWOOAD8TTjlRBYRLRoVzom9JNywU=)

I’ve spent my career advocating for working people – helping lead the fight for a $15 minimum wage in Illinois and advocating for workplace protections and a fair day’s pay for grocery store workers and meatpackers.

And now, I want to take that fight to Congress.

I know we can flip this critical seat and deliver for Illinois working families, but I need you by my side in this fight, team.

[**Republicans will fight HARD to keep this seat — they know that we can win it. So please, will you chip in $3 right now to send a champion for working families to Washington? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48882500/359942727/161715659?amount=3&refcode=NBFC_20220806_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmJhMzcyYS1iZTE1LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XAJ-NzNspJfOXDgBWOOAD8TTjlRBYRLRoVzom9JNywU=)

Democrat Nikki Budzinski is running for Congress in Illinois' 13th District. This district is currently in Republican hands, and is by far one of the most competitive in the entire country.

Nikki has spent her life fighting for workers and working families by strengthening unions nationwide, and she was instrumental in passing a $15 minimum wage in Illinois while working as a senior advisor for Governor JB Pritzker. Most recently, Nikki served in President Biden's administration in the office that implemented the American Rescue Plan.

Nikki believes in the American Dream and will bring people together to level the playing field and rebuild the middle class so families have a shot to get ahead.

clean_body: I’m taking this fight to Congress >> | = Team, in Congress, I want to fight to make sure that everyone has a shot to thrive in the middle class. But it’s no secret that our middle class is shrinking – from COVID-19, to inflation, to gas prices, our middle class has been under incredible economic pressure. We can rebuild the middle class by bringing our supply chains back to America and creating good paying, union jobs, but it’s going to take electing leaders willing to stand up for American workers and our middle class. = | = I’ve spent my career advocating for working people – helping lead the fight for a $15 minimum wage in Illinois and advocating for workplace protections and a fair day’s pay for grocery store workers and meatpackers. And now, I want to take that fight to Congress. I know we can flip this critical seat and deliver for Illinois working families, but I need you by my side in this fight, team. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Thank you, Nikki | | Paid for by Nikki For Congress P.O. Box 5171, Springfield, IL 62705 www.nikkiforcongress.com Democrat Nikki Budzinski is running for Congress in Illinois' 13th District. This district is currently in Republican hands, and is by far one of the most competitive in the entire country. Nikki has spent her life fighting for workers and working families by strengthening unions nationwide, and she was instrumental in passing a $15 minimum wage in Illinois while working as a senior advisor for Governor JB Pritzker. Most recently, Nikki served in President Biden's administration in the office that implemented the American Rescue Plan. Nikki believes in the American Dream and will bring people together to level the playing field and rebuild the middle class so families have a shot to get ahead. Please, consider making a =. body:
[1]Beto O'Rourke

Greg
Abbott's support has plummeted since the beginning of this race.

Recent polls show Beto within 5 points of Abbott, meaning our victory for
the people of Texas is within reach. But with just over three months until
Election Day, we need to make sure we’re hitting our fundraising goals
every day to maximize our efforts across Texas. We can’t risk falling
short.

This is a tight, single-digit race with the future of Texas at stake, so
we have to ask:

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220806-1.y8hCnf&refcode=ema20220806-201853&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=201853%2E444211%2EflHp_F ]Please, can we count on you to add your
first donation today
to help close the gap with Abbott and defeat him in November?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220806-1.y8hCnf&refcode=ema20220806-201853&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=201853%2E444211%2EflHp_F ]Contribute $3

Did you know that 59% of Texans now believe our state is heading in the
wrong direction under Abbott’s failed leadership?

It’s no surprise. Abbott has chosen an extreme agenda over delivering for
the people of Texas — from his inaction on gun violence to signing the
most extreme abortion ban in the country.

We've
proven we have the people on our side. In the last reporting period, we
outraised Abbott with over 4x as many contributions — setting a record for
the most money raised by a state-level candidate in Texas history.

But in order to win this race, we need to be realistic. Abbott still has
millions more in cash — and already has nearly $20 million in ads reserved
to flood Texas with attacks against Beto. We can't let Abbott's corporate
mega-donors drown out our momentum.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220806-1.y8hCnf&refcode=ema20220806-201853&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=201853%2E444211%2EflHp_F ]Please, can you donate $3 or more right now to help
fuel our organizing efforts on the ground, reach the voters we need to win
in November, and elect a governor who will represent ALL Texans?

Thank you,

Beto for Texas

clean_body: Elizabeth Warren’s SOLID PLAN to expand Social Security | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. | | | | BREAKING: Social Security Expected to RUN OUT in 13 YEARS Social Security is slated to run out in just 13 YEARS [!!] This is a disaster. If Social Security runs out of funds, our seniors will lose their hard-earned benefits and have NO WAY to pay their bills. BUT LUCKILY → Democrats like Elizabeth Warren have a SOLID PLAN to expand Social Security funding by $200/month to help seniors! But the GOP will stop at nothing to stop her plan so they can pay for their irresponsible tax cuts for the rich! So Dr. Raul Ruiz is launching a fund to defend Social Security from greedy D.C. Republican attacks. | | | | | | | It’s up to us to make sure Democrats’ plan to expand Social Security succeeds without Republican interference. But if we don’t act now, we’ll see Social Security destroyed irreparably. | | | | | | | We hope you stand with us. \-- Raul Ruiz for Congress | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? name: Mayor Lee Harris
subject: We did it, thank you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lee Harris for Mayor, Rajiv Singh, Esq
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/leeharris2022?refcode=email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/leeharris2022?refcode=email]
August 6, 2022
Dear friend,
This week, we pulled off a significant county-wide victory, garnering 58% of the vote to our opponent’s 42%. In addition, we were able to build on our historic Democratic sweep from 4 years ago [https://www.commercialappeal.com/story/news/politics/elections/2018/08/02/democrat-lee-harris-takes-early-lead-shelby-county-mayors-race/869062002/] in 2018.
This year, through the combined efforts of many, many groups and individuals, we were able to flip blue the District Attorney seat; congratulations to Democratic DA-elect Steve Mulroy. We were also able to win an additional seat on the Shelby County Commission, and our preferred (non-partisan) candidate for Juvenile Court Judge, Tarik Sugarmon, won his race; congratulations to the Judge Sugarmon Team.
Thank you to all those who have contributed [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/leeharris2022] to this cause.
I am most grateful to the voters of Memphis and Shelby County. They listened to the arguments of the competing candidates, sorted through information from a variety of sources, and they turned out and participated in our democratic process. I am particularly grateful to the ones who cast their vote for me and supported our campaign for Shelby County’s Next Era. However, whether you voted for our campaign or voted for someone else and, honestly, whether you voted or not, I pledge to work hard to serve the residents of Memphis and Shelby County. I pledge to continue to be the voice for working families.
All the best to all of you, and thank you,
Lee Harris
Mayor of Shelby County, Tennessee

clean_body: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. | | Hey , just checking in. Reports say Social Security will run out of funding in the next 13 years. This is scary – but the good news is that Democrat Elizabeth Warren has a solid plan to expand Social Security for decades to come. However, the GOP is fighting to stop this brilliant plan. So it’s incredibly important that everyone does their part to support Social Security expansion. That’s why I asked my team to pull your Social Security Expansion Supporter record – | | | | | | | | | Republicans spent the last decade trying to defund Social Security [!!!] And right now, this vital program has never been more vulnerable. So we must ensure Social Security is fully funded by supporting Elizabeth Warren’s plan. It’s the ONLY way for seniors to keep up with the rising cost of living, food, and other expenses like gas and electricity. | | | | | | Thank you, Dr. Raul Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Share your thoughts on American energy independence
body:
Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office | | | [](http://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5eb83ea52f9341f6a10b858e1b1b66e1&_e=3woSNndb0t7EUou-5ENZ3MEM1a0grmQI_2VV2uA6OfiEVq55jwwabXC5ei_eqR7ao4qFPevll8gKrl2Nr37eTaSx3co7r6lysKf0zZCFi_K_EtzKtTE3iynZc6PSoKevBsxGnfPyou-QiwjCBjEudiSh2xeYH8JXjoMnlWmMpELGavVEuCRbDYrmkCQuiMg9GE1EB0DSJDEEfeOjX4l2P9tmxaBPvwevtXhzcIOXM7ClHK1pBhGDShPAjzrNqKr91gG9PEvX-_pni28rZgGYIn9zh4pm96sOv1k7r2l3zME9lkctlgKdiVSVxn3FcvFLyLNIBoZx-LnzBkmIgPLrjKNj1huQk4RC5xJ52ip2QXTSte2J3gUFaxifaZcTodCvCW5AXUKW4O44k1dd7aj2sf1-t9L8bMEamO8anu7ewz83R0Dq68XGYJBZ_io76Vfj)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family. [**Would you be willing to share your thoughts in this brief 8 question survey?**](http://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5eb83ea52f9341f6a10b858e1b1b66e1&_e=3woSNndb0t7EUou-5ENZ3MEM1a0grmQI_2VV2uA6OfiEVq55jwwabXC5ei_eqR7ao4qFPevll8gKrl2Nr37eTaSx3co7r6lysKf0zZCFi_K_EtzKtTE3iynZc6PSoKevBsxGnfPyou-QiwjCBjEudiSh2xeYH8JXjoMnlWmMpELGavVEuCRbDYrmkCQuiMg9GE1EB0DSJDEEfeOjX4l2P9tmxaBPvwevtXhzcIOXM7A_pU2_yqABpHQfVieNdTakJhCdVwHUsW6CjlEC3OoCr1l9fBAMf0y72HC66Xh49hOM0NeMVGiQFLRFia9CsOfAGZn4DobjK3e-iO_o-5zpC6WJOv4GlHG4gBAQX7KQ_xq74rHFnyAikbIG2STpRxs0J99cl5JBnvPEn4utGEBcWn3nztrqLCghcXsd9XwaIB50nq1BqAbIXZTykcQb5DeG) By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think—and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. **You can get started right now using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/energy-independence-survey/](http://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5eb83ea52f9341f6a10b858e1b1b66e1&_e=3woSNndb0t7EUou-5ENZ3MEM1a0grmQI_2VV2uA6OfiEVq55jwwabXC5ei_eqR7ao4qFPevll8gKrl2Nr37eTaSx3co7r6lysKf0zZCFi_K_EtzKtTE3iynZc6PSoKevBsxGnfPyou-QiwjCBjEudiSh2xeYH8JXjoMnlWmMpELGavVEuCRbDYrmkCQuiMg9GE1EB0DSJDEEfeOjX4l2P9tmxaBPvwevtXhzcIOXM7DeS15BRgSGNpncRJ0OtnATWIP7Chrx8Zt_cPMStwd6wxfEnzn-ea6fBXzVuun6rhGJhaV2L6C4e0yAl23MIzvxFX2_8s6PV09d85E32PSwCgWczGWXNCZjarcP5R4CV9GE5PlVoGxLU9KfAF90F4Zr4Ux_KKu_xW86VAcDPJ2sIRbxMvkpFAVqc0YHPM4otS-_vXpGFWe2N83JWWmJbEDU)** Thank you so much for your time. I am truly grateful. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development

Now, Dr. Caraveo is running for Congress to stand up for hard-working families she sees falling through the cracks. name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=57ec58ea2d37494eb980c2cdab1a48f1&_e=v9oXOkGJUEcQIzt_hqo-XtWw_zmn7LTuZuLVrzeUktl39UIrg7NfG6EjgfZki9xESIoEZWBrPydlTmMVjBvpI9BlDK9029R8murftmUJipOsvBJ5feT04U74vzfXzUnqfV4fFn-IGWlH0k_nzkrxLK4rXjquOJ1ClSXTQQMANrHXW3DYRjH1uafCA6ELLTc7RoFtVdfkBfq0-P-yJMV3YiPDqqivTaeRGSYqCjmoFk4w4thzgwdMjAK1fGOS_uqv5saiqxgj37yTEQeWesI0s9tE4rVYB5VENBFwXOAvgSsFOhvt-e8yNu0wFnaVRJsXX7xdCs0abwbVr4GzLpBFCl5ez-JZ88JsT7vZKFs1D5webkXrjtqDENVjRUqAQfto3K-dcOPZGyxEZvpadIySWoDmOW66tBd59S4hvEhb_WNh1VKpXcwyEzxZZ30sipXXKrwMqicks52ch73ZPhlmOQ%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” ** Through** “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=57ec58ea2d37494eb980c2cdab1a48f1&_e=v9oXOkGJUEcQIzt_hqo-XtWw_zmn7LTuZuLVrzeUktl39UIrg7NfG6EjgfZki9xESIoEZWBrPydlTmMVjBvpI9BlDK9029R8murftmUJipOsvBJ5feT04U74vzfXzUnqfV4fFn-IGWlH0k_nzkrxLK4rXjquOJ1ClSXTQQMANrHXW3DYRjH1uafCA6ELLTc7RoFtVdfkBfq0-P-yJMV3YiPDqqivTaeRGSYqCjmoFk4w4thzgwdMjAK1fGOS_uqvvdrK6etSdAFA5i73nuEAzrMp3Cywtyldd1bP0pTEdFs05UzoCQNduqlM5W5_NHptn62Yf8kIqxxcvgcfD6lGA8wgYbjP7utaqOomg80mXchgltlpVV5NhqvD-Q_QOayQOIr4ceCq4t31nBCG45tX6003zit86cTgGBVWZ4sFAYd_GUNiVZN1lpdtF9m3BrCGPJtW2O7hpETOc8gZm0XYSA%3D%3D)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: [_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=57ec58ea2d37494eb980c2cdab1a48f1&_e=v9oXOkGJUEcQIzt_hqo-XtWw_zmn7LTuZuLVrzeUktl39UIrg7NfG6EjgfZki9xESIoEZWBrPydlTmMVjBvpI9BlDK9029R8murftmUJipOsvBJ5feT04U74vzfXzUnqfV4fFn-IGWlH0k_nzkrxLK4rXjquOJ1ClSXTQQMANrHXW3DYRjH1uafCA6ELLTc7RoFtVdfkBfq0-P-yJMV3YiPDqqivTaeRGSYqCjmoFk4w4thzgwdMjAK1fGOS_uqvgAEuydFCfxnX_FNP7t2mRLGgl-VbR5kdFg7D16aet21ku48hOkBd6kTN-0Fpnz8OqwKJJJFASHUv8p3sAiyT7a_9-ofxSjzKHJdAII5z8n0f5hcZM_gaRd0RTpNCLt18tEyRyw9jrjC5GFMupc9sy5tF2TAN54JfcHM-p6RxrQJfieXBdxeu4gP_vEmR99JsqEDY3gDJuLKGyE-QyLwSNA%3D%3D) Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. name: John Lira
subject: It’s official, Tony Gonzales is in the pocket of the NRA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for John Lira
body:
Peter,

Did you know that Tony Gonzales has accepted $6,000 from the NRA?

I asked my team to look further into Tony’s fundraising reports, and you know, I wish I could say I was surprised.

Tony Gonzales is officially in the pocket of the NRA.

Can you make a $10 donation to my campaign now so we can be prepared and fight back against whatever attacks he has planned leading up to the election? We need ALL the support possible because we know the NRA and other big-money GOP backers are funding his campaign. But this is the most flippable seat in Texas, and we’re not shying away from a fight. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-lira?refcode=EM_FR_220806Launch2_N_JL_90DO_7_NG_N_L1&amount=10]

If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly to John Lira:

Contribute $5 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-lira?refcode=EM_FR_220806Launch2_N_JL_90DO_7_NG_N_EL5&express_lane=true&amount=5]

Contribute $15 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-lira?refcode=EM_FR_220806Launch2_N_JL_90DO_7_NG_N_EL15&amount=15]

Contribute $30 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-lira?refcode=EM_FR_220806Launch2_N_JL_90DO_7_NG_N_EL30&express_lane=true&amount=30]

Contribute $50 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-lira?refcode=EM_FR_220806Launch2_N_JL_90DO_7_NG_N_EL50&express_lane=true&amount=50]

Contribute $100 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-lira?refcode=EM_FR_220806Launch2_N_JL_90DO_7_NG_N_EL100&express_lane=true&amount=100]

Contribute other » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-lira?refcode=EM_FR_220806Launch2_N_JL_90DO_7_NG_N_ELother&express_lane=true&amount=other]

Our opponent is a rubber stamp for the NRA who admitted to checking with his gun manufacturer buddies before voting NO on a gun safety bill in the House. He’s a top 10 recipient of gun lobby donations in the House. He even admitted to using the exact language from the gun lobby when he talked about the issue.

And look, as a former Marine who has had the safety training before carrying a weapon into combat, I support the Second Amendment.

But he checked with the gun lobby instead of the parents of Uvalde.

That’s right. This vote happened after the Uvalde school shooting, and Tony still chose the gun lobby over the grieving parents in his own district.

Now that we know who is funding Tony’s campaign and making decisions for him, can you donate $10 or more to my campaign to help me flip this seat? This race is going to be incredibly expensive, and it’s critical that we are prepared for what comes next.

[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-lira?refcode=EM_FR_220806Launch2_N_JL_90DO_7_NG_N_L2&amount=5]

Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-lira?refcode=EM_FR_220806Launch2_N_JL_90DO_7_NG_N_BB]

Thank you for everything,

John

https://twitter.com/LiraforCongress [https://twitter.com/LiraforCongress]

name: Camille Torres
subject: this is personal to me
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Harder for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/buvxm4tYSyUtDIGig7D4fghZqJs_RCcqy9VM1n4Edg8=/gyb35yseJM2U07qTOtbvcT0bgiwATjbpNwPz-T5ny7c=?refcode=E17500-20220806-LatinoOrganizing-header-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22) | Hey Peter, As we're nearing election day, I want to talk a little bit about a core part of our campaign that's incredibly personal to me - our Latino organizing program. **And in a moment, I 'll ask for your support in keeping this key program funded - but if you want to skip ahead and chip in now, you can do so here:** [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JHCA-09-Email-Aug2022-FR-LatinoOrganizing**](https://act.myngp.com/el/buvxm4tYSyUtDIGig7D4fghZqJs_RCcqy9VM1n4Edg8=/gyb35yseJM2U07qTOtbvcT0bgiwATjbpNwPz-T5ny7c=?refcode=E17500-20220806-LatinoOrganizing-SL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22) Peter, I'm in this fight for my family. I was born and raised between Florida and Puerto Rico, where I was taught to put community first. In key races like this one, where over 35% of our neighbors identify as Latino, it's a strategic imperative that we connect authentically with our voters. From Day 1, my top priority as Campaign Manager has been to make sure our team reflects our community. That's why over 50% of our team identify as Latino. It's also why we invested the earliest we ever have in a full-scale Latino organizing program. And thanks to your support, we've now brought on an additional 3 organizers to keep the momentum growing! From phone banks and relational organizing, to attending churches and community events, our campaign has strived to be _a part_ of the Latino community, and not just take Latino voters for granted - or even worse, only talk to them the final week of the election. We're deeply invested in making sure every voter in our community understands what's at stake this election, and why Josh is the best candidate to help our families. **What makes this outreach to the Latino community even more critical is that the GOP continues to escalate how they target Latinos with misinformation.** Instead of seeing the diversity of our communities as a strength, they see it as something to exploit: they're carrying out a coordinated and extremely well-funded campaign to spread Spanish-language misinformation and conspiracy theories on social media, messaging apps, and even AM radio shows. _And these efforts have real consequences._ In order to fight back against the GOP's misinformation campaign and have enough resources to keep this critical outreach going, we need your support. My goal is to raise $10,000 this weekend so we can keep funding this vital program that means so much to us. $10,000 may seem like a lot, but I know we can do it! [_**Will you help us reach our goal by chipping in any amount right now?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/buvxm4tYSyUtDIGig7D4fghZqJs_RCcqy9VM1n4Edg8=/gyb35yseJM2U07qTOtbvcT0bgiwATjbpNwPz-T5ny7c=?refcode=E17500-20220806-LatinoOrganizing-SL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22) _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$9](https://act.myngp.com/el/buvxm4tYSyUtDIGig7D4fghZqJs_RCcqy9VM1n4Edg8=/gyb35yseJM2U07qTOtbvcT0bgiwATjbpNwPz-T5ny7c=?express_lane=true&refcode=E17500-20220806-LatinoOrganizing-EL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=9)**

clean_body: | | Hey Peter, As we're nearing election day, I want to talk a little bit about a core part of our campaign that's incredibly personal to me - our Latino organizing program. And in a moment, I 'll ask for your support in keeping this key program funded - but if you want to skip ahead and chip in now, you can do so here: Peter, I'm in this fight for my family. I was born and raised between Florida and Puerto Rico, where I was taught to put community first. In key races like this one, where over 35% of our neighbors identify as Latino, it's a strategic imperative that we connect authentically with our voters. From Day 1, my top priority as Campaign Manager has been to make sure our team reflects our community. That's why over 50% of our team identify as Latino. It's also why we invested the earliest we ever have in a full-scale Latino organizing program. And thanks to your support, we've now brought on an additional 3 organizers to keep the momentum growing! From phone banks and relational organizing, to attending churches and community events, our campaign has strived to be a part of the Latino community, and not just take Latino voters for granted - or even worse, only talk to them the final week of the election. We're deeply invested in making sure every voter in our community understands what's at stake this election, and why Josh is the best candidate to help our families. What makes this outreach to the Latino community even more critical is that the GOP continues to escalate how they target Latinos with misinformation. Instead of seeing the diversity of our communities as a strength, they see it as something to exploit: they're carrying out a coordinated and extremely well-funded campaign to spread Spanish-language misinformation and conspiracy theories on social media, messaging apps, and even AM radio shows. And these efforts have real consequences. In order to fight back against the GOP's misinformation campaign and have enough resources to keep this critical outreach going, we need your support. My goal is to raise $10,000 this weekend so we can keep funding this vital program that means so much to us. $10,000 may seem like a lot, but I know we can do it! If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thank you for reading! Camille Torres Campaign Manager * = =

body:
Here's why [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/48877823/359921060/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk0YTQ2NGMyLWEzMTUtZWQxMS1iZDZlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qkG8HjyN_Qp9eXw9NyN0ZVekT6JXFHOity0Hli9u3qI=&emci=34e1b643-a315-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=94a464c2-a315-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=16335001) Our democracy was founded on the power of the vote and the right of the people to make their voices heard. **So it comes as no surprise that for years, the Treason Caucus has been attacking our voting rights, team.**

The Big Lie was so much more than just Trump's criminal plot to stay in power and destroy our country. The elected officials who went along with that lie made it known they only want our votes if our votes help their agenda. Otherwise, they couldn't care less about American voices.

Even before the Big Lie resulted in the January 6 insurrection, these attacks have been a cornerstone of Treason Caucus policy. **Republicans have always been TERRIFIED of a diverse and educated population. That's why they have done anything and everything to make it harder to vote – especially for people of color and individuals who are low-income.**

Don't believe us? These people don't even try to hide it anymore.

In his home state of Texas, serial vacationer **Ted Cruz openly and proudly opposed the John R. Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act** that would explicitly protect voters of color. Thanks to him, Texas remains a top contender for one of the most difficult states to register to vote.

Even though she was first elected into office SOLELY by absentee ballots, **Lauren Boebert has been on a crusade to reduce access to the ballot by ending mail-in voting.**

And Representative **John Fillmore** from Arizona has been a prominent architect of many bills aimed at granting the power to overturn elections to the state legislature.

**The evidence is there, and it is our responsibility to be vigilant and protect our vote.**

One of the top ways we can do that is to use our collective voices like a weapon at the ballot box and unseat them. **But a lot of people don't know just how powerful their vote can be. That's why we're mobilizing our top target districts to inform constituents and get out the vote to unseat these dangerous members of the Treason Caucus.**

**[Will you help fund our media campaign? Chip in $5 today to help us safeguard our voting rights and our democracy against the Treason Caucus.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/48877824/359921061/1854091666?refcode=em22_220805_VR_fnd_gq_act___TNAPAC_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220805_VR_fnd_gq_act___TNAPAC_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&am=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk0YTQ2NGMyLWEzMTUtZWQxMS1iZDZlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qkG8HjyN_Qp9eXw9NyN0ZVekT6JXFHOity0Hli9u3qI=)**

Thank you,

clean_body: Here's why Our democracy was founded on the power of the vote and the right of the people to make their voices heard. So it comes as no surprise that for years, the Treason Caucus has been attacking our voting rights, team. The Big Lie was so much more than just Trump's criminal plot to stay in power and destroy our country. The elected officials who went along with that lie made it known they only want our votes if our votes help their agenda. Otherwise, they couldn't care less about American voices. Even before the Big Lie resulted in the January 6 insurrection, these attacks have been a cornerstone of Treason Caucus policy. Republicans have always been TERRIFIED of a diverse and educated population. That's why they have done anything and everything to make it harder to vote – especially for people of color and individuals who are low-income. Don't believe us? These people don't even try to hide it anymore. In his home state of Texas, serial vacationer Ted Cruz openly and proudly opposed the John R. Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act that would explicitly protect voters of color. Thanks to him, Texas remains a top contender for one of the most difficult states to register to vote. Even though she was first elected into office SOLELY by absentee ballots, Lauren Boebert has been on a crusade to reduce access to the ballot by ending mail-in voting. And Representative John Fillmore from Arizona has been a prominent architect of many bills aimed at granting the power to overturn elections to the state legislature. The evidence is there, and it is our responsibility to be vigilant and protect our vote. One of the top ways we can do that is to use our collective voices like a weapon at the ballot box and unseat them. But a lot of people don't know just how powerful their vote can be. That's why we're mobilizing our top target districts to inform constituents and get out the vote to unseat these dangerous members of the Treason Caucus. = Thank you, Never Again PAC Marjorie Taylor Greene, Paul Gosar, Lauren Boebert, Mo Brooks, Andy Biggs. Those are just a few of the Republicans in Congress that Never Again PAC is working to defend our democracy from. Help us hold them accountable by chipping in $5 or more today. | Thank you for supporting Never Again PAC as we continue our fight against American fascism and corruption. We are building a war chest to vote out the nation's most dangerous elected officials and hold them accountable for their acts of treason. = Never Again PAC will hold these most dangerous and radical elected officials accountable by building a war chest to support ongoing rapid response efforts in 2022 and beyond. Through advertising, grassroots & digital organizing in targeted members’ districts, at a time in the cycle when other political organizations have historically not spent resources, will ensure our resources will in fact go further, our message will be heard more clearly, and our targets will feel the pressure immediately. For generations, people have risked everything seeking refuge on American shores to escape the very same sorts of political violence that took place at the U.S. Capitol on January 6 –– and every generation has an opportunity to make investments to protect this democracy –– it is time to do our part. name: =?utf-8?Q?Jeremy=20Munson?=
subject: This is How we Fix the Recession
disclaimer_text: paid for by those destroying our country
body:
We got into this mess by electing Big-Spenders, let's get out of it by electing a Proven Fiscal Conservative. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jeremymunson/breaking-i-am-running-for-congress-in-minnesotas-1st-district-9054193?e=f4c2e54596)
---
[](https://JeremyMunson.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed4007ca3497aee312b2b63d0&id=e52557e9be&e=f4c2e54596)
Peter,Tuesday’s election will have a low voter turnout. Only 8% of all registered voters cast a ballot in the last election. This one is expected to be even lower and that absolutely frightens the establishment.Polls are open 10 AM to 3 PM TODAY at your [county’s election office](https://JeremyMunson.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed4007ca3497aee312b2b63d0&id=0d30419b0c&e=f4c2e54596). Two Anti-Trump Super PACs are out in full force to support my opponent. They spent millions of dollars to buy the last election plastering Trump’s image on two dozen mailers and TV ads and have now pivoted away from Trump as their candidate trash’s Trump’s border policies.We don’t need another Liz Cheney in Congress. We need someone who will fight for the hardworking people of our district and not for lobbyists and special interest groups.I do not take money from lobbyists or special interest groups because I know those donations create obligations to vote for legislation which usually goes against the interests of the people who I represent. **You cannot serve two masters.** When it comes time to take those hard votes that will end this recession, **you know I will vote to save taxpayer dollars**. Big-Spending Brad, he has always fallen on the side of spending your money - why would he stop now?The [Congressional Approval Rating](https://JeremyMunson.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed4007ca3497aee312b2b63d0&id=b4268e7a76&e=f4c2e54596) is now at 16%. Over 80% of Americans are disgusted with Congress for not representing the will of the people, yet we continue to elect and re-elect swamp creatures who are bought and paid for by those destroying our country.Your $6 gas, $100 more at the grocery store, and this crippling recession are all brought on by big spending politicians more beholden to lobbyists than your family.**This election has evolved into “The Swamp vs. The People”** and it will take a real grassroots effort to fight back. **I need your vote, and to bring a few family members, friends, neighbors, or co-workers with you.** I have not waivered in my fight for The People while representing you in St Paul. This has, at times, caused me to [call out people in my own party for being employed by lobbying firms](https://JeremyMunson.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed4007ca3497aee312b2b63d0&id=370c3dbb6b&e=f4c2e54596) or other unethical behaviors.Establishment politicians with weak voting records have endorsed my opponent. In contrast, I received the endorsement of conservative Senators Rand Paul and Ted Cruz and patriots Congressmen Jim Jordan, Scott Perry, and Thomas Massie. They endorsed my campaign and are excited to fight alongside me for We the People.
Vote early TODAY or MONDAY at your county elections office or on TUESDAY at your local polling station.Vote MUNSON for REAL change in Washington!
Jeremy Munson
Candidate for Congress
Personal cell: (507) 200-8448
|
---

body:

**OUR TRIPLE-IMPACT MATCH IS NOW ACTIVE, SO YOUR GIFT WILL GO 3X AS FAR TO DEFEND OUR SENATE MAJORITY!**
**[Pitch in $5 now _(becomes $15)_ to save President Biden's Senate majority, defeat anti-choice Republicans, and defend these Democrats who stood against Trump's far-right judges >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/8688?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20220806-BreakingNews-BidenDemsSlateRoeRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220806-BreakingNews-BidenDemsSlateRoeRF-Pros-sl1&akid=5639%2E9716520%2EXPTiIy)**

He doesn't want Georgians to know that, though. He wants voters to believe he is a moderate senator who votes with Georgia.

**He's not, and his voting record proves it.[The more people know about our opponent and his record, the less inclined they are to vote for him.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=36613fa5403f478cb4edc70414293e9c&_e=ytybf8wJwhcWYV6BNA3gweNLDVotmjO3OopmJZ5UsV8MSPkvBf-eTHKbwCJCJE8y5yM8QvRRRCjyX2cMfrU4JOeBU_HztQ5Hbu6eIoFVkQ5pt0HU5xJalaARe3ZA4J8ZTJw1Rthq9ChF8ELECEjHJ7ZpK3khW-1E0EVFlPkX2iG2QceT0W-ALkYEisYL1pQEYtt0kpUtCzKO1eq_qtkgOmnR35XzQWY3g8JIoqFCp3b_sMABGM0es46Nwr622h-be9TrSY6yFt2jF_OLCiZIv7IzZxbb0UXZOOpNZ-LbEjuMblYUYJ0gmd3eH4O8ZG0pcWmviXrgDgahYrNirJNkfGXmFitDfr_HhpQsi38SIVqnkkt6BWP0sUhx4GH3__KyVkdbWNrTAUn9CoS9hS1UUGjzSsPjjCkbAK80aB5CxtZDkwi3MDT5PRN7COhlLMxIUokq7OtzM3cuUInDXGrbJtZ-zPgjnfIF2-kmxFRF1kM%3D)**

Dear friend,
After hearing the Supreme Court’s decision to overturn _Roe v. Wade,_ the very first thing I did — maybe like some of you — was call my mom.
My mom taught me from a young age that my voice _matters_. She raised me to stand up and speak out when I witnessed injustice around me, and she raised me to fight not with anger, but with love. And in a moment of overwhelming fear and anger and sadness, her words brought me strength.
I know that, like me, many of you are looking to my mom for our next steps in the coming months. **That fills me with hope for our future, because there is _no_ better leader in this fight than Patty Pansing Brooks.**
My mom has stood on the floor of the Nebraska Legislature late into the night battling horrible bans on our reproductive health care. She has worked directly alongside Planned Parenthood to keep safe, legal abortion in Nebraska. And my mom has made a promise to our district that she will continue fighting with _everything_ she has to protect our reproductive rights.
**Friend, if you know my mom, you know she’s _never_ broken a promise.**
Our current congressman has already voted to **strip our bodily autonomy** and **restrict our access to necessary health care like birth control.** But this November, our district has the opportunity to fight back by electing a leader who has advocated at the frontlines for our reproductive rights since the beginning of her career.

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Sign on to support the Inflation Reduction Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
The next few weeks will be critical to pass President Biden’s agenda.
#
Peter,
Democrats in the Senate recently announced a big piece of legislation that will make historic investments in clean energy, lower prescription drug costs, tax the rich and corporations, and much more.
It’s called the Inflation Reduction Act, and it **promises to deliver on several important planks of our progressive agenda.** The bill will lower energy and health care costs. It will invest in cutting carbon emissions in a real way by 2030. It will ensure that big corporations and the wealthiest Americans are paying their fair share in taxes.
We need to build momentum to pass this bill in the House and Senate right now. [**Add your name in support of climate action, lower health care costs, and taxing the rich. It’s important that we show the people support this major piece of legislation.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/inflation-reduction-act/?source=em20220806-1488&t=1&akid=1488%2E420207%2EL9oVEC)
**[Add your name](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/inflation-reduction-act/?source=em20220806-1488&t=2&akid=1488%2E420207%2EL9oVEC)**
The leadership of the Congressional Progressive Caucus was integral in securing these policies for the people in the Inflation Reduction Act:
* **Taking on climate change in an urgent way,** including investing $369 billion in clean energy and climate action, and cutting carbon emissions by 40% by 2030.
* **Empowering Medicare to negotiate prescription drug prices,** which will immediately lower prescription costs.
* **Taxing the wealthiest Americans and biggest corporations** by increasing corporate and income tax rates, and investing in the IRS to ensure taxes are paid.
* **Lowering Affordable Care Act premiums for millions** by increasing subsidies to Americans most in need, building on what we did in the American Rescue Plan.

These will be huge wins for the people, but we must ensure that the bill passes the House and Senate. Let’s deliver these wins for the people, Peter.
[**Add your name in support of passing the Inflation Reduction Act and building on our progressive victories »**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/inflation-reduction-act/?source=em20220806-1488&t=3&akid=1488%2E420207%2EL9oVEC)
**[Add your name](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/inflation-reduction-act/?source=em20220806-1488&t=4&akid=1488%2E420207%2EL9oVEC)**
Thank you for fighting alongside me for transformative change, Peter.
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220806-1488-footer&t=5&refcode2=1488_420207_L9oVEC&akid=1488%2E420207%2EL9oVEC)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=6&akid=1488%2E420207%2EL9oVEC)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=1488%2E420207%2EL9oVEC)
