name: Val Demings (personal)
subject: Friend, that's me you're looking at
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I will never tire in the work to make sure the greatness of America is accessible and affordable for all Americans
what I carry deep in my soul to this day
| | |
---
Friend,

That's me you're looking at.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48883638/359950209/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3953-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzNhZTM4YS1jNjE1LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qJXiOgheVY1aKM0WcK5y_AWeUfsKFjY1IB-AEizYzzE=)I grew up poor in the segregated South, the daughter of a maid and a janitor. If you had told me back then, as a young Black girl, that I would become the first in my family to graduate college, the first woman to lead the Orlando Police Department, a congresswoman and a candidate for the U.S. Senate, well – I just don't know if I would have believed you. What I _did_ believe then – and what I carry deep in my soul to this day – is the lesson from my hardworking parents to "never tire of doing good."
It was my parents' words that inspired me to get into public service. It was their words that have driven me to do good every chance I get. From my time as a young social worker to my career as a law enforcement officer to my work representing my community in Congress – "never tire" is a mantra that I've held dear.
My unlikely story of opportunity is proof of what is possible and what should be possible for every American. **As Florida's next U.S. senator, I will _never tire_ in the work to make sure the greatness of America is accessible and affordable for all Americans. **I will _never tire_ in continuing to do more good for you and your family.
But when it comes to this race, the GOP won't tire either: The Republican National Committee chair already attacked me personally, while Mitch McConnell and GOP outside groups are dumping MILLIONS into Florida to defeat me.”

This is already shaping up to be the most expensive Senate election _ever –_ and with Florida's last Senate race being decided by a narrow 0.12% margin, every dollar we raise will count tremendously. **I know a thing or two about winning tough races, but I need your help because I can't do this alone.**
**[I'm depending on your grassroots support to power this historic campaign and help me fight back against the GOP's attacks – and right now, I'm falling short of my midnight goal. Can you make a $5 donation today to help make sure I have the resources to defeat Marco Rubio and protect and expand Democratic Senate control?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48883639/359950210/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3953-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzNhZTM4YS1jNjE1LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qJXiOgheVY1aKM0WcK5y_AWeUfsKFjY1IB-AEizYzzE=)**
Thank you so much for sharing this journey with me. It means the world to have you by my side.

Val Demings
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48883640/359950211/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3953-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzNhZTM4YS1jNjE1LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qJXiOgheVY1aKM0WcK5y_AWeUfsKFjY1IB-AEizYzzE=)

clean_body: I will never tire in the work to make sure the greatness of America is accessible and affordable for all Americans what I carry deep in my soul to this day | | | Friend, That's me you're looking at. grew up poor in the segregated South, the daughter of a maid and a janitor. If you had told me back then, as a young Black girl, that I would become the first in my family to graduate college, the first woman to lead the Orlando Police Department, a congresswoman and a candidate for the U.S. Senate, well – I just don't know if I would have believed you. What I did believe then – and what I carry deep in my soul to this day – is the lesson from my hardworking parents to "never tire of doing good." It was my parents' words that inspired me to get into public service. It was their words that have driven me to do good every chance I get. From my time as a young social worker to my career as a law enforcement officer to my work representing my community in Congress – "never tire" is a mantra that I've held dear. My unlikely story of opportunity is proof of what is possible and what should be possible for every American. As Florida's next U.S. senator, I will never tire in the work to make sure the greatness of America is accessible and affordable for all Americans. I will never tire in continuing to do more good for you and your family. But when it comes to this race, the GOP won't tire either: The Republican National Committee chair already attacked me personally, while Mitch McConnell and GOP outside groups are dumping MILLIONS into Florida to defeat me.” This is already shaping up to be the most expensive Senate election ever – and with Florida's last Senate race being decided by a narrow 0.12% margin, every dollar we raise will count tremendously. I know a thing or two about winning tough races, but I need your help because I can't do this alone. = Thank you so much for sharing this journey with me. It means the world to have you by my side. Val Demings | | = | | Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you’re critical to this grassroots campaign. To make sure you’re the first to get important updates, or text “JOIN” to 77076 to receive text updates. & . I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. So, please consider =. You can also click here to or click here to . Val Demings for U.S. Senate P. O. Box 536926 Orlando, FL 32853 United States Paid for by Val Demings for U.S. Senate

We need a lot of folks on board to send a strong message, so will you add your name now? | | | **Hey Peter, it’s Alessandra Biaggi. Let me introduce myself a bit:** I’ve been a proud Working Families Party candidate since 2018, when I defeated a corporate, GOP-aligned Democrat for the New York State Senate. Now, I’m running for Congress to help build a Working Families Majority and unseat another corporate Democrat and DCCC Chair, Sean Patrick Maloney. Just last week, we found out some pretty shocking news: Under Maloney’s leadership, the DCCC has spent nearly half a million dollars to prop up an extreme, Trump-aligned Republican congressional candidate, who won by a small margin in Michigan this week. **[Peter, this isn’t just a dangerous game that corporate Democrats are playing — it’s a massive waste of valuable Democratic resources and a violation of grassroots supporters’ trust. That’s why I’m teaming up with my friends at the Working Families Party to demand that Sean Patrick Maloney immediately put a stop to the DCCC’s funding of far-right and anti-abortion candidates. Will you add your name now?](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXdJUvH8Ygu3R43gD0WUPlZ7Yl-PXXQPMqy-j9GzfFX3wQbmBkyxnU-JYK3WU0d0WJepUD9WJrT1hdMuNRZnc8EGQ1SP36ZENQtJy_dL8dTwYQoCos_AH54Gwh655JcHXQr_8d-jQc09dHHi2xVgMggmiMdg-ftAVaR4rwLBRUsP3xVntbGDLRbeu7L37LA0pWPyOH3uf1hsweIR0mLdKVfp2e8YTq--qJVqGNM9ihwUlQ8SI9vjeIXSdsgq3M9BKLGa9wrY6sUhuyDGk_uX4RhOQ-E5c9THK-J0qRGZb1bcD2IU5_tRTGycjAqKaEPwFV5v5y5Xs3ltGPO7c1mFiokUCAm1D-XaMEQ5-AadnKs6I/3od/2fEJIpADS8exFwWqYb2BiQ/h0/MXvJKn7QEkXdMhuI95w7J5CnUVrymtNISUhs-I77JnM)** **[Add Your Name »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXdJUvH8Ygu3R43gD0WUPlZ7Yl-PXXQPMqy-j9GzfFX3wQbmBkyxnU-JYK3WU0d0WJepUD9WJrT1hdMuNRZnc8EGQ1SP36ZENQtJy_dL8dTwYQoCos_AH54Gwh655JcHXQr_8d-jQc09dHHi2xVgMggmiMdg-ftAVaR4rwLBRUsP3xVntbGDLRbeu7L37LA0pWHeODwihnmU_kRqBg0OB7Wz3Zmq-q3n-peLr9n8Fu6-FIHW1ulBbb7L-qOTtddxhbjfdD5sc_9x7IOs-hY1nLldm1GWz9GhPYK4IZFhCXIGT1mXq2S5cC0rT0B9Ms-uFmriMt0EbwVz5yPErvtJThXFHz5UifrTIySu11ffuBBR4/3od/2fEJIpADS8exFwWqYb2BiQ/h1/UO7Ul-U4QvAqdvgbxV83MTKdGXt0Hh9F-A0vsE4LQ5Y)** After _Roe_ fell, the DCCC sent out fundraising emails asking their supporters to chip in and help ‘defeat EVERY anti-choice Republican.’ During that time thousands of Americans full of hurt and anger donated to the DCCC — and what did they get in return? **Their donations have been used to help elect anti-choice, pro-Trump candidates in Republican primaries.** We’ve seen that when we put the time and resources into building powerful coalitions around strong Democratic candidates, we can win — even in races others may view as a long shot. It’s something I know from personal experience. When I first ran for the State Senate in New York, I was taking on a powerful incumbent — a corporate Democrat who had forged an alliance with Republicans for years and who had no trouble massively outspending our campaign. It was because of the support of the Working Families Party and the grassroots campaign we built together that we were able to deliver a huge win for our progressive movement. **[There’s no reason that Democratic leaders should be wasting our time and money on far-right candidates who have no place in Congress. If you agree, will you join me in calling on Sean Patrick Maloney to stop spending grassroots donations on right-wing extremists?](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXdJUvH8Ygu3R43gD0WUPlZ7Yl-PXXQPMqy-j9GzfFX3wQbmBkyxnU-JYK3WU0d0WJepUD9WJrT1hdMuNRZnc8EGQ1SP36ZENQtJy_dL8dTwYQoCos_AH54Gwh655JcHXQr_8d-jQc09dHHi2xVgMggmiMdg-ftAVaR4rwLBRUsP3xVntbGDLRbeu7L37LA0pWC646axhfgyWCaFVI5_lokRUyzm8XIp8eX5kTECRS-RF0SNl4_9o5EhsuZtKDuQq75LzSWwp-npybB3c8YLiGFGd8LJ8Ega8R-jP9wHHu-y0RfpgosglomCAbSQBVuiCKB7hYaQfNkIAaX9nleiid97V35J9zObJC4TbT4eepsxg/3od/2fEJIpADS8exFwWqYb2BiQ/h2/rbeN6V6D0K-uE37PJdPxPwgDoyVcXnih3zaIXjoq9XE)** We’ve seen that when we put the time and resources into building powerful coalitions around strong Democratic candidates, we can win — even in races others may view as a long shot. It’s something I know from personal experience. When I first ran for the State Senate in New York, I was taking on a powerful incumbent — a corporate Democrat who had forged an alliance with Republicans for years and who had no trouble massively outspending our campaign. It was because of the support of the Working Families Party and the grassroots campaign we built together that we were able to deliver a huge win for our progressive movement. With gratitude, Alessandra Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . name: Xan Aird
subject: Come out with Carlina!
body:
Hello all!

I'm writing to let you know that there are *only seven days left* until
voting begins. We're leading in the polls and building momentum on the
ground but we have to finish strong.

Tomorrow, Sunday August 7, we'll be holding our *Lower East Side Day of
Action* from 3:00 - 5:00pm. We'll be knocking doors and handing out
literature alongside Carlina herself!

Please let me know if you'd like to join. We really do need all the help we
can get in order to send Carlina to Congress!

Thank you for your support,

Xan

--
Xan Aird
Deputy Field Director
617.794.9398

[image: 8:7 LES Canvass.png]

We're leading in the polls and building momentum on the ground but we have to finish strong. Tomorrow, Sunday August 7, we'll be holding our Lower East Side Day of Action from 3:00 - 5:00pm. We'll be knocking doors and handing out literature alongside Carlina herself! Please let me know if you'd like to join. We really do need all the help we can get in order to send Carlina to Congress! Thank you for your support, Xan -- Xan Aird Deputy Field Director 617.794.9398 [image: 8:7 LES Canvass.png]

body:
The 47th birthday of Wisconsin’s soon-to-be 47th governor!
| [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=fe89b1318ebf4a15871cae40d01a29a1&_m=38e5468d06754a9795d4e5890c72b040&_e=TNsEGQgC04O-1302cEKi7BSQgT8tV2LrYBLU7xCLwF5-0wrmHkzq1vO_0LiA4HbLtCTZ_yHiLqPVFAsC6vya0_d80dq1Az-l9jV9IxQDYrW0K-h-w2oNKodC8nAK7ZlWJzjBG7RyrmGdwlzpEQ8_OraUO1W78L8gbo_EIi5139NgGPeINxwL0NZIjgYCQoqnhjWBozKnzHpUbzm93vXVXYORtwrnHjZjf3Nfnq7PlJgzib172eaAcAXOSZor-6hPZ-3UHDqc7XkywnsPhoxrHHQs7XcK-7nwfOW6LDrI-PRArEdkknyjKo3H9RObrwuGSryAm0bMYRQ31pc0nVSQox0JPBLESVCmDT9Uj8vcrU-HTvk-EioFZAL10ocVyVuvONwfKtxxNPEaU6Gt6huaUmEFed94zyqfQgmMpWpRivDPBSkQT7J3zJHwmJ6YupdG6lhmx_dj3p6N7oDbLX45Lyo5fAzCqWFWj1nNokLE_1hTpOlk1EZ3LWUxy8V-5pojja78slztTOqeq-YrtYi1iA%3D%3D)

Friend,
---
It’s not every year your wife’s birthday falls just _48 hours_ before her election...
---
That’s why this year, our two daughters and I wanted to do something extra special for Rebecca’s **_47th_** birthday to show her just how many Wisconsinites are pulling for her to be our** _47th_** governor.
---
I know Rebecca better than anyone – and I know thousands of her supporters signing her birthday card with just days left in the primary would truly mean the world to her.
---
_I couldn’t possibly imagine handing her this card tomorrow without YOUR name on it,Friend._
---

body:
Support the Candidates, Ballot Referendum, and More!
| | | |
---
| August 4, 2022
Calling all Diehl-Allen Volunteers! Please give some time this weekend for the following:
YANKEE HOMECOMING PARADE: Sunday, August 7th, Newburyport, MA 11 AM
RSVP that you can join us: [Geoff and Leah Walk in Yankee Homecoming Parade | Facebook](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001uILDuCobRctnELtQXAIs95A3r5wQUmvPJ3rakRrmWk6oAssmVj9nibDfrQgZtu2_vCMRPNhRbs1Sbfd_g25xuosaG58adnMrCDaqfJxYuuq2QGpUVTfPPtT1GSRLVwXFovmh8AMHYj3RQF0WwB1pz21Qsi_OWfabpQvw3RXtr8HQ2QVyOmvV8Q==&c=SqJ2WneyyIa-Zb6m1LdE_nIE75ObRvhNQRbd09VvCm_mdhkdw5-BLQ==&ch=Vmjz2uEd3Q0dOIPBmPuqmBh_spjwBI3OYBGy8b77u-Vw7LBp1O3VYw==)
Contacts: Annette@GeoffDiehl.com, Bridget@Geoffdiehl.com
SIGN STANDOUTS AND LAWN SIGNS:
Join in one of the following standouts:
Diehl-Allen Stand-out at Hanson Town Hall, 542 Liberty St, Hanson on Friday August 5th from 4pm until 5pm. Signs will be provided & others are welcome to join in.
Diehl-Allen Stand-out at Saugus Town Hall, 298 Central St, Saugus on Friday August 5th from 4:30pm until 5:30pm. Signs will be provided & others are welcome to join in.
Diehl-Allen Banner Hang at Rt. 3 South Overpass at Middle Street, Weymouth on Saturday August 6th from 10am - 11am. Others are welcome to join in!
Diehl-Allen Stand-out at Rte 128 Overpass at Centennial Drive, Peabody on Saturday August 6th from 4pm until 5pm. Parking is available on the overpass. Signs will be provided & others are welcome to join in.

Lawn Signs are Going Fast! If you want one or more for your home, please register your address here: [Need A Lawn Sign? - Geoff Diehl For Governor](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001uILDuCobRctnELtQXAIs95A3r5wQUmvPJ3rakRrmWk6oAssmVj9niW_ADOh4sQvaQQ3pJRFbxoPpllWaXJ4qns6HfndCMcMdtaCBm0zqHFT4ypKdjsEcdgFM28txAYTkPtK2XQrA7n_vEh4WpKnk1Hsd8EPR_wpdbXSnCDFwhaQRGLAWYd4vZQ==&c=SqJ2WneyyIa-Zb6m1LdE_nIE75ObRvhNQRbd09VvCm_mdhkdw5-BLQ==&ch=Vmjz2uEd3Q0dOIPBmPuqmBh_spjwBI3OYBGy8b77u-Vw7LBp1O3VYw==)

subject: Ohio is key
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaptur for Congress
body:
Up and down the ballot, every race in Ohio has massive implications for our rights.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48883943/359951758/812264984?refcode=EM_FR_220805OhioisKey_N_K4C_90DO_7_NG_N_TESTB_logo_&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGY1MjVkZi1jYTE1LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6fne6rK3oVNa6k8G_DgT5sH92rXzDk16gyrOxbxPCdE=) When it comes to the November elections, all roads lead to Ohio. From the very top of the ticket in our Senate race, all the way down to local elections, Republicans are looking for a red wave to sweep through the state. They don’t want to just win these elections; **they want to solidify their harmful GOP agenda for years to come.** We know we tell you over and over again how important these midterm elections are. But can you imagine the implications of full-blown Republican rule? Our voting rights, workers' rights, and everything in between could be on the chopping block. It would set our state back for generations. [**_When we mobilize voters to the polls for Marcy, we are also mobilizing voters who will make sure Democrats win up and down the ballot. We need to start right now, building out our ground game to make sure we have the infrastructure necessary to make sure every Democratic candidate wins. Can you pitch in $5 to make Democratic history in Ohio?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48883944/359951759/812264984?refcode=EM_FR_220805OhioisKey_N_K4C_90DO_7_NG_N_TESTB_l1_&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGY1MjVkZi1jYTE1LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6fne6rK3oVNa6k8G_DgT5sH92rXzDk16gyrOxbxPCdE=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$5 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48883945/359951760/812264984?refcode=EM_FR_220805OhioisKey_N_K4C_90DO_7_NG_N_TESTB_EL5_&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode2=EL5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGY1MjVkZi1jYTE1LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6fne6rK3oVNa6k8G_DgT5sH92rXzDk16gyrOxbxPCdE=)**

Marcy Kaptur isn’t the only incredible Democrat on the ticket this November. Her colleague, Tim Ryan, is taking on extremist JD Vance in the hopes of expanding our Democratic control in the U.S. Senate. And Nan Whaley, the current Mayor of Dayton, is running to flip Ohio **_blue_** and bring change to the Governor’s Mansion.
The number of Democratic voters we get to the polls will determine whether the GOP can maintain a red Ohio or if we have what it takes to hold back their extremist onslaught.
[**_This is a team effort, and our ground game could be the deciding factor in races up and down the ballot right here in Ohio. We need to make sure we’re all pulling our weight, and that starts with getting a lead on our August fundraising goals. We want to raise $500 by midnight tonight to show Democrats everywhere we’re committed to turning Ohio blue. Can you spare $5?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48883951/359951767/812264984?refcode=EM_FR_220805OhioisKey_N_K4C_90DO_7_NG_N_TESTB_l2_&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGY1MjVkZi1jYTE1LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6fne6rK3oVNa6k8G_DgT5sH92rXzDk16gyrOxbxPCdE=)

clean_body: Up and down the ballot, every race in Ohio has massive implications for our rights. = When it comes to the November elections, all roads lead to Ohio. From the very top of the ticket in our Senate race, all the way down to local elections, Republicans are looking for a red wave to sweep through the state. They don’t want to just win these elections; they want to solidify their harmful GOP agenda for years to come. We know we tell you over and over again how important these midterm elections are. But can you imagine the implications of full-blown Republican rule? Our voting rights, workers' rights, and everything in between could be on the chopping block. It would set our state back for generations. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = Marcy Kaptur isn’t the only incredible Democrat on the ticket this November. Her colleague, Tim Ryan, is taking on extremist JD Vance in the hopes of expanding our Democratic control in the U.S. Senate. And Nan Whaley, the current Mayor of Dayton, is running to flip Ohio blue and bring change to the Governor’s Mansion. The number of Democratic voters we get to the polls will determine whether the GOP can maintain a red Ohio or if we have what it takes to hold back their extremist onslaught. = = In this together, Kaptur for Congress Congresswoman Marcy Kaptur is a champion for the Midwest in Congress. body:

Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family. [**Would you be willing to share your thoughts in this brief 8 question survey?**](http://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fd745ffa44644f71ae55fc8216ce0d88&_e=OnBzU_RQcsWFTZT-xvMEWWjRbi14vRq6Fb3W37_Ivxfps8X2e0P5522JGRk7iI4X3kjbT5Pxkm62uftucUOOFnGW4lZlGuHuWVNtQEyMDqcHsQ8mgdR79mgtZ9dwLNKB9abfTk1km30TvKrv3yOhjEFG7OCyVrcLeEOe7Y8RW6KNc5c1sMU00nL94MwnhrxASYMDukrMNKwa1b92aqx3ULlFTOXp9ItTO2vq8vE9wFftYbCZF8LvxfDE7cTJOiWF0g_QzOBUqnX7rQ9Tpseu6E1mNAFzgEitL7U2J8-CT_3sn4aNYFSbWsbJZZFRZAUxjiU38NzbPGiBQK3xivjGrEoiYS8Yvk_f5isHrHggfFDCsyEdiQ7tHB7h_kDMH4djYRxpZhgDMTddbLc9ofrWasqDBjMLw63oWzlceF7LhiYd07QnzhEy_5vnu3g73c3Z) By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think—and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. **You can get started right now using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/energy-independence-survey/](http://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fd745ffa44644f71ae55fc8216ce0d88&_e=OnBzU_RQcsWFTZT-xvMEWWjRbi14vRq6Fb3W37_Ivxfps8X2e0P5522JGRk7iI4X3kjbT5Pxkm62uftucUOOFnGW4lZlGuHuWVNtQEyMDqcHsQ8mgdR79mgtZ9dwLNKB9abfTk1km30TvKrv3yOhjEFG7OCyVrcLeEOe7Y8RW6KNc5c1sMU00nL94MwnhrxASYMDukrMNKwa1b92aqx3ULlFTOXp9ItTO2vq8vE9wFeBR0PzS2fW7D_F8fTN6ol_ORt49LgENtkygRzq4qvRlzaFB4gprvKkFngewIcWJDC_mJjQ8QH6Xw2m55KtBmuRZ86vkT3vA5_6bh5JbuCxeWakvuhtN5o5bqElRxhfnyHYJC60_jTE12L3P2Fca5C6wTHcWxntkmUZLY33pf_Tw-s0jci1rqN42zG_xTBIS9OHmdWW5GS4Z044N47_Mruh)** Thank you so much for your time. And I could be one of them, Peter!

As a proud Black Hispanic man, let alone being a Republican _(because you know we’re usually labeled as Democrats)_ , [**I never thought that my American Dream of running for Congress would come true.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=f43990b08bc449fbb6e8c1fed677fef0&_e=c0uJ6UW-dd5iQ2DqTzVhyZsBjsajyuVAGjqHxA54F8PmREaMSfHJDKBAaP_ro_R3HYI1ZebTd5dPggyCjNkz-H8fO31PG3WcHt5Nd3npURXinfHVeGgBXmVbR4uDowqNlgmLlsGGMCoMfNJFDt9Mw8vuUgfZVN00imvpp3u4BeUcgbgNpQSY5moJXSdiV2bqclmSEuNB9LLseLpfsYJjW780pkh2e7e-CeTR3yzqP8TgPSV6XbCnsnDqfuMA0HcDM8SnCf9n7SsNskF6BQ4aB_xVPifrEtbZVXT-2byD2KlnIHHFdvsufxqouEhRRH3n8fJQtrZFhrX7w3qDsPUnJTEyKX_qSoQTRsRj8eQ09bRiofhOuVQbytg8Qg3gRI-0Fx8CxQ9OMgMwJRgI9rZfdusKq32JFx1fX09CLC8Vpy7O89pPj7JermeeshF6BD76wshbdVRvQ4vFR6vWDuaPBa3mK3myNXnusHi2oh3bd8AQd_PKiwuwuOYt993LSt9P)

**Being a first-generation conservative Afro-Latino American is not all that easy** - you always have critics and people who refuse to be in your corner. ** But I will never let those people stop me from representing our citizens for the greater good; my mother taught me better than that.**

I know that as a congressman, you should always be there for the people and never get caught up in the spotlight. Some politicians these days are more untouchable than A-list celebrities,** which is just wrong. We are supposed to serve the people and create laws based on their needs, not hide behind bodyguards.**

[**I know that I can make real change for the people of this country**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=f43990b08bc449fbb6e8c1fed677fef0&_e=c0uJ6UW-dd5iQ2DqTzVhyZsBjsajyuVAGjqHxA54F8PmREaMSfHJDKBAaP_ro_R3HYI1ZebTd5dPggyCjNkz-H8fO31PG3WcHt5Nd3npURXinfHVeGgBXmVbR4uDowqNlgmLlsGGMCoMfNJFDt9Mw8vuUgfZVN00imvpp3u4BeUcgbgNpQSY5moJXSdiV2bqclmSEuNB9LLseLpfsYJjW780pkh2e7e-CeTR3yzqP8TgPSV6XbCnsnDqfuMA0HcDM8SnCf9n7SsNskF6BQ4aB_xVPifrEtbZVXT-2byD2KmoeeE2V_Yq-AZv7YciNh7-bvfk-ccAYME5cN0Kl5-EXcsewwQDIplly3dguvdSLVySqEFWx5LSHu45mwYjOOG3Vl0tlnS-Zx99_Ypc7CP_p-CseB3xAJt8GMOtOBw55cyHd4rx9oib0y-QJ9sokmdTHt0ROpAokAKjjZCHMdUKIq8z3xXCYRbI5KkerJ7EP6rQU1vxqx7alCLANYSlv-kt) - and what better way to start than running for the United States Congress!

[**TAKE A CHANCE ON ME ››**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=f43990b08bc449fbb6e8c1fed677fef0&_e=c0uJ6UW-dd5iQ2DqTzVhyZsBjsajyuVAGjqHxA54F8PmREaMSfHJDKBAaP_ro_R3HYI1ZebTd5dPggyCjNkz-H8fO31PG3WcHt5Nd3npURXinfHVeGgBXmVbR4uDowqNlgmLlsGGMCoMfNJFDt9Mw8vuUgfZVN00imvpp3u4BeUcgbgNpQSY5moJXSdiV2bqclmSEuNB9LLseLpfsYJjW780pkh2e7e-CeTR3yzqP8TgPSV6XbCnsnDqfuMA0HcDM8SnCf9n7SsNskF6BQ4aB_xVPifrEtbZVXT-2byD2KnumQCdD3y16G3_XK2CtVlLxr-JhGcOIU6yHWQdWjFveMoIS3ttNlgxwPzKSaiiZOVdog64yvg_HVEp-L1YUr1rRtssee39Q-kKkEdo50ROg7-MPjrPOBAR4TRRBTKM_NSUxmFcWzIoxwLmP00X29W4dYW-g59r6tnx5ZzIm87PRrP9Mm9Mc2YLD1fbC0F0Fg1vZG0HgObvtPr4RMMdGlkj)
---

When being a first-generation American, there’s this sort of pressure that you must strive to be the best because our family has the chance to live in the land of opportunity and freedom.

**Well, Peter, I am dang sure I will be my best.** The Pelosi Democrats are slowly but surely chipping away at our freedoms, and it _pains me to live in a country where my children and future grandchildren won’t have the same opportunities as you and me._

**My family means everything to me** - they’ve made me who I am. So I must ensure that I leave this country better than it is today. One with no economic downfall, where they feel safe to walk down the street and have confidence in our nation, **just as I’m sure you want for your family - I fully understand.**

[**So please, take a chance on me and help my efforts to get America back to what it once was - the land of freedom, opportunity, and prosperity!**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=f43990b08bc449fbb6e8c1fed677fef0&_e=c0uJ6UW-dd5iQ2DqTzVhyZsBjsajyuVAGjqHxA54F8PmREaMSfHJDKBAaP_ro_R3HYI1ZebTd5dPggyCjNkz-H8fO31PG3WcHt5Nd3npURXinfHVeGgBXmVbR4uDowqNlgmLlsGGMCoMfNJFDt9Mw8vuUgfZVN00imvpp3u4BeUcgbgNpQSY5moJXSdiV2bqclmSEuNB9LLseLpfsYJjW780pkh2e7e-CeTR3yzqP8TgPSV6XbCnsnDqfuMA0HcDM8SnCf9n7SsNskF6BQ4aB_xVPifrEtbZVXT-2byD2Kkr7fnTTnBV1OFmlAHs8GC5fY5bwdx8tQSJ_sNUXVKUAVs0CwWglb9qc7899E-BMRIXr3O4lYywbsu_4dS_kA7cPcfKK_IucFX7V_OiLD1WtLlKMy4CRgmZfXdAU5KCI_1ovpsx3kIPOl7j1NL4myQrQbYcl8dgI6QbX6ycuSgKe9m3zlWZ9x4uSW6C3DnakyqWOQDM2Xe8xRIQ0kkthmm2)

clean_body: Some politicians these days are more untouchable than A-list celebrities, which is just wrong. | And I could be one of them, Peter! As a proud Black Hispanic man, let alone being a Republican (because you know we’re usually labeled as Democrats) , | Being a first-generation conservative Afro-Latino American is not all that easy - you always have critics and people who refuse to be in your corner. But I will never let those people stop me from representing our citizens for the greater good; my mother taught me better than that. I know that as a congressman, you should always be there for the people and never get caught up in the spotlight. Some politicians these days are more untouchable than A-list celebrities, which is just wrong. We are supposed to serve the people and create laws based on their needs, not hide behind bodyguards. - and what better way to start than running for the United States Congress! When being a first-generation American, there’s this sort of pressure that you must strive to be the best because our family has the chance to live in the land of opportunity and freedom. Well, Peter, I am dang sure I will be my best. The Pelosi Democrats are slowly but surely chipping away at our freedoms, and it pains me to live in a country where my children and future grandchildren won’t have the same opportunities as you and me. My family means everything to me - they’ve made me who I am. So I must ensure that I leave this country better than it is today. One with no economic downfall, where they feel safe to walk down the street and have confidence in our nation, just as I’m sure you want for your family - I fully understand. | | | | | I look forward to being victorious with your help; Sincerely, George S. subject: Will you join me?
body:
**[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9e2867e1fc124d9baf177ce83059f77d&_e=M2NWlo1Vy40KdgZce9Rtkaa5QBE4GDh1h_sx-K_4nkTIHDglMnQzuyux2_Qgdboig-AUzxY-1DlGX8cKnnc0oZx0uNoAQJ7VMRb4cSC3AxraKxP_BVseYtnv3R_IhoMA2NwGRPU_POKTN9fX_30GtqzkZjOTy7brOQMeHEYFD7hG8TDY5cshgQEaRsqR0-jGR4Li26rRfU-EtqfLcqgXs0nIhrp_oxCv8T5YkjSitzSyQ-e9v3JlOH8ofIUT_fiiY169X6EZlSbq-XAwYNfEBzqPmQPNnDhbcQ-tjUVjObEMhNXlacuZi0emeIB4QGEZxlW0l_TBwKAltHxme3VHOMPPvrNLCZXtk35CEUJWCKNG8GE5JOGLLBIGIPhJz-rI95iwB9Mp11Mt-14p9TKjeT4-X8NtnrXnPnRM0O0jF9w%3D)**

Friend,
Since being elected Governor of Florida,**I have become the #1 defender of freedom.** The Left knows this, and they HATE it.

Friend, being the #1 defender of freedom has made me the #1 target of the Left.

But I wouldn't change a thing.

Every day, I go to work with Florida families in mind. I fight to **keep our communities safe** , to **keep our economy thriving** , and to **keep our beautiful Florida environment preserved** so generations to come can enjoy all our state has to offer.

__**[Donate now to help me continue the fight>>>](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9e2867e1fc124d9baf177ce83059f77d&_e=M2NWlo1Vy40KdgZce9Rtkaa5QBE4GDh1h_sx-K_4nkTIHDglMnQzuyux2_Qgdboig-AUzxY-1DlGX8cKnnc0oZx0uNoAQJ7VMRb4cSC3AxraKxP_BVseYtnv3R_IhoMA2NwGRPU_POKTN9fX_30GtqzkZjOTy7brOQMeHEYFD7hG8TDY5cshgQEaRsqR0-jGCSEWHGvf0-FleM3UQD-85lt2MGA5fLndZKm2ZY8HttTMyXM7y74VFkhwX2pISuobrZmPVI_3craMUAj1T4UZy4974zgANs74vwrnUB6zmcK0E1ig8jD8_GrgkIkKWb0J7X4BF5MD29BCmR2sSdInZS61J0s9L0AY52jglPhSLqAiZAKwnWrFJggI-_6108_IaT_GEW0ZjsfyFk5ggt3uL95VQMRpGonbEoJWLGp1qn0%3D "Donate now to help me continue the fight >>>")**__

Fighting for the future of Florida is an easy choice for me. I think about my three young kids and the future I want them each to have in our great state.

The Left sees that freedom is resonating with Floridians from all walks of life, and they are doing everything they can to defeat me in November and _turn Florida blue. _They are pouring MILLIONS of dollars into Florida and working overtime to spread lies about my administration through their smear merchant allies in the mainstream media.

They even recently spread misinformation _from the White House podium._

**I will continue to disabuse their narrative at every turn, but I can 't do it alone, Friend. **I am looking to build an army of grassroots supporters who will help me fight back against the Democrat Machine.

There is too much on the line this November to sit back. __**[I need to know: Are you with me?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9e2867e1fc124d9baf177ce83059f77d&_e=M2NWlo1Vy40KdgZce9Rtkaa5QBE4GDh1h_sx-K_4nkTIHDglMnQzuyux2_Qgdboig-AUzxY-1DlGX8cKnnc0oZx0uNoAQJ7VMRb4cSC3AxraKxP_BVseYtnv3R_IhoMA2NwGRPU_POKTN9fX_30GtqzkZjOTy7brOQMeHEYFD7hG8TDY5cshgQEaRsqR0-jG5U5pZcg5gxEqHJeTwr-5ZzNs3BBBtyv_9t6MCeRyx_v33YexebQrubNTVlLDWyWyi1sF7v5x5V5o9YTfHVZIOYf21XqK2i_BonbYmUNj6PZuoIIJyHEtVYYNyuUMUvpieVcKA-WiTxVdukEVYE3NTzkT_age_w-lhUDWQRKbfebewftKi53nFQja1ugVGmAoRqjzdh8e3aEx4V8UW3w9HAQWEejr17VJ4RkcklTJuTY%3D "I need to know: Are you with me?")**__

**[[I'M IN!]](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9e2867e1fc124d9baf177ce83059f77d&_e=M2NWlo1Vy40KdgZce9Rtkaa5QBE4GDh1h_sx-K_4nkTIHDglMnQzuyux2_Qgdboig-AUzxY-1DlGX8cKnnc0oZx0uNoAQJ7VMRb4cSC3AxraKxP_BVseYtnv3R_IhoMA2NwGRPU_POKTN9fX_30GtqzkZjOTy7brOQMeHEYFD7hG8TDY5cshgQEaRsqR0-jGjK0DpLkuuEsb17QktmnAEbWi0MYMTs8R7bErW6n6cGjudzC_Y3ej9NBuexLBWDTODdYPyd_q730_h4Ubhl9XmS4LnzNQVx5bJn7Yzge3LzrvCgYETZnV_ts1xbVQ6ExEbZos_7eLkZHp_ZBZzxRZgSQdhgdkPtNUGAijRyjcUj2ZQ26f4-ZAo3RxhbbflFTi7hWzZrydj5Rigg6TLV_MCBN8EYcVrH947h0zzBd_7DI%3D "\[I’M IN!\]")**

name: AOTL News Update
subject: A day to be remembered
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
Democracy is on the ballot and on the docket, this much is clear.
|
---

57 years ago today, President Lyndon B. Johnson signed the Voting Rights Act of 1965. One of the most impactful pieces of legislation in American history, the VRA prohibited voting discrimination on the basis of race. Finally, all Americans could exercise the fundamental right to vote.
We feel an obligation to carry on the work of the civil rights leaders who helped to pass the VRA. We constantly fight against maps that limit the influence of people of color in elections.**The VRA should be the beginning, not the end, of powerful voting rights legislation.**
If only everyone believed this.
Far-right Supreme Court justices ravaged key aspects of the VRA in _Shelby County v. Holder_ , far-right Congressmen all voted against the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act, and now voter suppression and election denial are common ideologies amongst the far-right.
**Democracy is on the ballot and on the docket, this much is clear.**
[**We’re doing everything in our power to protect and build upon the VRA. A donation you make will honor the VRA’s legacy by helping us safeguard the most fundamental American right -- the right to vote.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/48884007/359952081/-884323851?refcode=20220806_AOTL_F_VRAanniversary_actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkyMTMxMGJhLWNhMTUtZWQxMS1iZDZlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dhXAMentGG9K8En6dtnzy7I6TD9aPDedqunBs2-CC0o=)

clean_body: Democracy is on the ballot and on the docket, this much is clear. | 57 years ago today, President Lyndon B. Johnson signed the Voting Rights Act of 1965. One of the most impactful pieces of legislation in American history, the VRA prohibited voting discrimination on the basis of race. Finally, all Americans could exercise the fundamental right to vote. We feel an obligation to carry on the work of the civil rights leaders who helped to pass the VRA. We constantly fight against maps that limit the influence of people of color in elections.The VRA should be the beginning, not the end, of powerful voting rights legislation. If only everyone believed this. Far-right Supreme Court justices ravaged key aspects of the VRA in Shelby County v. Holder , far-right Congressmen all voted against the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act, and now voter suppression and election denial are common ideologies amongst the far-right. Democracy is on the ballot and on the docket, this much is clear. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = \-- AOTL News Update All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. name: Trudy Busch Valentine
subject: they're turning back the clock
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trudy Busch Valentine for Senate
body:
More than a million mothers would rejoin the workforce if child care were affordable.
| | |
---
Peter, it's wild to me that MAGA extremists are trying to ban people from obtaining an abortion while also blocking access to paid family leave and affordable child care.
Here in Missouri, where women are facing some of the most extreme abortion laws in the country, families are not guaranteed neither paid family leave nor universal pre-K. It's cruel and plain wrong for a politician to force their way into the exam room, and it's even worse when they won't provide resources to the people they are making decisions for.
It's backwards and heartless to offer so few protections for families. But this isn't just a moral issue; it's also an economic issue: **More than a million mothers would rejoin the workforce if child care were affordable.**
**By investing in access to child care, we would give families more financial security, give more mothers the opportunity to lead their own careers, and give our economy a $48 billion boost every single year.**
As a nurse, a children's advocate, and a parent, I know that the child care crisis requires bold leadership and swift action. That’s why I included bringing down the cost of child care by introducing a sliding scale limit on child care costs for families in [**my affordability plan.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48884178/359952745/2070851513?refcode=jtk208-fr-nd-v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmU1Njg2YS1jYjE1LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M43rG9oZEu1NhOLbjnNH7d7dN2l4cCRmHOFmpqTCh3o=&emci=da30d1b9-6413-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=0fe5686a-cb15-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=4450063)
Congress must pass similar legislation to secure affordable child care and paid family leave for the good of our families and for the good of our economy. And we must take action to stop the far-right extremists who are trying to turn the clock backwards on women's rights, civil rights, and so much more.**That means defeating dangerous ideologues like my Trump-endorsed opponent here in Missouri. **
**When I'm elected to the Senate, I promise that I will work my heart out to win protections for families and for moms. **But I won't be able to get to the Senate without help from people like you. **[_Fixing everything wrong with Washington and winning with real, compassionate leadership will take a united grassroots movement. So please, can I count on your donation today? Together, I know that we will win a better future for families._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48884179/359952746/-1843232826?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk208-fr-nd-v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmU1Njg2YS1jYjE1LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M43rG9oZEu1NhOLbjnNH7d7dN2l4cCRmHOFmpqTCh3o=)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48884180/359952747/-1843232826?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=jtk208-fr-nd-v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmU1Njg2YS1jYjE1LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M43rG9oZEu1NhOLbjnNH7d7dN2l4cCRmHOFmpqTCh3o=)

name: Alek
subject: My story is now streaming on Netflix
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alek For Oregon
body:
The Clint Eastwood directed film about the 15:17 to Paris incident is now streaming on Netflix. It would be an honor if you watched it. We’re spending money like drunken sailors. Our individual liberties have been trounced and continue to be under constant threat from authoritarians running the show in D.C. and President Biden and VP Harris clearly do NOT have a grip on the power they wield. . | Peter,

Clint Eastwood produced and directed a movie about the fateful day my best friends and I thwarted a terrorist attack on a train in Europe. It’s called ‘The 15:17 to Paris’ and as of this week, it’s streaming on Netfllix!

Peter, If you have followed my campaign for Congress, then I’m sure you have heard my story. But there is something so powerful in watching this event unfold on film.

**August 21, 2015 changed my life forever. My military training may have prepared me for that moment, but my commitment to service gave me the courage to act. I have and always will be willing to give my life in the fight for freedom, in the image of true American values.**

My best friends, Anthony Sadler and Spencer Stone, and I had no formal acting training. We only had the memory of this true event to guide us in playing ourselves on film.

Peter, I do hope you take the time to watch ‘The 15:17 to Paris.’ You’ll see that my life’s mission has always been to represent the America I know and love – the world’s bastion of freedom and economic prosperity.

**Now, I am taking that mission and putting it into action by running for Congress, by fighting for my neighbors and their wellbeing in Washington.** This will not be an easy road, which is why I am reaching out to you. **[I will need the financial support of every American patriot to win my target House race in Oregon.](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=9cb995282ed04f80a1a6ef2337a926da&_e=oLt4ECyLCdWmlxbIRbJ7lotDooUIVYt8Pi5t9BXprDgLif0UuorXvpMiN1sr8zGaz7s8Xq-Othz7i4IyNeXu41QWvsjYwIpan44M5PPHxEh_YSK6rD63zgMRw_qvMfb_qo-y-oE5xNgxQ97dfyk_Jq8m9X0vB4U4k6jGpI09wQ8f4yPwa9NWATAyBktsnr9q9x6Xf8OBCq_fjsQKzsmKwq5y6ezjfGOx-gZ_0rU5iQb23qhb-1d7W41BTdX67QVPgp2ipLTsnPngtTsg4Qt4l66kWvdBYxHypp4MHiO9Ld0UaQIjn7SI_2buppukASSry5F7GpbaJiDFBPHpBQxhZzlIxKUOzb19nB4Z9Grv5ZGyyVZcBZPIIP7pZSq1bJOho6atv7-dxpStnXh3bSK_lO8ECnJzpv1LEoszzH0f9r0wgRt3FVTwGh37vUEjWoELPV00fCXBBwXSOyZ5mAU1kQ%3D%3D)**

Once you finish watching the film, **[please consider pitching in $7 to my campaign](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=9cb995282ed04f80a1a6ef2337a926da&_e=oLt4ECyLCdWmlxbIRbJ7lotDooUIVYt8Pi5t9BXprDgLif0UuorXvpMiN1sr8zGaz7s8Xq-Othz7i4IyNeXu41QWvsjYwIpan44M5PPHxEh_YSK6rD63zgMRw_qvMfb_qo-y-oE5xNgxQ97dfyk_Jq8m9X0vB4U4k6jGpI09wQ8f4yPwa9NWATAyBktsnr9q9x6Xf8OBCq_fjsQKzsmKwq5y6ezjfGOx-gZ_0rU5iQb23qhb-1d7W41BTdX67QVPYMfXYcBPkKuZSuVgFXlb_O-yc5th9EoOGjK12eoiVxwHXtE5V-Zij0PPk0peo928Co0D1wGAEEcCi1U36CUTle3CdwkarMOeH4bo-vjeCJE7cOZmUonw6-hhLD8kx3jKr_aElyvZ-gcLKox8ZBMp1_d0Rr4SYbdy1jjTjl0WM-kThWW_Ouvj9v821iauUfm8l9HfMYdsJhIbrJ4H5HsQ_g%3D%3D)- $7 to mark the seventh anniversary of thwarting this terrorist attack. **

clean_body: The Clint Eastwood directed film about the 15:17 to Paris incident is now streaming on Netflix. It would be an honor if you watched it. We’re spending money like drunken sailors. Our individual liberties have been trounced and continue to be under constant threat from authoritarians running the show in D.C. and President Biden and VP Harris clearly do NOT have a grip on the power they wield. . | Peter, Clint Eastwood produced and directed a movie about the fateful day my best friends and I thwarted a terrorist attack on a train in Europe. It’s called ‘The 15:17 to Paris’ and as of this week, it’s streaming on Netfllix! Peter, If you have followed my campaign for Congress, then I’m sure you have heard my story. But there is something so powerful in watching this event unfold on film. August 21, 2015 changed my life forever. My military training may have prepared me for that moment, but my commitment to service gave me the courage to act. I have and always will be willing to give my life in the fight for freedom, in the image of true American values. My best friends, Anthony Sadler and Spencer Stone, and I had no formal acting training. We only had the memory of this true event to guide us in playing ourselves on film. Peter, I do hope you take the time to watch ‘The 15:17 to Paris.’ You’ll see that my life’s mission has always been to represent the America I know and love – the world’s bastion of freedom and economic prosperity. Now, I am taking that mission and putting it into action by running for Congress, by fighting for my neighbors and their wellbeing in Washington. This will not be an easy road, which is why I am reaching out to you. Once you finish watching the film, - $7 to mark the seventh anniversary of thwarting this terrorist attack. We need a fighter in Congress, Peter and I hope that seeing my story proves to you that I am the man for the job. name: =?utf-8?Q?Senator=20Brian=20Dahle?=
subject: RE: Drought and rationing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brian Dahle for Governor 2022
body:
|
---
| |
---
| ,
I – as I’m sure are you – am completely outraged that (yet again) Gavin Newsom is putting every resident on water rations!

Just four years ago we had one of the wettest years on record in CA history, yet he did nothing to keep the water for future years of inevitable drought and instead sent it on to the ocean.

Maybe Newsom doesn’t realize water can actually be stored?

We need to commit to finishing reservoir projects and actually store water from rainy years - so that we have a surplus during a drought.

With proper management, there is no reason we should be told how often we can water our lawn or take a shower.

Agree?

[Sign my petition: Say you’ll support my policy to store more water in California and stop the need for water rationing in CA.](https://briandahle.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11c7ad6aa59a7d39fc5819cc1&id=62b0512c07&e=f9133ea432)

---
| [SIGN HERE](https://briandahle.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11c7ad6aa59a7d39fc5819cc1&id=97b6932845&e=f9133ea432 "SIGN HERE")
---
| Let me also remind you how important this is.

California has the world’s 5th largest economy.

We have a surplus budget of BILLIONS of dollars.

There’s no reason why we can’t revamp our water infrastructure in order to adequately supply a constant flow of water for your needs.

The government should not be telling you how many showers you can take.

It’s their fault you don’t have water to spare - not our natural weather patterns.

We are not going to sit quietly here.

This is exactly why I’m running for Governor - we will not become a 3rd world country here in CA.

California will no longer restrict your rights.

Not on my watch.

Do you agree?

[Sign my petition: Say you’ll support my policy to store more water in California and stop the need for water rationing in CA.](https://briandahle.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11c7ad6aa59a7d39fc5819cc1&id=766932fe6b&e=f9133ea432)
---
| [SIGN HERE](https://briandahle.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11c7ad6aa59a7d39fc5819cc1&id=9de51a23f2&e=f9133ea432 "SIGN HERE")
---
| Thank you for doing your part.

\- Senator Brian Dahle.
---
| |

---
|
---

subject: Scheller for Congress Newsletter
body:
Happy Saturday #TeamScheller! Here is your Scheller for Congress Newsletter! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/92403239f7d2/scheller-for-congress-newsletter-9044937?e=db8085a287)
---
# August 6 Scheller for Congress Newsletter
Happy Saturday #TeamScheller!
Well, America has now seen two consecutive quarters of economic decline. For as long as you and I have been alive, that means a recession. Democrats are desperate to spin this narrative, but as long as people like Susan Wild continue to vote in line with the Biden/Pelosi agenda 100% of the time, the recession will continue.Thankfully, the people of the Lehigh Valley can see right through these disastrous policies and that is evident in the voter registration trends in Pennsylvania and right here in the Lehigh Valley. Voters are leaving the Democrat party and registering Republican.
That’s why we’re turning it up a notch with voter outreach over the next 94 days. Using our voter outreach app, my volunteers in Carbon, Lehigh, Monroe, and Northampton Counties will be knocking on doors and making phone calls to voters. Please contact my political director, Billy Moore at (609) 845-4469 with any questions or concerns.Our campaign has been non-stop all over the district during the past week with events like a meet and greet at Cetronia Fire Hall, “Shooting with Scheller”, and the Lehigh Valley Puerto Rican Parade with no plans of slowing down! At the bottom of this email are our upcoming events, check it out and join us on the trail!In just 94 days, we will vote to retire Susan Wild. We will end the Democrats’ one-party control of Washington, and their policies that threaten the American Dream in the Lehigh Valley.I hope you will join me on this journey! -Lisa

| [Join the team!](https://lisaschellerpa.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=816a990c748f610c97e80c7fc&id=62feba7937&e=db8085a287)
---
|
---
# Grassroots Conference Calls
Every Tuesday at 8:00 pm we have our grassroots update call. You can hear what our campaign is up to and how you can get involved in the coming week. If you would like to join us for this call, please email billy@schellerforcongress.com!
|
---
# News from the trail!
[Profile of Lisa by the National Federation of Republican Women ](https://lisaschellerpa.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=816a990c748f610c97e80c7fc&id=00bfec82ce&e=db8085a287)
Lisa Scheller is a trailblazing engineer and philanthropist whose business acumen and personal experience make her uniquely qualified for Congress.A candidate in Pennsylvania’s 7th congressional district - which leans Republican, according to the Cook Political Report - Scheller will face Democrat Susan Wild in November. The race is a rematch of the 2020 contest Wild won by the narrowest of margins.The granddaughter of immigrants, Scheller is the CEO of the manufacturing company they founded. The company - which makes a key ingredient in paints and coatings that’s sent to 87 different countries - is the only woman-owned business of its type in the world. Scheller says, “I have lived the American Dream, and I want to protect that American Dream for future generations. I’ve been all over the world and seen what doesn’t work and why our system of free enterprise is so important to protecting the American Dream.”
# [Opinion: Wild’s remarks not a good start in Carbon](https://lisaschellerpa.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=816a990c748f610c97e80c7fc&id=006551bf6f&e=db8085a287)
It looks like others art taking note of Susan Wild’s contempt for the people of Carbon County. If you didn’t know, Susan Wild said that she had to school the voters of Carbon County because she doesn’t like the way they vote. The problem with politicians like Susan Wild is that they look down on the voters that they do not agree with. They instead listen to their concerns and respond to them. Make no mistake about it, Susan Wild does not care what you think, she will always vote in lockstep with Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden. This is because although she tries to say she is a moderate, she will continue to vote in lockstep with the radical wing of the Democrat party.
# [Profile of Lisa in the Jerusalem Post](https://lisaschellerpa.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=816a990c748f610c97e80c7fc&id=0b4656b905&e=db8085a287)
Pennsylvania’s seventh district is gearing up for a rematch of the 2020 elections between incumbent Susan Wild, a Democrat, and Lisa Scheller, a Republican. Although Wild had the edge the last time the two Jewish candidates faced each other, this time may prove different, as the Cook Political Report placed the race at the “lean Republican” column and Larry Sabato’s Crystal Ball considered it as a toss-up.“A lot of things are different this time,” Scheller told _The Jerusalem Post_. “Redistricting in Pennsylvania has moved the race to a more Republican district. But also, the environment in the country is moving things more toward Republicans as well.”

name: Ted Budd
subject: We can’t slow down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate
body:
|
---
Hey Peter,

I’ve spent some time on my farm in North Carolina recently, where I’ve been enjoying the summer. _North Carolina is great – we’ve got beautiful beaches, picturesque mountains, and superior barbeque._
[](http://links.tedbudd.co/u/click?_t=13365b87b52649cc8d23e393a66fd89d&_m=5bb0b1813d914496b5d45aeb308c04d6&_e=L2KaE_a5Ac9C9-1kltOm7aAr5eIGTm776JlCd8KoIzL2A4M_rbbqzJ3Ej_ASRjBGgYDR7w0gW2KMfmRRCiNVonDm09UZ0NXHRLE7n4dFl5DMg9kC4AS2MYIwvwr6FuhB6-h-EPKg65BuX85q4RCDQD-XJBTxyqAKPk6H74Qw1PW62rjDfsCvTL3Ux3yGMf-45pmGrCFjjQHVF4H8FHIvZZH3Uc7RXj3QTRz8gdxfCkBtxXXSrR54vnNReJGj4rjmqWdIPzrDXON10h-B2Cm8IAafJVSaJrGVIwsweGKHPoiODUBKtZHKIOCWM1lFGCooHjBp1ZAaeM-W5paGCrkJa6CCa5DBDVnrFxCNDtWy24rcwhNpU69hrp4WLxexGYaqwyaagxKlcedV43xz05LfMjepFBUzyRXSolosF_DKJQ8xO62__LJFupUdxq-PCxW5sHA4JXXEEpo88EMfn1VAHb9R1jpzEmnJyPWUdIZTAXwPJYleoFWw195MBf88efewB-QnDwf5QLW0PUJ_4AFrbg%3D%3D)
But there is one bad thing about summer. Unfortunately, summer typically means a drop in our fundraising numbers. And understandably so – people are spending more time outdoors with family and friends, not focusing on politics.

I get it.

_But let me tell you why we can’t lose any momentum, especially right now._
1. While most people are enjoying a nice picnic outside, my Radical Left opponent is posting record-breaking fundraising numbers. **She brought in $7.4 million in the last 3 months alone.**

clean_body: | Hey Peter, I’ve spent some time on my farm in North Carolina recently, where I’ve been enjoying the summer. North Carolina is great – we’ve got beautiful beaches, picturesque mountains, and superior barbeque. But there is one bad thing about summer. Unfortunately, summer typically means a drop in our fundraising numbers. And understandably so – people are spending more time outdoors with family and friends, not focusing on politics. I get it. But let me tell you why we can’t lose any momentum, especially right now. 1. While most people are enjoying a nice picnic outside, my Radical Left opponent is posting record-breaking fundraising numbers. She brought in $7.4 million in the last 3 months alone. 2. Every poll is showing an extremely tight race this November. We’re nowhere near a comfortable victory, and everyone knows North Carolina could be the swing seat that decides control of the Senate. 3. With Democrats controlling the House, the Senate, and the White House, it is absolutely crucial we take this seat in order to stop the Biden/Beasley agenda. Chuck Schumer would be elated to have Radical Cheri Beasley in the Senate with him – and we can’t let that happen. | Our work is nowhere near done, and we get closer to November 8th with each passing minute. If everyone reading this email chipped in even just $5, we can make it out of this summer slump relaxed & ready for November. | ---|--- | | | Thanks in advance, Ted Budd | Ted Budd is a father, small business owner, and conservative leader running for Senate in North Carolina. He is the ONLY candidate who is endorsed by President Trump and the only candidate who will fight for the America First Agenda in Washington. To support our campaign, please click below to make a donation. | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate Copyright © 2021 Ted Budd for Senate, All rights reserved.

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Nov. 8, 2016 vs Nov. 8, 2022

body:
With the Senate majority hinging on this seat, I hope I can count on you.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48884955/359956690/-1829049351?refcode=mh-jtk1404-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTY5MjRkMS1kMzE1LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YXJoI6wcCwRcIUZKMt13Nzadj16CJ9xgscyqtF4rP0g=)
---
**Nov. 8th, 2016**
It's not lost on me that I was one of only two Democrats to unseat a Republican and flip a Senate seat in 2016. After Democrats across the country lost up and down the ballot, New Hampshire bucked national trends, squeaking out a victory by just 1,017 votes.
Our win was a rare moment of celebration in an otherwise sobering, awful election.
**Nov. 8th, 2022**
Now, six years later, Democrats are facing an even tougher political environment, and the stakes are much higher.
Polling shows me down by two points to an anti-choice opponent, and political experts from Rachel Maddow to Nate Silver's _FiveThirtyEight_ are saying I'm in a difficult reelection fight.
I know that we can buck national trends again to win in New Hampshire, just like we did in 2016 – but it's going to take all of us working together.
Considering the margins of my last race, it’s not hyperbole to say that this election could come down to what you do right now. **With the Senate majority hinging on this seat, I hope I can count on you.**

clean_body: With the Senate majority hinging on this seat, I hope I can count on you. | | | = Nov. 8th, 2016 It's not lost on me that I was one of only two Democrats to unseat a Republican and flip a Senate seat in 2016. After Democrats across the country lost up and down the ballot, New Hampshire bucked national trends, squeaking out a victory by just 1,017 votes. Our win was a rare moment of celebration in an otherwise sobering, awful election. Nov. 8th, 2022 Now, six years later, Democrats are facing an even tougher political environment, and the stakes are much higher. Polling shows me down by two points to an anti-choice opponent, and political experts from Rachel Maddow to Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight are saying I'm in a difficult reelection fight. I know that we can buck national trends again to win in New Hampshire, just like we did in 2016 – but it's going to take all of us working together. body:
|

Peter, we hate to be sending you an email with bad news but ...

_We’re behind._

[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=8610110d4836418084e5d4e099ccced4&_e=oJBMiJGOAMAauaAdbMxdTu31HUdiBx5s-TTw1J3g_njWiN90-TZgIHiM6cygjK9WaqNEDaGPynx1wWB-mAgu3gYGDu_ond3uB7Wuno8_HrVu7RdJbvyVXWxlYBtv4GpktGrUvkaQkBLj23nvQQib9zRtrHPOd3wQgcK5G_OasHeWdyE1UWdlWO5dRJop8cY7Ru3am87w-_RJ2sB2cvWIvQUGAaQ8rZhilPDRQtvyGgxwjFX9Z2Vb2gWg3rq2PhAGnELHrQr1-WuShExTjQdaz_GXtk1Q_nSAjMbpmYgyouX2Q3iZoZaTDJ-6zLCCZl5uxiWWc7DLIGgDYgs3sDQwt3fD1T9-pWwstRygm7Pz4Rwhc0KXRf00IupOhxnN9cQyx8rALUl6hwFCFmlVLGaIjnsd2xn-CiW7AVJMur1orIiysHYIwRUtazIDwSzGDp2ubPGoAPFtKWi4muNsm1zdLA%3D%3D)
These Democrats are taking major leads over our Senate candidates. We cannot sit idly by and let these margins continue to grow (_especially during an election year with just over 100 days to go_).

So, if you are reading this email right now, [**please take ONE minute of your time to chip in even ONE DOLLAR to help us take back the Senate this year and boost these candidates.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=8610110d4836418084e5d4e099ccced4&_e=oJBMiJGOAMAauaAdbMxdTu31HUdiBx5s-TTw1J3g_njWiN90-TZgIHiM6cygjK9WaqNEDaGPynx1wWB-mAgu3gYGDu_ond3uB7Wuno8_HrVu7RdJbvyVXWxlYBtv4GpktGrUvkaQkBLj23nvQQib9zRtrHPOd3wQgcK5G_OasHeWdyE1UWdlWO5dRJop8cY7Ru3am87w-_RJ2sB2cvWIvQUGAaQ8rZhilPDRQtvyGgxwjFX9Z2Vb2gWg3rq2PhAGLoxSc4sXhwWgM6BoW6gzGQsAuHS3GFfv5rIZGu3zPqyqaqIWoiY8TQ7CTXL9-nPPT1HTNGCeTIFtsz3oWzM6srdBZYiZwkI7YhEbcAKt9vw2Sh9WJRmMwTtPZA5n5B9E9o1G_kvvZhLBkxpza3huzR8gpirQziGwJ5FZgHjXuT9jGpLb1O2Yl8RHyGxVIRgrDfvxTaijCobNYOW3DMgnDg%3D%3D)

[**JOIN THE FIGHT**
Take back the Senate](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=8610110d4836418084e5d4e099ccced4&_e=oJBMiJGOAMAauaAdbMxdTu31HUdiBx5s-TTw1J3g_njWiN90-TZgIHiM6cygjK9WaqNEDaGPynx1wWB-mAgu3gYGDu_ond3uB7Wuno8_HrVu7RdJbvyVXWxlYBtv4GpktGrUvkaQkBLj23nvQQib9zRtrHPOd3wQgcK5G_OasHeWdyE1UWdlWO5dRJop8cY7Ru3am87w-_RJ2sB2cvWIvQUGAaQ8rZhilPDRQtvyGgxwjFX9Z2Vb2gWg3rq2PhAGnQg82hDkSTMS5G5IV5dYHEO69K4BV8wFkS05y-SdnaMIPqVEc1aZIQVlUNiUawuKPGGgxz9cE1w53BifdPjPluo9YKbt3dK2zl-KxKfPxOzKVQVFlL6KpOok-V6XIlVWnap2g4W83Jb89zQA4dX2-_Xky9ZOE95_nm2QGQpK9EyLFGhBL0LvWZZCJ7EB-VB2GW-xHbjYj3XAFSHWURVAzQ%3D%3D)

If we are going to bring a stop to the out-of-touch liberal’s agenda - it starts here and now. body:
I left out one of the most important parts.
| Peter,
---
I wanted to draw your attention to another part of the poll I shared with you earlier this week...
---
_**...it revealed that 27% of voters polled were STILL unsure about who to support.**_
---
That’s more than enough to decide the outcome of this race!

_Our data shows that when these undecided voters learn about Taddeo’s resounding support for the failed Biden-Harris agenda, they overwhelmingly break our way._

But we’ve got to secure the funds we need to reach these critical undecided voters in the final weeks.

body:
I'm going to keep fighting.

|

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48885171/359957588/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGMwMzk0Zi1kNzE1LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wC8ETYkGZ92D30cAbnFZ4ibbx5HlnrxhPO0bcSe7Up4=&emci=01e7676c-f414-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=d0c0394f-d715-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, From the moment this campaign began – and throughout my life – I’ve been driven by the idea that there is no greater vocation than service to one’s country. It’s a message my parents instilled in my siblings and me that I’ve carried with me from the CIA to the campaign trail to Congress. For me, service means delivering results for our community – results that will improve the lives of my constituents. That’s why I led the charge on the bipartisan infrastructure law that will reduce congestion on I-95, upgrade Virginia’s roads and bridges, and support family-sustaining jobs. It’s why I’m leading the charge to ban members of Congress and their spouses from trading stock. And it’s why – as the only Virginian who sits on the House Agriculture Committee – I am working to support Virginia’s producers, protect our natural resources, and grow our economy. There’s so much more I want to accomplish for the Commonwealth, and I’m counting on your support to ensure I can. **[_Will you support my re-election by splitting a contribution between my campaign and Mark Warner today?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48885173/359957590/141353267?refcode=mw_em_220806_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGMwMzk0Zi1kNzE1LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wC8ETYkGZ92D30cAbnFZ4ibbx5HlnrxhPO0bcSe7Up4=)** With appreciation, Abigail **[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48885175/359957592/141353267?refcode=mw_em_220806_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGMwMzk0Zi1kNzE1LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wC8ETYkGZ92D30cAbnFZ4ibbx5HlnrxhPO0bcSe7Up4=)**

name: Dan Feehan
subject: It's been a while
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ETTINGER FOR CONGRESS
body:
Today I'm reaching out about 2022 and our efforts to make sure we flip the district on August 9 and elect Jeff Ettinger. If we show up in the numbers I know we’re capable of supporting Southern Minnesota's DFL candidate, Jeff Ettinger, we can make him our incumbent in November. ETTINGER FOR CONGRESS

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48885187/359957637/-895462045?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzMwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGNjYTM5Ni1kNzE1LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gxjSogGeaAxOobEcWO2bCrR-ggoHrSJ63dIk4pmi0Is=&emci=72b46600-c115-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=64cca396-d715-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=5460736) Hi friend,

It’s been a while since I reached out to most of you and I first want to say **thank you for all of your support of my campaign in 2020!** Today I'm reaching out about 2022 and our efforts to **make sure we flip the district on August 9 and elect Jeff Ettinger.** If we show up in the numbers I know we’re capable of supporting Southern Minnesota's DFL candidate, Jeff Ettinger, we can **make him our incumbent in November.**

**With just days before the Special Election on August 9** , Jeff’s get out the vote effort will greatly benefit from supporters like yourself. **[I would like to ask for you to volunteer by using this link](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48885188/359957638/-823527749?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzMwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGNjYTM5Ni1kNzE1LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gxjSogGeaAxOobEcWO2bCrR-ggoHrSJ63dIk4pmi0Is=&emci=72b46600-c115-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=64cca396-d715-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=5460736) **to help, because in this race, my volunteers are going to make the difference!

**Your support meant a lot to me and I know it means a lot to Jeff** , so please join me in **[chipping in to support](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48885189/359957639/-921804485?refcode=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzMwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGNjYTM5Ni1kNzE1LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gxjSogGeaAxOobEcWO2bCrR-ggoHrSJ63dIk4pmi0Is=)** Jeff Ettinger! I want to **thank you all in advance for your time and consideration of getting to the polls before or on August 9.**
| ****[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48885190/359957640/-921804485?refcode=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzMwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGNjYTM5Ni1kNzE1LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gxjSogGeaAxOobEcWO2bCrR-ggoHrSJ63dIk4pmi0Is=)****
---

Jeff not only has my endorsement, but I’d like to share with you that **Minnesota's Gov. Tim Walz, Sen. Amy Klobuchar, and Sen. Tina Smith have proudly endorsed Jeff's candidacy.** I’m thrilled to show my backing along with these admirable Minnesota public servants in our effort to return Gov. Walz's congressional seat (which he represented from 2006-2018) back to the capable hands of **a strong community leader who will represent everyone in the district.**
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48885191/359957641/-921804485?refcode=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzMwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGNjYTM5Ni1kNzE1LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gxjSogGeaAxOobEcWO2bCrR-ggoHrSJ63dIk4pmi0Is=)**
Jeff, much like many of you, **was an early supporter of my campaign. Jeff Ettinger is a candidate who is uniquely qualified to lead Southern Minnesota** —from his business career and charitable works at Hormel Foods and with the Hormel Foundation, to his role as the co-Chair of Governor Walz’s Council on Economic Expansion. **He has worked for years to strengthen our communities and help those who’ve been left out of our economy.**

Thanks!
Dan Feehan
Minnesota’s CD-1 Candidate, 2020

With just days before the Special Election on August 9 , Jeff’s get out the vote effort will greatly benefit from supporters like yourself. to help, because in this race, my volunteers are going to make the difference! Your support meant a lot to me and I know it means a lot to Jeff , so please join me in = Jeff Ettinger! I want to thank you all in advance for your time and consideration of getting to the polls before or on August 9. | **= Jeff not only has my endorsement, but I’d like to share with you that Minnesota's Gov. Tim Walz, Sen. Amy Klobuchar, and Sen. Tina Smith have proudly endorsed Jeff's candidacy. I’m thrilled to show my backing along with these admirable Minnesota public servants in our effort to return Gov. Walz's congressional seat (which he represented from 2006-2018) back to the capable hands of a strong community leader who will represent everyone in the district. = Jeff, much like many of you, was an early supporter of my campaign. Jeff Ettinger is a candidate who is uniquely qualified to lead Southern Minnesota —from his business career and charitable works at Hormel Foods and with the Hormel Foundation, to his role as the co-Chair of Governor Walz’s Council on Economic Expansion. He has worked for years to strengthen our communities and help those who’ve been left out of our economy. Thanks! Dan Feehan Minnesota’s CD-1 Candidate, 2020 If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | =** | PAID FOR BY ETTINGER FOR CONGRESS ETTINGER FOR CONGRESS PO BOX 741 AUSTIN, MN 55912 If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

If you knew that $5 could change the course of political history for a generation, would you make that contribution?

If you knew $5 could guarantee we **hold our Senate majority so we can pass President Biden’s bold agenda, prevent Mitch McConnell from blocking our progress, and keep America on the right track forward** , would you take that leap?

[**Now’s your chance: we’re running behind on today's must-hit $25,000 fundraising goal, and we need support from folks like you. Will you donate $5 now to help make up the difference and defend Democrats’ Senate majority?**](https://go.dscc.org/go/8703?t=5&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&code=DPE-FD-20220806-Schumer-Schumer3-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220806-Schumer-Schumer3-Pros-sl1&akid=5648%2E9716520%2E4p4r_W)

Here’s what I mean when I talk about $5: President Biden's critical agenda _hinges_ on our Democratic Senate, and Mitch McConnell only needs ONE seat to regain power. **That’s a single seat preventing McConnell from completely blocking President Biden’s transformative agenda -- and a single seat could be decided by a single vote.**

Democratic champions like Mark Kelly, Maggie Hassan, Raphael Warnock, and Catherine Cortez Masto are all up for re-election this year -- and we’re looking at four _extremely close_ races. _One loss_ could be _devastating._

**I’m not exaggerating when I tell you that $5 from supporters like you could decide our political future.** But right now, we’re still waiting on a contribution from you today, and I know you wouldn’t miss out on a chance like this to be a real difference-maker.

**[If everyone reading this message contributed right now, we’d hit today's goal in no time. But as it stands right now, Republicans are threatening to out-raise us AGAIN. We can’t let that happen -- and it all starts with $5. Please, contribute now:](https://go.dscc.org/go/8703?t=6&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&code=DPE-FD-20220806-Schumer-Schumer3-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220806-Schumer-Schumer3-Pros-sl1&akid=5648%2E9716520%2E4p4r_W)**

We need your help to defend our Senate majority. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.
| | [Donate $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/8703?t=7&amount=5&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&code=DPE-FD-20220806-Schumer-Schumer3-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220806-Schumer-Schumer3-Pros-sl1&akid=5648%2E9716520%2E4p4r_W)
---
| [Donate $10](https://go.dscc.org/go/8703?t=8&amount=10&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&code=DPE-FD-20220806-Schumer-Schumer3-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220806-Schumer-Schumer3-Pros-sl1&akid=5648%2E9716520%2E4p4r_W)
---
| [Donate $25](https://go.dscc.org/go/8703?t=9&amount=25&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&code=DPE-FD-20220806-Schumer-Schumer3-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220806-Schumer-Schumer3-Pros-sl1&akid=5648%2E9716520%2E4p4r_W)
---
| [Other Amount](https://go.dscc.org/go/8703?t=10&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&code=DPE-FD-20220806-Schumer-Schumer3-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220806-Schumer-Schumer3-Pros-sl1&akid=5648%2E9716520%2E4p4r_W)
---

Republicans _will_ outraise us again if we don’t rise up and challenge them. And they could take back the Senate -- maybe by a margin so thin that meeting today’s goal would be enough to stop them.

But we’ll never know unless folks across the country band together and pitch in $5 to protect our Senate majority.

I know that $5 doesn’t sound like a lot in the face of the GOP megadonor machine, but think of it this way: **we have strength in numbers, and if we learned anything in 2020, it’s that our numbers are greater -- as long as everyone steps up to do their part.**

[**Control of the Senate is in our hands, and I’m counting on YOU to keep it there. $5 just might make the difference -- so please chip in now.**](https://go.dscc.org/go/8703?t=11&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&code=DPE-FD-20220806-Schumer-Schumer3-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220806-Schumer-Schumer3-Pros-sl1&akid=5648%2E9716520%2E4p4r_W)

I'm so grateful to have you on our team,

Chuck

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/8703?t=12&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&code=DPE-FD-20220806-Schumer-Schumer3-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220806-Schumer-Schumer3-Pros-sl1&akid=5648%2E9716520%2E4p4r_W)

subject: Why we need your support
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
National Republicans are targeting this race.
#
Peter,
As an important member of this team, we wanted to explain why we’re asking for your help this week:
The general election officially kicked off in Washington state this week. Mitch McConnell’s handpicked candidate, MAGA Republican Tiffany Smiley, is running against us – and national Republican groups are serious about propping up her campaign and targeting this race.
They even launched a six-figure ad buy this week attacking Patty.
**[We need to raise $200,000 this week to kick off the general election and stay competitive against the national Republicans targeting Washington State. Chip in $5 right now to reelect Patty Murray.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48885227/359957930/304972976?refcode=pm_em_220806_1_a&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmNkYWE1Ni1kYTE1LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8b_A-_t3mrqvMDQT0cuaAWu1JKiD_L9eGi0Vp8_ZBOI=)**
We need Patty’s voice in the Senate to continue fighting to protect reproductive rights, building an economy that works for all of us and standing up for our democracy. Meanwhile, McConnell and his fellow Republicans only need to flip _one_ seat to take back control of the majority.
We cannot afford to let them, Peter, that's why we’re counting on you:
**[Will you contribute $5 right now to give Patty Murray the strongest possible start to the general election and protect our Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48885228/359957931/304972976?refcode=pm_em_220806_1_a&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmNkYWE1Ni1kYTE1LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8b_A-_t3mrqvMDQT0cuaAWu1JKiD_L9eGi0Vp8_ZBOI=)**
Thank you,
Team Patty

****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48885229/359957932/304972976?refcode=pm_em_220806_1_a&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmNkYWE1Ni1kYTE1LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8b_A-_t3mrqvMDQT0cuaAWu1JKiD_L9eGi0Vp8_ZBOI=)****

Peter, As an important member of this team, we wanted to explain why we’re asking for your help this week: The general election officially kicked off in Washington state this week. Mitch McConnell’s handpicked candidate, MAGA Republican Tiffany Smiley, is running against us – and national Republican groups are serious about propping up her campaign and targeting this race. They even launched a six-figure ad buy this week attacking Patty. = We need Patty’s voice in the Senate to continue fighting to protect reproductive rights, building an economy that works for all of us and standing up for our democracy. Meanwhile, McConnell and his fellow Republicans only need to flip one seat to take back control of the majority. We cannot afford to let them, Peter, that's why we’re counting on you: = Thank you, Team Patty **= As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values.
