name: Anthony D'Esposito for Congress
subject: I need your help
body:
Peter, Whatever your party affiliation is, we all agree that inflation is at its highest in over 40 years. It was only two years ago that America achieved energy independence. How did it go wrong so quickly?
Whatever your party affiliation is, we all agree that inflation is at its highest in over 40 years. It was only two years ago that America achieved energy independence. How did it go wrong so quickly?
| | | | [](https://despositoforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-l-nodrdd-iubikjttk-y/)
---
| | Peter,
---
| | | **Whatever your party affiliation is, we all agree that inflation is at its highest in over 40 years. It was only two years ago that America achieved energy independence. How did it go wrong so quickly?**

American families are unable to make ends meet. The Biden Administration caused the inflation crisis with out-of-control spending, failed policies, and the inability to solve disruptions to the supply chain. As Town Councilman, I cut or froze taxes in the last four budgets. As Congressman, I will continue to protect taxpayers by "doing more with less."
**I need your help to win this seat as we get closer to November.** I don't want to ask my friends and supporters for donations, but it's necessary to win this seat.

Please chip-in **[$10, $25, $50, $100, or ANY AMOUNT ](https://despositoforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-l-nodrdd-iubikjttk-j/)** to get me to the finish line. Together we will defeat the left and take back the House.
---
| | Thank You,
Anthony

name: CheriBeasley.com
subject: We are looking for as many people as possible to personally endorse Cheri Beasley today. It may seem like a simple action, but it can make a real difference.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
Cheri Beasley has proven her vote is not for sale. She’s committed to fighting for justice and the people.
#
Friends -
Beating Cheri Beasley is one of National Republicans' top priorities in November. That’s why super PACs are flooding our state with corporate dark money to buy this seat.
Our opponent Ted Budd has proven he is a reliable rubber stamp for corporate special interests and ultra-wealthy right-wing donors. Meanwhile, Cheri Beasley has proven her vote is not for sale. She’s committed to fighting for justice and the people. Always.
But sending a champion for the people to the U.S. Senate is going to take the largest grassroots effort North Carolina has ever seen, so we need to prove that this team has what it takes to win. An important step in that process is getting as many people as possible to say they stand with Cheri Beasley.
**[Can you please add your name to say you personally endorse Cheri Beasley’s campaign for U.S. Senate in North Carolina? It may seem like a simple action, but adding your name sends a powerful message to everyone watching.**](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/em-personal-endorsement-aug22/?source=em220806-2-ma&refcode2=1387.357359.bx97T8&akid=1387%2E357359%2Ebx97T8)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/em-personal-endorsement-aug22/?source=em220806-2-ma&refcode2=1387.357359.bx97T8&akid=1387%2E357359%2Ebx97T8)**
Every person who says they proudly support Cheri can make a real difference. Each one of us has the chance to say loud and clear that we will not stand by while super PACs try to buy this seat.
When you and thousands of others all step up and say you’re with Cheri, you become part of a campaign that is focused on improving people’s lives and building a brighter future. So can Cheri count on you?
**[If you believe this is worth fighting for, add your name to personally endorse Cheri Beasley for U.S. Senate. We are looking to have as many people as possible sign up today.**](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/em-personal-endorsement-aug22/?source=em220806-2-ma&refcode2=1387.357359.bx97T8&akid=1387%2E357359%2Ebx97T8)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/em-personal-endorsement-aug22/?source=em220806-2-ma&refcode2=1387.357359.bx97T8&akid=1387%2E357359%2Ebx97T8)**
Thank you!
\- Team Beasley

Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
PO Box 28778
Raleigh, NC 27611
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you want to receive fewer emails, you may [submit this form to get only our most important updates](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1&akid=1387%2E357359%2Ebx97T8). Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.cheribeasley.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=1387%2E357359%2Ebx97T8). If you would like to support Cheri's campaign for the U.S. Senate in North Carolina, please consider [making a donation](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beasley-em-2021?refcode=em-footer&t=3&refcode2=1387_357359_bx97T8&akid=1387%2E357359%2Ebx97T8) today to help us make history.

| Friend-- What our campaign raised over the last several days is thanks to the incredible effort of our team of grassroots donors. Thanks to this outpouring of support, we're entering November in our strongest position yet to win this election. Let me tell you what the support of our grassroots donors means to our campaign. It means that we can keep running digital ads that we'll need to win to beat the establishment on Election Day. Thanks to this outpouring of support, we're entering November in our strongest position yet to win this election. From the bottom of my heart, and on behalf of our entire campaign team, I want to thank you. Thank you so much for everything you're doing to help move Arkansas forward for generations to come. Let me tell you what the support of our grassroots donors means to our campaign. It means that we can keep running digital ads that we'll need to win to beat the establishment on Election Day. It means that we can ramp up our organizing in communities across Arkansas -- because that's how we're going to win this campaign. Florida's last Senate election was decided by just 0.12 points – only 10,033 votes. In a race this tight, every choice we each make is incredibly impactful. **It could be your single donation that lets us knock on just enough doors, call just enough voters or run enough ads to push this campaign – our movement – to victory.**

National Republicans have already poured in $10 million to keep me and any other Democrat from winning in Florida again.

name: Team Catherine
subject: Letter to the Editor: The Scarsdale Inquirer
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Approved by Catherine For Congress
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/79102/images/Scarsdale.png]
8/5/22
To the Editor,
We proudly support Catherine Parker for Congress in the redrawn District NY-16 and encourage eligible voters to vote for Catherine the primary on Tuesday, Aug 23. Here's why:
Catherine has 15 years of experience and a proven track record as an elected legislator representing Westchester residents.
Elected a Westchester County legislator in 2013, Catherine has chaired committees and served as majority leader. She helped pass important laws on gun safety, protecting women's rights and combating climate change. Before that, she served for six years on the Rye City Council.
Catherine is committed to serving her constituents.
In the Westchester County Legislature, Catherine represents 65,000 residents of Westchester County. Unlike Congressman Jamaal Bowman, who voted "no" on the infrastructure bill and aligns with "the squad," Catherine works collaboratively, builds relationships and represents the needs of our communities.
Catherine aligns with our views on issues. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/catherine-for-congress-1]
Catherine is pro-choice and will fight for women's reproductive rights, as well as racial equality, and LGBTQ protections because she believes these are basic human rights.
Catherine believes Israel is an important ally to the United States, and in Washington, and will be steadfast ally of the Middle East's only democracy.
Catherine will bring her own experiences as a mother and small business owner to the table, will fight for fiscal prudence and to reinstate SALT, and help reduce the tax burden on working families.
Catherine is passionate about combating climate change. She worked to create the Westchester County Office of Energy and Sustainability, secure funding for essential flood control projects, encourage investment in renewable energies and reduce local government's carbon footprint.
Catherine has a path to victory. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/catherine-for-congress-1]
When the map of our Congressional District 16 was radically redrawn in May, it gained the Sound Shore region, Catherine's legislative district. The redrawn District 16 dropped Northern Westchester towns, such as Yorktown Heights. Catherine felt compelled to run. This is why she joined the race.
We believe Catherine has the best path to victory against the incumbent Congressman Bowman in the upcoming Democratic primary. We respect that Catherine has significant experience as an elected representative; that she is detail oriented; that she listens and learns; and then works to get things done. We want a representative like Catherine in Washington who knows how to work across the aisle. Catherine has more than a dozen formal endorsements and demonstrates to us that is well regarded by colleagues.
Born and raised in Westchester, Catherine is the daughter of a single mom who taught science in White Plains, and Catherine credits her strong work ethic to her childhood when money was tight. For 23 years, she owned and ran Parkers, a successful small business in downtown Rye. She serves and lives here in our district with her husband and two children and is committed to the pocketbook issues that matter to Westchester residents.
Join us in voting to elect Catherine to Congress. Vote early, in person on Tuesday, Aug. 23 or request and vote via an absentee ballot: https://absentee-ballot.elections.ny.gov. Every vote counts.

clean_body: [] [] 8/5/22 To the Editor, We proudly support Catherine Parker for Congress in the redrawn District NY-16 and encourage eligible voters to vote for Catherine the primary on Tuesday, Aug 23. Here's why: Catherine has 15 years of experience and a proven track record as an elected legislator representing Westchester residents. Elected a Westchester County legislator in 2013, Catherine has chaired committees and served as majority leader. She helped pass important laws on gun safety, protecting women's rights and combating climate change. Before that, she served for six years on the Rye City Council. Catherine is committed to serving her constituents. In the Westchester County Legislature, Catherine represents 65,000 residents of Westchester County. Unlike Congressman Jamaal Bowman, who voted "no" on the infrastructure bill and aligns with "the squad," Catherine works collaboratively, builds relationships and represents the needs of our communities. Catherine aligns with our views on issues. [] Catherine is pro-choice and will fight for women's reproductive rights, as well as racial equality, and LGBTQ protections because she believes these are basic human rights. Catherine believes Israel is an important ally to the United States, and in Washington, and will be steadfast ally of the Middle East's only democracy. Catherine will bring her own experiences as a mother and small business owner to the table, will fight for fiscal prudence and to reinstate SALT, and help reduce the tax burden on working families. Catherine is passionate about combating climate change. She worked to create the Westchester County Office of Energy and Sustainability, secure funding for essential flood control projects, encourage investment in renewable energies and reduce local government's carbon footprint. Catherine has a path to victory. [] When the map of our Congressional District 16 was radically redrawn in May, it gained the Sound Shore region, Catherine's legislative district. The redrawn District 16 dropped Northern Westchester towns, such as Yorktown Heights. Catherine felt compelled to run. This is why she joined the race. We believe Catherine has the best path to victory against the incumbent Congressman Bowman in the upcoming Democratic primary. We respect that Catherine has significant experience as an elected representative; that she is detail oriented; that she listens and learns; and then works to get things done. We want a representative like Catherine in Washington who knows how to work across the aisle. Catherine has more than a dozen formal endorsements and demonstrates to us that is well regarded by colleagues. Born and raised in Westchester, Catherine is the daughter of a single mom who taught science in White Plains, and Catherine credits her strong work ethic to her childhood when money was tight. For 23 years, she owned and ran Parkers, a successful small business in downtown Rye. She serves and lives here in our district with her husband and two children and is committed to the pocketbook issues that matter to Westchester residents. Join us in voting to elect Catherine to Congress. Vote early, in person on Tuesday, Aug. 23 or request and vote via an absentee ballot: . Every vote counts. Diane Greenwald , Oak Lane Sarah Kagan , Brewster Road Michelle Lichtenberg , Walworth Avenue Suzanne Seiden , Fairway Drive P.S. Support is growing and Catherine needs your help now more than ever! Please consider making a contribution to her campaign to help her get across the finish line. name: Midterms Alert (via DLCC)
subject: Insurrectionists are running for seats that could give them the power to reshape election laws
body:
Insurrectionists and their enablers are dangerous enough alone – but with hundreds of them on the ballot, they could work together to push forward their anti-democratic agenda | | |
---
| | **More than 400 candidates on the state legislative ballot enabled the Jan 6th insurrection** – and this November, they’re running for seats that could give them the power to reshape their election laws in their states. Trump is throwing his support behind his insurrectionist allies – his handpicked, extremist gubernatorial candidates like Doug Mastriano and Dan Cox pose a serious threat to our democracy. **Even scarier, both of these candidates started out as state legislators.**
**It’s proof that Trump’s endorsements up-and-down the ballot have a lasting effect – and with _hundreds_ of them on the ballot, they could work together to push forward their anti-democratic agenda and pave the way for Trump’s all-but-confirmed 2024 presidential run.** **It’s critical that we organize _now_ to stop insurrection enablers’ political careers in their tracks. ****[_Can you chip in $7 right now to our Stop the Insurrectionists Fund to defeat insurrectionists and their enablers on the state legislative ballot this fall?_](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xaRu3n0cGNQE4QBeKFCbB9vE7lf25zn2xgqmQkZ2O5_LvO_HfT1HjUbRdgsrj84twMJGIRXaRcFBXfRwwbNryGuLGxKAqCAdyDSmQmTa286J-62GtOW8M6YNCgqWUYsJTBfilcoA6AkYPu4jAn17rhx2AdTwYnUKUYxkaKg3c6zZZy4HSwzoVA-tzx1qgg82F-kan70FZgRiDFGp7U-xwivQoabF1vshecrdyLEXkShDFg4Tujt343s8UhAWX8uX4HqCEp_8KXTqH5ehvVswOiAzX0p4Xppn7fy2oxFxgoipIqeKiBqAD_JMbvKwUmFWAyS13CgUet-fShZyDC1dMlQTxGiGENUAIq-cey3aFSZ1vizsvGNJVcsUvpWAbhuaHBIP5uI-xLdm5Ff2Mbv9RwDApo8RvOiOrWWMWGAxmpRi5QGFRJKcwtn9p6wdKvzf8btScca9Ctr5SmU8xZKqdIDyXYZNaUinDjSAZuEo8wBFSW9wWb2PNhrgYfWYngE9w/3od/y1dkn0GkQtuunXEJnKOW9g/h0/PHdrxYgHmFw_YXDmmImDwGC1FMhMA6Fj_tEgMpQn8yM)** | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

clean_body: Insurrectionists and their enablers are dangerous enough alone – but with hundreds of them on the ballot, they could work together to push forward their anti-democratic agenda | | | | | More than 400 candidates on the state legislative ballot enabled the Jan 6th insurrection – and this November, they’re running for seats that could give them the power to reshape their election laws in their states. Trump is throwing his support behind his insurrectionist allies – his handpicked, extremist gubernatorial candidates like Doug Mastriano and Dan Cox pose a serious threat to our democracy. Even scarier, both of these candidates started out as state legislators. It’s proof that Trump’s endorsements up-and-down the ballot have a lasting effect – and with hundreds of them on the ballot, they could work together to push forward their anti-democratic agenda and pave the way for Trump’s all-but-confirmed 2024 presidential run. It’s critical that we organize now to stop insurrection enablers’ political careers in their tracks. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Our work doesn’t end after November 8th – protecting our democracy from Trumpism in the states will be a continuous fight that our Democratic state legislators will face everyday. That’s why it’s vital that we elect Democrats to state legislatures this November who will work to combat Trumpism and drive progress in states like yours. Building a winning foundation for the midterm elections starts with your investment today. With the support of committed Democrats like you, we can supply our candidates with the resources they need to secure victories in November, and strengthen our on-the-ground efforts in the states. Can we count on your support? Thanks, Team DLCC | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the DLCC are not tax deductible. | The Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee and Grassroots Victory PAC are dedicated to winning and defending Democratic majorities in state legislatures across the country. body:
We're building a coalition of General Election Founding Donors who can provide the grassroots support we need to succeed.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/Z1mSNZeTu9IUuvUCfezBCKFl4ov0wlTDyR4ZRoA3tB0=/BQyPjvY--Ikgt4q94jjzn_KR87GWF-3UVzyGsrQgqwI=?amount=5&refcode=em_fr_2022.08.06_b2_ts_all) Hey team,

Now that the Republican primary is over and our MAGA Republican opponent has been chosen, we're ramping every aspect of our campaign towards the general election. To get our campaign ready to support these efforts, **we 're building a roster of General Election Founding Donors who can provide the grassroots support we need to succeed.**

Over the next three days, our goal is to recruit [**200 General Election Founding Donors. Can you donate any amount today to become an official Founding Donor?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Z1mSNZeTu9IUuvUCfezBCKFl4ov0wlTDyR4ZRoA3tB0=/BQyPjvY--Ikgt4q94jjzn_KR87GWF-3UVzyGsrQgqwI=?amount=5&refcode=em_fr_2022.08.06_b2_ts_all)

As we kick off our general election campaign, it's critical to build a strong foundation with grassroots fundraising. That's because we'll be relying on our grassroots team to afford hiring more campaign staff, reaching out to voters through TV and digital ads, and supporting the outreach efforts of our volunteers across the district.

[**So, will you help start off our general election campaign on the right foot by chipping in whatever you can today and becoming a General Election Founding Donors?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Z1mSNZeTu9IUuvUCfezBCKFl4ov0wlTDyR4ZRoA3tB0=/BQyPjvY--Ikgt4q94jjzn_KR87GWF-3UVzyGsrQgqwI=?amount=5&refcode=em_fr_2022.08.06_b2_ts_all)

Team Stanton

name: Tim Ryan
subject: doughnuts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/20869?t=6&akid=3981%2E878179%2EWmQid0) We’ve been surging in the polls in recent weeks.

As exciting as that is, make no mistake about it—**JD’s billionaire backers and the Trump fundraising machine are painfully aware of our momentum,_and their desperation makes them dangerous._**

They’re going to lash out with ads to try and smear me and let loose every dirty trick in the book—you can bet dollars to doughnuts that they’re coming, and we’ve got to be ready.

**This race could not possibly be any closer—we’ve got momentum, but they’ve got nearly unlimited funds.[If everyone reading this pitches in $25, split between my race and Voter Protection Project, we could level the playing field. Can I count on you to chip in ASAP?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/20875?t=7&akid=3981%2E878179%2EWmQid0)** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Tim Ryan and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $5 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/20876?t=8&akid=3981%2E878179%2EWmQid0)

[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/20869?t=12&akid=3981%2E878179%2EWmQid0)
JD Vance and his corporate backers have been watching this race steadily tilt in our favor —a race they thought they had in the bag when we launched this campaign.

But we can’t get cocky, because we’ve still got a heck of a lot of ground to cover before Election Day, and I don’t expect them to play fair when they’re backed into a corner.

**This is no time to sugarcoat things—we need to keep the pressure on.[Will you chip in $25 to my campaign and Voter Protectoin Project to make sure we can respond to the GOP attacks that are coming our way? Flipping Ohio blue is our best shot at expanding our Democratic Senate majority.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/20890?t=13&akid=3981%2E878179%2EWmQid0)**

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=3981%2E878179%2EWmQid0). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=3981%2E878179%2EWmQid0).**

As exciting as that is, make no mistake about it—JD’s billionaire backers and the Trump fundraising machine are painfully aware of our momentum,and their desperation makes them dangerous. They’re going to lash out with ads to try and smear me and let loose every dirty trick in the book—you can bet dollars to doughnuts that they’re coming, and we’ve got to be ready. This race could not possibly be any closer—we’ve got momentum, but they’ve got nearly unlimited funds. But we can’t get cocky, because we’ve still got a heck of a lot of ground to cover before Election Day, and I don’t expect them to play fair when they’re backed into a corner. This is no time to sugarcoat things—we need to keep the pressure on. I’m proud to have their support, along with the backing of hundreds more Vermonters – business owners, veterans, teachers and community leaders.

Our statewide leadership – and especially our congressional delegation – has long been a source of Vermont pride. name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Your Preview of Tuesday's Primary
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=primary_email_2&n=1)
---
## Overview of this Tuesday's Primary Election
### Saturday, August 6th, 2022
Friend, There's an important primary election on Tuesday. Many people have reached out to me this week to learn more about the dynamics and what's at stake. So we produced an overview for you in this week's show. Also, Trump was in Wisconsin on Friday so we had MAGA Jesse give us an update on the event while he was standing in line. **If you want the most important primary election information you won't hear from anywhere else, watch this video:** [](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRZAH3w6m089k70LTJyguL85&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=primary_email_2&n=2)
## [WATCH NOW](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRZAH3w6m089k70LTJyguL85&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=primary_email_2&n=3)
Here's a **Primary Election Checklist** for you:
* Find your polling location. Click on this link: [**FIND POLLING PLACE**](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=ubk1FolAq6WRuAxNmhA93VJcs5l4BDTnm18Mfb6IJCl64TykgpW9Go6kyZmIAH4s&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=primary_email_2&n=4)
* Look up your sample ballot and make sure to only vote for candidates in one party. The Primary election works a little different than the general election where you can vote for anyone. In the primary, once you vote for a person of one party, you can only vote for the candidates of that party. A sample ballot is found at the same link as above.
* Learn how sitting legislators vote in St Paul. Did you know that all Senators have a failing grade on our scorecard? And in the Minnesota House, there's only a few who have scored an "A" grade. Visit [**MNSCORECARD.COM**](https://www.action4liberty.com/scorecard?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=primary_email_2&n=5)**** to learn more.

## **Jake Duesenberg**
**Action 4 Liberty** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_to_reach_more?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=primary_email_2&n=6 "Support Us") [Support Us](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_to_reach_more?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=primary_email_2&n=6)

You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=primary_email_2&n=8).

name: Tim Ryan
subject: real quick
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hey. It’s Tim Ryan. Can I explain something real quick?

**Long story short:** A lot of things are swinging our way in Ohio and we need to capitalize on the moment to build up a strong lead. We’ve got momentum at our backs but we’re going to need your help to come out the other side with a big win.

**[That’s why before I get into the nitty gritty details, I’ve got to ask: Will you split $5 ASAP between my campaign and the DSCC to help us defend the Senate and win one of the most competitive Senate races on the map?](https://go.dscc.org/go/7515?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20220806-TimRyan-TimRyanTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20220806-TimRyan-TimRyanTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=5689%2E9716520%2EEnHTbV)**

| | [Donate](https://go.dscc.org/go/7515?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20220806-TimRyan-TimRyanTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20220806-TimRyan-TimRyanTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=5689%2E9716520%2EEnHTbV)
---

Here’s a quick rundown of our Ohio Senate race:

* _The Wall Street Journal_ called me “Democrats’ most important 2022 candidate.”
* Recent polling is giving us a slight edge over millionaire JD Vance.
* FiveThirtyEight recently said we were a toss-up, giving us a practically 50-50 shot of winning this race.
* Thanks to an outpouring of grassroots support, we outraised JD Vance last quarter... by a lot.
* Newsweek just profiled our race as one of the top two opportunities for Democrats to flip a Republican-held seat.

Look, things are going our way and it’s really easy to say “Tim’s doing good, he doesn’t need my help.”

**But that couldn’t be further from the truth.**

The only way we’re going to win this race is by giving it our absolute all from here until Election Day. Grassroots supporters, like you, are the backbone of our campaign -- with your help we can make the strategic voter contact investments that will flip Ohio blue.

**That being said, we're experiencing a bit of a digital fundraising slump and I’m worried we won’t be able to compete with the $80 million national Republicans are spending to boost JD Vance, attack me, and keep Ohio red. So, I could really use your help.**

**[Can I count on you to split a $5 donation right now to flip Ohio blue and defend the Senate? A lot of folks are rooting against us -- let’s prove ‘em wrong.](https://go.dscc.org/go/7515?amount=5&t=7&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20220806-TimRyan-TimRyanTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20220806-TimRyan-TimRyanTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=5689%2E9716520%2EEnHTbV)**

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately and be split between Tim Ryan for Senate and the DSCC.

| [Donate $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/7515?amount=5&t=8&amount=5&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20220806-TimRyan-TimRyanTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20220806-TimRyan-TimRyanTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=5689%2E9716520%2EEnHTbV)
---
| [Donate $10](https://go.dscc.org/go/7515?amount=5&t=9&amount=10&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20220806-TimRyan-TimRyanTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20220806-TimRyan-TimRyanTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=5689%2E9716520%2EEnHTbV)
---
| [Donate $25](https://go.dscc.org/go/7515?amount=5&t=10&amount=25&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20220806-TimRyan-TimRyanTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20220806-TimRyan-TimRyanTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=5689%2E9716520%2EEnHTbV)
---
| [Other Amount](https://go.dscc.org/go/7515?amount=5&t=11&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20220806-TimRyan-TimRyanTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20220806-TimRyan-TimRyanTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=5689%2E9716520%2EEnHTbV)
---

Never bet against Ohio!

—Tim Ryan
Candidate for U.S. Senate, Ohio
U.S. Representative, Ohio’s 13th District

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/7515?amount=5&t=12&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20220806-TimRyan-TimRyanTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20220806-TimRyan-TimRyanTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=5689%2E9716520%2EEnHTbV)

Rep. Tim Ryan is running for Senate to fight for working-class families, good-paying jobs, and dignity for every American -- but he's up against Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and _millions_ in GOP dark money. _**[Please, pitch in now to send Tim Ryan to the Senate and expand our Democratic Senate majority!](https://go.dscc.org/go/7515?amount=5&t=13&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20220806-TimRyan-TimRyanTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20220806-TimRyan-TimRyanTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=5689%2E9716520%2EEnHTbV)**_

So, I could really use your help. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately and be split between Tim Ryan for Senate and the DSCC. | | | | Never bet against Ohio! —Tim Ryan Candidate for U.S. Senate, Ohio U.S. Representative, Ohio’s 13th District Rep. [](https://americanfirebrand.cmail20.com/t/y-l-noijik-ihhjkhtyud-j/) **New Episode ** The Biden Doctrine: Human Sacrifices for Open BordersThe recent story of a young Ohio girl--a rape victim who received an abortion--has taken on a new horrifying dimension. name: =?utf-8?Q?Dan=20Cox?=
subject: Moore in the Hamptons, Dan in the Neighborhood
body:
This week Dan was with the People of Maryland in Baltimore City to hear and address the issues of crime, education and economic need. | | | |
---
| | |
# Children, Careers and Community Safety.
Dear friend,
All across Maryland, parents, small businesses, families and retirees are upset with the failed Biden agendas.

Wes Moore is championing these failed and dangerous policies.

While he is raising money from the international law firms and big pharmaceuticals and is in the Hamptons this month raising money from Oprah, C-Street globalists and power-hungry radicals, this week [I was in the neighborhoods](https://coxforfreedom.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=f33bc96452&e=5bb5efcda7) of [West Baltimore](https://coxforfreedom.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=2fc2ac8be1&e=5bb5efcda7) hearing concerns of students and parents.

Wes Moore and co. are planning to come after our children for forced health mandates and sexual indoctrination in schools, and will continue the sanctuary state causing rampant crime. It's even on Moore's website, claiming he will force every local school board to follow his indoctrination of the hearts and souls of our children, and his own campaign events require experimental vaccine proof card/passport entry-only.

Think about that - he says no to a simple voter ID and yes to a sanctuary state endangering our kids while demanding papers via an invasive vaccine "passport."

I won't stand for it or for anyone who supports such despicable acts. As I write this I am hearing my four year old son sing a song while he builds his legos. Valerie and I have a stake in our kids' freedom too. That's why we are running to win. And I have a strategy to do so with a path to victory.

My Lt. Gov. candidate Gordana Schifanelli is also fighting with me for Maryland's children. Her professional career and determined approach, alongside her husband Marc - an elected school board official, to defend parents gives you double the benefit for the future of Maryland's prosperity.

Will you help us? The time is now. Below are a couple flyers you can use to help distribute to voters our message. And I need your urgent and continued support if you can chip in [$100, $250, $350 or anything ](https://coxforfreedom.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=4a7a82663f&e=5bb5efcda7)right now before the August 23 report deadline. You may also want our new ["Mama Bears for Dan Cox" T-shirt](https://coxforfreedom.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=f2a934564a&e=5bb5efcda7).

We need your help now as there are only 94 days until the general election. In the next week your donation will help us:
* $100 pays for about 210 mail pieces reaching about 430 household voters directly
* $250 pays for about one day of radio ads on a major station reaching 8,000,000 people
* $350 joins our freedom circle and pays for about one day of cable TV advertising

Thank you.

For Freedom we have been made free - let's use it wisely and defend it now.

Victory,

Dan Cox
Republican nominee for Governor

P.S. We have announced a winning leadership team (see press release below). Donate today - and ask at least 10 of your friend to as well - to help us win. Thank you.

| Team, the pundits are all in agreement – Arizona is in toss-up territory.

| [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yFuHGMtGpwGswkmRZFAnyBez2L1ZnkVCLrgVXDdtM9O-H8Ftu02mZE5OcyaHib2u53iPkEyQjlchkXD8Tf3b6y9CdOOaTDVDVLtCrmAV-xSj6jsaIMWsbhibjIqGNU9vhbJ2opzDjIMD89-WQUoyPGUwWmX-YSwKDfdu4fdm7k0jF2ELkUoAeYDlHQv9nvIP5rwk-bTLkVEDqoPjPUQmGcphWu2A5QwmYuBWPjF8npfWGQZifTBKE4Qyy8K-XmOvaYkFGZ-GmR4SNMuIMq_xPb4EN5eSxJVDUFI_Z0q7--T0CmcdHaj11VERzM9pkZ9rc62KmzyUTo7vm9dHUw0ika8wORbOfOICPpv2SG2Smqtxd-g6Xyj0kMC5m7mAZNtlJZCl4diKc1WlWJun7rTDYhjMetWv5PwJa5kvPzhGVG_b6jkEEv7Oxj8N0ibPNEwrE/3od/NcqyuQdAQJWgxb0u32YzGA/h1/H6jSonKWjLB6dWm4bIJIT3wubqIKkO2I8QqDgE0cOUc) [](?link_id=2&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-flipping-az-blue&email_referrer=email_1615331___subject_2101400&email_subject=the-pundits-all-agree-when-it-comes-to-arizona)
No matter where you look, some of the closest elections in the country will take place here in Arizona.

Which means we have a choice to make right now:

– We can be happy with the progress we’ve made in turning Arizona blue the last few elections.

– Or we can dig deep and work to flip Arizona completely blue.

Republicans know we have a chance to flip seats and protect our vital wins, which is why they have launched millions in attack ads against us. We have to have the resources to respond, or we won’t flip these seats.

**[Team, this week will be crucial in deciding whether we flip Arizona blue or not. We have to hit our $5,000 rapid response goal. Will you chip in $10 today to help us get where we need to be?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yFuHGMtGpwGswkmRZFAnyBez2L1ZnkVCLrgVXDdtM9O-H8Ftu02mZE5OcyaHib2u53iPkEyQjlchkXD8Tf3b6ybrOlXO2hO4IRYhuewUdhNRg7-yNxWEB_igvuL9xdYZyvg59hjCFG9jkFd4CAKqgSeugnZzXS-z7tuPiW9QnkTmPXjBKihvN6jkkMdGhmLGevJZ0V6J9956UoBAiFwJ0hrs3XDKBkyeJzQoNNcdoH4M6fYATt1A6vpnYtbP39IeMSILB9_nPaKYyD3-bYnOeVN8E2dIuHUukVow5dNDn_eor18hxYZwuoarcAnqV52lFCPaXJypkKj-NTni-d_yRcHDJGeR7nGfjG5hlfR2gfRCubINqMJuz-9LxzA_Za9rKR6kis1ieqSjZo3BPdprqh2xt9K7jod-rdi1CFpBF0b1EvGlopxVoqTZ0APUlv7Js/3od/NcqyuQdAQJWgxb0u32YzGA/h2/cKTfGjhRZjj2S0d1kVPLtLZGgf3i7sSxHEZCqNz3xVY)** [

Our Republican opponents are extremists. You know that already. But Republicans are desperate to maintain power, and they don’t care how extreme their nominees are.

They want to outlaw abortion – with no exceptions. They want to ban gay marriage- – again. They want to give special interests handouts instead of funding our schools.

**They want to take us back decades. And team, it’s up to you to decide if we’re going to let them.**

**[Team, will you step up and help us fight back against GOP extremism? Folks, I know most fundraising emails make your inbox look something like this these days: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48883768/359951497/1652904265?amount=5&refcode=GLFC_20220806_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzEzMTBiYS1jYTE1LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GyoLZC9I3NBzius5bSlOZw7-Jh5hMD1SJ0NXIYncipw=) **I can’t STAND emails like these.**

They can often be exploitative and misleading.

I’ll be clear: This campaign will never stoop to these shady tactics. Our team is committed to treating you and your fellow supporters with respect.

**We’ll never employ shady tactics to get you to make a donation and we’ll never ask for a dime unless we need it.**

Listen, right now we’re not in danger of “completely imploding” (_to borrow a line that’s probably in your inbox_) if you don’t donate an oddly specific $6.87, so don’t feel pressured into doing so.

[**But, we are going head-to-head with one of the most well-funded Republicans in Congress, and we need to work twice as hard to beat him. name: George Logan
subject: My mother taught me better
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GEORGE LOGAN
body:
We are supposed to serve the people and create laws based on their needs, not hide behind bodyguards. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9a6a058a517e4a6699199eada37e4244&_e=HqEqIlURh_eG0_Z6WkkAUbU-vErmaRahw3LlPE54r4H2lHgZNtvZ_pd2QAZcVcJTSAnwQUsX4cfHxVmJdXDDen4-KPdOfKujcrkOfuAsIgN9CshQ1aXtcecB1KNjzGv-jyG0A-AG0Gezyppb65KZmMJ-bDQBJ2NwZjipojq08Gw6l-Q4N0Xj1r99L3muoaIMKXC9m9oRnt7aLODHz6h_hPkTULYepHC8xG3KGm8ii9LrmEpYYxyoSR8y0sWU7XcmMjm7SvAMv7WoscsnHSQwMDEwzDC4vm6SiwT9U17uDXDLL4FrVSsbiohKb2HtlrI65wURE2Oq1gLl8BMuwp174eg2jGCPOtYrPvwnTKLXxrjGIiZHD45QjKXUBlcNMv6H4jF3GmAQkrdss3yFoAmBreNPxZ2SprebVWE604lFQgJf6wmccwoQn_QyMw-MD2i21NSryxUOzyzqwI05BrItnYXmV6Rt7OoOHBJ3RX1DH_8%3D)

---

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9a6a058a517e4a6699199eada37e4244&_e=HqEqIlURh_eG0_Z6WkkAUbU-vErmaRahw3LlPE54r4H2lHgZNtvZ_pd2QAZcVcJTSAnwQUsX4cfHxVmJdXDDen4-KPdOfKujcrkOfuAsIgN9CshQ1aXtcecB1KNjzGv-jyG0A-AG0Gezyppb65KZmMJ-bDQBJ2NwZjipojq08Gw6l-Q4N0Xj1r99L3muoaIMKXC9m9oRnt7aLODHz6h_hPkTULYepHC8xG3KGm8ii9LrmEpYYxyoSR8y0sWU7XcmMjm7SvAMv7WoscsnHSQwMFqQt3iOw5O-rsUgKVLIi3PLDIWqQfo2x3hSX6-4bZM6wXN02bs-qZzT1nR6iPr0EuSNDETJNw7Nd01Q7LOM6LI96Idz4Jowo7tGYagrYD7bObLHYudk0pTmt4bd_jJ-nRZBwPo7x1qkSdmCLIB8MFr-aD4jpqLmwE_GdGJHtMXMUA4kH68zuiY0kDbU7UBXwFts9-TFduHJKBkoEihZk68%3D)

And I could be one of them, Fellow American!

As a proud Black Hispanic man, let alone being a Republican _(because you know we’re usually labeled as Democrats)_ , [**I never thought that my American Dream of running for Congress would come true.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9a6a058a517e4a6699199eada37e4244&_e=HqEqIlURh_eG0_Z6WkkAUbU-vErmaRahw3LlPE54r4H2lHgZNtvZ_pd2QAZcVcJTSAnwQUsX4cfHxVmJdXDDen4-KPdOfKujcrkOfuAsIgN9CshQ1aXtcecB1KNjzGv-jyG0A-AG0Gezyppb65KZmMJ-bDQBJ2NwZjipojq08Gw6l-Q4N0Xj1r99L3muoaIMKXC9m9oRnt7aLODHz6h_hPkTULYepHC8xG3KGm8ii9LrmEpYYxyoSR8y0sWU7XcmMjm7SvAMv7WoscsnHSQwMM2GLD3IFitcO7x8Cnyy1CQdRjeJvzkJSJ9eaY5T3f6YN_CmL_eSrdUmauL7SZ119XjpkHoBoG2k6l4URE7i6we3UPKYaheW-JW9wf8NsQ_CAM22kwaNFNe0l7x21h0M_lbuevuK_Pl62NABcjZjj4QjsXYjOfUo6-QiFbhWdANmSBE7ERS-mpV6ZbrZdPZ3XobgNb1KdvRIBFHawrjwDw0%3D)

| [**TAKE A CHANCE ON ME ››**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9a6a058a517e4a6699199eada37e4244&_e=HqEqIlURh_eG0_Z6WkkAUbU-vErmaRahw3LlPE54r4H2lHgZNtvZ_pd2QAZcVcJTSAnwQUsX4cfHxVmJdXDDen4-KPdOfKujcrkOfuAsIgN9CshQ1aXtcecB1KNjzGv-jyG0A-AG0Gezyppb65KZmMJ-bDQBJ2NwZjipojq08Gw6l-Q4N0Xj1r99L3muoaIMKXC9m9oRnt7aLODHz6h_hPkTULYepHC8xG3KGm8ii9LrmEpYYxyoSR8y0sWU7XcmMjm7SvAMv7WoscsnHSQwMGOelP_sZ0FQaaKJi3WeiH_7ii-Nabtj6i2xb0FTxZ2Yj4RjYwkeVwGlukoLVIFP5TuS6cz03KWOLUq3hHFEVeDpdCcTeQnhKQ91l8XImLJpzPeCu--taWZ87_S_p21Mp4Cc_JNROo_EQ0xAd0mb5i_mj655YQIcMW6poQKO67IxqMsdiGdaa3RzDnP2nyvNcmSNU86PrKXNHDKR39DigRs%3D)
---

**Being a first-generation conservative Afro-Latino American is not all that easy** - you always have critics and people who refuse to be in your corner. ** But I will never let those people stop me from representing our citizens for the greater good; my mother taught me better than that.**

I know that as a congressman, you should always be there for the people and never get caught up in the spotlight. Some politicians these days are more untouchable than A-list celebrities,** which is just wrong. We are supposed to serve the people and create laws based on their needs, not hide behind bodyguards.**

[**I know that I can make real change for the people of this country**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9a6a058a517e4a6699199eada37e4244&_e=HqEqIlURh_eG0_Z6WkkAUbU-vErmaRahw3LlPE54r4H2lHgZNtvZ_pd2QAZcVcJTSAnwQUsX4cfHxVmJdXDDen4-KPdOfKujcrkOfuAsIgN9CshQ1aXtcecB1KNjzGv-jyG0A-AG0Gezyppb65KZmMJ-bDQBJ2NwZjipojq08Gw6l-Q4N0Xj1r99L3muoaIMKXC9m9oRnt7aLODHz6h_hPkTULYepHC8xG3KGm8ii9LrmEpYYxyoSR8y0sWU7XcmMjm7SvAMv7WoscsnHSQwMFGJBzrVdFCkkobj8CIN632l6xPhQnQPUxFh6RV7aZVmTP-oLB9ZXGhkioJJQlS6-DY1AmLAEJHxiNKwKWDlPVMacZtaC7WZlaP4dlOAlsf2SKTJwUpDr4SqpoB1bW9fxK0rqlpWVNxjMlVgEQUqhAuQqabt_c5k8RhU2KHLwNar2gpybQL7NKJJ4cQWF7T2z0VElDJbpSY5qgMCmF3y0dI%3D) - and what better way to start than running for the United States Congress!

[**TAKE A CHANCE ON ME ››**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9a6a058a517e4a6699199eada37e4244&_e=HqEqIlURh_eG0_Z6WkkAUbU-vErmaRahw3LlPE54r4H2lHgZNtvZ_pd2QAZcVcJTSAnwQUsX4cfHxVmJdXDDen4-KPdOfKujcrkOfuAsIgN9CshQ1aXtcecB1KNjzGv-jyG0A-AG0Gezyppb65KZmMJ-bDQBJ2NwZjipojq08Gw6l-Q4N0Xj1r99L3muoaIMKXC9m9oRnt7aLODHz6h_hPkTULYepHC8xG3KGm8ii9LrmEpYYxyoSR8y0sWU7XcmMjm7SvAMv7WoscsnHSQwMFwRAh9Myc2vM6RvVomdPuJXXKUGJLHH4c1WamBcPwCRrPTV0ShQH19KyT3lKegrgda0YiFrr814iKalthx6uhdxW1aHFBCOO5-7oRAAQr9xeKeuhjj8T-WgaStAMAoY5GxUC8sggQ3jsWHb1dZ-rRiAIj6U_dyzXF_SQKvU9u0Pa93J0nKnofXLQZTvLXfFzvi5BgdUTMUgdbFL2lKhhn0%3D)
---

When being a first-generation American, there’s this sort of pressure that you must strive to be the best because our family has the chance to live in the land of opportunity and freedom.

**Well, Fellow American, I am dang sure I will be my best.** The Pelosi Democrats are slowly but surely chipping away at our freedoms, and it _pains me to live in a country where my children and future grandchildren won’t have the same opportunities as you and me._

**My family means everything to me** - they’ve made me who I am. So I must ensure that I leave this country better than it is today. One with no economic downfall, where they feel safe to walk down the street and have confidence in our nation, **just as I’m sure you want for your family - I fully understand.**

[**So please, take a chance on me and help my efforts to get America back to what it once was - the land of freedom, opportunity, and prosperity!**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9a6a058a517e4a6699199eada37e4244&_e=HqEqIlURh_eG0_Z6WkkAUbU-vErmaRahw3LlPE54r4H2lHgZNtvZ_pd2QAZcVcJTSAnwQUsX4cfHxVmJdXDDen4-KPdOfKujcrkOfuAsIgN9CshQ1aXtcecB1KNjzGv-jyG0A-AG0Gezyppb65KZmMJ-bDQBJ2NwZjipojq08Gw6l-Q4N0Xj1r99L3muoaIMKXC9m9oRnt7aLODHz6h_hPkTULYepHC8xG3KGm8ii9LrmEpYYxyoSR8y0sWU7XcmMjm7SvAMv7WoscsnHSQwMHP6Aq9jpbHxOCaEjaelA17LX4dd9ZvakVc4zYn1H2dOaObIOc0XaV58SnRi6TBg2NYAblhg0YJsx-LYjOuVHJrrGM6N-VHSt8pt1v18XHX2F8O7cUEY95POdDGZQbdLRrhYb7JoXGSWfliputvEs9afNuoFxWURFZ1azZv-OZfPsvRrI3_s49hDNO-zfggpAD1QkoaKs-nVCQyipjySOi4%3D)

clean_body: We are supposed to serve the people and create laws based on their needs, not hide behind bodyguards. | And I could be one of them, Fellow American! As a proud Black Hispanic man, let alone being a Republican (because you know we’re usually labeled as Democrats) , | Being a first-generation conservative Afro-Latino American is not all that easy - you always have critics and people who refuse to be in your corner. But I will never let those people stop me from representing our citizens for the greater good; my mother taught me better than that. I know that as a congressman, you should always be there for the people and never get caught up in the spotlight. Some politicians these days are more untouchable than A-list celebrities, which is just wrong. We are supposed to serve the people and create laws based on their needs, not hide behind bodyguards. - and what better way to start than running for the United States Congress! When being a first-generation American, there’s this sort of pressure that you must strive to be the best because our family has the chance to live in the land of opportunity and freedom. Well, Fellow American, I am dang sure I will be my best. The Pelosi Democrats are slowly but surely chipping away at our freedoms, and it pains me to live in a country where my children and future grandchildren won’t have the same opportunities as you and me. My family means everything to me - they’ve made me who I am. So I must ensure that I leave this country better than it is today. One with no economic downfall, where they feel safe to walk down the street and have confidence in our nation, just as I’m sure you want for your family - I fully understand. | | | | | I look forward to being victorious with your help; Sincerely, George S. Logan ---|---|---|---|---|---|--- | | PAID FOR BY GEORGE LOGAN FOR CONGRESS Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48886548/359985653/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZWRiYTJlMS1lZDE1LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-Ql06LobaXsBtTguyg85bq58i2dhxzkAl1uhwnF3gM4=&emci=8271d981-ed15-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=aedba2e1-ed15-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=6371843)
Hello,
The January 6th insurrection and the GOP’s feckless decision to stand by Donald J. Trump is proof enough: There is a Cold War raging for the future of our democracy, and ‘General’ McConnell and ‘Lieutenant’ Grassley are fighting for the wrong side.
I served our country for nearly 4 decades in the U.S. Navy. I swore an oath to defend our Constitution against all threats – foreign _and_ domestic. **I’m now running for Senate against Chuck Grassley because I can’t think of anything more un-American than gleefully accepting the endorsement of a deranged man who tried to overthrow 232 years of peaceful transfer of power. It’s time to call it what it was: Treason.**
The polls show I can win. The pundits say we _must_ win if we’re going to expand our Democratic Senate majority. But Grassley has already started slinging mud at me on TV and even attacking my military service, and I’m not taking a dime of corporate PAC money, so I need _your_ help.

I’m now running for Senate against Chuck Grassley because I can’t think of anything more un-American than gleefully accepting the endorsement of a deranged man who tried to overthrow 232 years of peaceful transfer of power. name: Charles Booker
subject: We owe veterans our support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter,

Earlier this week, Rand Paul voted on the Honoring Our PACT Act because he
believes veterans cannot “prove” they developed health issues while
serving in combat.

By voting no on a bill meant to provide health care benefits to veterans
exposed to toxins while in the line of duty, Rand Paul continues to betray
veterans and their families across our Commonwealth and our country.

Peter, this is
personal to me. I’ve had family members serve in every branch of the U.S.
Military. Both my grandfathers and my dad are veterans. Rand Paul’s
actions today are a complete slap in the face to them, and every veteran
that has served our country.

Rand Paul cannot keep getting away with disrespecting the service of our
nation’s veterans. He is not fit for the office he occupies, and together
we must defeat him. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18293?c0=20220806.cjC0S3&refcode=em20220806-2324&t=1001&akid=2324%2E346206%2EzgIEsQ ]Please chip in anything you can today to help me
retire him.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18293?c0=20220806.cjC0S3&refcode=em20220806-2324&t=1020&akid=2324%2E346206%2EzgIEsQ ]Contribute $5

Peter, it's
pretty clear who Rand stands with, and it’s not with our nation’s veterans
or with the people of Kentucky — it’s with his own self-interest and
billionaire donors.

Rand Paul’s actions are shameful, but we don’t have to accept his selfish,
failed leadership any longer.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18293?c0=20220806.cjC0S3&refcode=em20220806-2324&t=1021&akid=2324%2E346206%2EzgIEsQ ]Unlike Rand Paul, I would have voted yes on the PACT Act, and I will
always support our veterans. Chip in to help me defeat Rand this November.

Charles Booker

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=2324%2E346206%2EzgIEsQ

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

name: Team Swalwell
subject: No more weapons of war on our streets
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 15th Congressional District.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-15-Email-July2022-FR-header-footer?refcode=E16827--headerfooter-graphic--RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-15-Email-July2022-FR-header-footer?refcode=E16827--headerfooter-graphic--RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15]
This is a monumental one, team: the House of Representatives just voted to reinstate the ban on assault weapons for the first time in decades.

Once again, House Democrats have stepped up and taken crucial action for everyday Americans to keep them safe. We did our jobs, now it’s time for the Senate to do theirs. Lives are on the line, so we're tired of asking nicely.

We're trying to collect 10,000 signatures to demand that the Senate PASS the Assault Weapons Ban . Will you help us out and sign our petition to urge the Senate to push this across the finish line? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/AafsDy8eT0Km8qfUjO4Spw2]

SIGN HERE [https://secure.ngpvan.com/AafsDy8eT0Km8qfUjO4Spw2]

It's simple: assault weapons are made to be weapons of war, and weapons of war do NOT belong in the hands of civilians. Period. An assault weapons ban would save countless lives , so we can’t let the Senate drop the ball on this one too. Sign our petition here to demand that the Senate does their job and passes the assault weapons ban now>>> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/AafsDy8eT0Km8qfUjO4Spw2]

SIGN HERE [https://secure.ngpvan.com/AafsDy8eT0Km8qfUjO4Spw2]

Thanks for raising your voice with us, team.

— Team Swalwell
DONATE TO ERIC >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-15-Email-July2022-FR-header-footer?refcode=E16827--headerfooter-SB--RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15]

Democrat Eric Swalwell proudly represents California's 15th Congressional District. He needs your support in order to keep protecting what's important: our healthcare, our paychecks, our future, and our democracy.
DONATE TO ERIC >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-15-Email-July2022-FR-header-footer?refcode=E16827--headerfooter-SB--RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15]
Eric runs a people-powered campaign that relies on grassroots supporters like you, and if he's going to win re-election, he's going to need your help. We’ll hear from special guests who have supported our campaign, and toast to the last vote. [**All supporters are welcome – to join us virtually at 6:45pm on August 9th, RSVP here!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48884549/359954555/-802907163?sourceid=1071963&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDg5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWZlOTViOC1kMTE1LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=USwpFcKRRfohAUGrmFLuql9TGAFzpbECzb6XWm72fx8=&emci=450bbd7a-b215-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=35fe95b8-d115-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=43402276) | | [RSVP](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48884550/359954556/-802907163?sourceid=1071963&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDg5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWZlOTViOC1kMTE1LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=USwpFcKRRfohAUGrmFLuql9TGAFzpbECzb6XWm72fx8=&emci=450bbd7a-b215-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=35fe95b8-d115-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=43402276)

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48884551/359954557/1795730459?sourceid=1071963&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDg5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWZlOTViOC1kMTE1LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=USwpFcKRRfohAUGrmFLuql9TGAFzpbECzb6XWm72fx8=&emci=450bbd7a-b215-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=35fe95b8-d115-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=43402276)
While we’re planning our Election Night celebration, there is still a lot of work ahead.
We know this election will be close, and every single vote counts. Our team is phone banking twice a day every day, and will be calling and canvassing Vermont voters from 7 am to 7 pm on Election Day. We’re doing everything we can to reach thousands of our supporters and make sure they cast a ballot, and we will talk to thousands more undecided voters to give them our best pitch in the days ahead. **We need your help.**
[**To join us on the phones or to knock doors in your neighborhood, sign up here.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48884552/359954558/-926337597?sourceid=1071963&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDg5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWZlOTViOC1kMTE1LWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=USwpFcKRRfohAUGrmFLuql9TGAFzpbECzb6XWm72fx8=&emci=450bbd7a-b215-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=35fe95b8-d115-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=43402276)
**To volunteer at the polls on Election Day** , email our Field Director Spencer Dole at spencer@mollyforvermont.com.
No matter the outcome of this election, I am so proud of the team we have built and the work we have accomplished together. Please join us Tuesday night to celebrate!
Warmly,
_Molly_

The results of the primary in Washington's 8th District are in, and it's official:**Matt Larkin – the most extreme Republican in the primary – will be taking on Kim in November.**

Here's a few things you need to know about Matt Larkin:

1️⃣ **Larkin is a Trump Republican** – In 2020, Larkin said "I love all of the things the President is doing... It's nice to see a President not care." Larkin even refused to say whether Joe Biden's victory in 2020 was legitimate.

2️⃣ **Larkin is unapologetically anti-choice** – Larkin celebrated the end of Roe v. Wade, going so far as to say he was the “only pro-life candidate” in the Republican primary race. Larkin even supports banning abortion in cases of rape and incest.

3️⃣ **Larkin doesn't even live in our district** – Larkin has focused his campaign on issues in Seattle because he doesn't even live in WA-08!

Now that Republicans have their nominee, Kevin McCarthy and dark money PACs are lining up behind Larkin and ready to pour money into this race to defeat Kim.

With so much on the line this November, we can't afford to have Matt Larkin elected to Congress. We need your help to fight back so Kim can defend this seat and the Democratic House majority.

name: Fetterman HQ
subject: False claim from Dr. Oz
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Let’s take a deeper look at Dr. Oz’s new ad.
#
Derek,
Let’s take a deeper look at Dr. Oz’s new ad.
It goes full-bore attacking John, but PolitiFact, a nonpartisan fact-checking website, rated two of its claims as **Mostly False.**
Just like Dr. Oz lied on TV for decades, hawking bad medical advice to enrich himself and the companies he was invested in, he’s now trying to save his Senate campaign with more lies.
_And he has basically unlimited money to spread those lies across PA._
**[_Please, Derek, help us fight back against Dr. Oz’s latest lies about John by making a contribution today. Every dollar adds up and helps us show Pennsylvanians the truth about Dr. Oz._](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220806-2?refcode=em20220806-6775&refcode2=6775_434096_lgnxOT&akid=6775%2E434096%2ElgnxOT)**
**[Contribute »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220806-2?refcode=em20220806-6775&refcode2=6775_434096_lgnxOT&akid=6775%2E434096%2ElgnxOT)**
__
Honestly, the TV stations running this ad should pull it down.
But if + until they do, it’s going to be up to all of us to ensure folks can see through Dr. Oz’s BS.**
Thank you for your support,
Team Fetterman HQ 💛

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220806-6775-footer&t=1&refcode2=6775_434096_lgnxOT&akid=6775%2E434096%2ElgnxOT)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

Friend,

We have a simple message for you from Vance HQ: JD Vance will never back down from the radical Left’s twisted Socialist Left Agenda.

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: If you want to force 14-year-olds to give birth, like Tudor Dixon, you shouldn’t get to be Governor of Michigan. Or any other state.
body:
Why isn’t this disqualifying for any office?
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, you have to wonder where these throwbacks come from. **She thinks a 14 year old molested by her uncle is the "perfect example" of who should be forced to give birth.** **Yes, this is the position of right-wing lunatic Tudor Dixon, whom the Michigan Republican Party nominated on Tuesday as their gubernatorial candidate in Michigan. She is heartless, she is mindless and she is all too happy to torture young girls with forced birth, cause emotional anguish for women raped and impregnated and control the bodies and lives of women who just believe it's their own damn right to control their own damn bodies, not turn them over to Tudor Dixon!** [**Can you join me in giving whatever you can, be it $2, $5 ,$10 or any amount** ,** to progressive, Democratic hero Gretchen Whitmer in her effort to stop a forced-birth-for-molested-14-year-olds, radical seditionist from taking control of the government in Michigan?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T54cb59ba-12e3-4736-b283-a21182380ed6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Dixon is also an election denier who has consistently lied, saying the 2020 election was "stolen" the kind of violence that led to January 6th in Washington. But, in Michigan, it's even more personal. You may remember a plot was stopped by the authorities that had been planned by far-right militias who support Dixon, a plot that included plans to kidnap Governor Gretchen Whitmer and other statewide officials and Democrats, and execute them. Dixon, like so many in the GOP today, is playing with fire, and we can't let her burn us all. **Governor Whitmer, meanwhile, is one of the most talented, toughest and most accomplished governors in the country. Whitmer, who came close to becoming a victim of this insane right-wing plot, didn't stop, slow down, or apologize for a second. ** [**Can you join me in giving whatever you can, be it $2, $5 ,$10 or any amount** ,** to progressive, Democratic hero Gretchen Whitmer?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4a1e27e9-3168-49f3-897a-fd88aa1a030d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) She could have let it scare her into inaction. She didn't. She could have let it convince her to walk away. She didn't. She instead has compiled a record in a key swing state--one we must hold if we are going to re-elect President Biden in 2024--that is the envy of most governors around the country.
---
|
---
| | | | [DONATE NOW: GRETCHEN WHITMER FOR MICHIGAN!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf2dc8b18-887b-4182-a532-368f081ea7df/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Whitmer enacted tough COVID prevention measures, and fought for them. She is unapolagetically pro-choice, and will fight for this position until there's no fighting left to be done. She's fought for in universal voting rights, universal background checks, bringing manufacturijng back to its incestral home of Michigan while greening the economy to prevent climate change. And this year, we have a strong chance of taking both houses of the Michigan legislature, which along with Whitmer's holding the governorship, would lead to the kind of groundbreaking and lasting change that would move the state ahead a half century. **Tudor Dixon is a threat to democracy in Michigan, a threat to democracy in this country, and she intends to control the bodies of every girl and woman of child-bearing age so Michiganders live in the warped Handmaid's Tale of Dixon's fantasies. ** **Whitmer must win reelection in 2022. It is that simple. She will protect Michigan women. She can help Democrats hold Michigan and the presidency, protecting its electoral votes from the attempted thievery of the Republican Party. ** [**Can you join me in giving whatever you can, be it $2, $5 ,$10 or any amount** ,** to progressive, Democratic hero Gretchen Whitmer in her effort to stop a forced-birth-for-molested-14-year-olds, radical seditionist from taking control of the government in Michigan?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td318873b-78c0-4940-8492-9cd07a14f78e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thanks as always my friends. For engaging in this fight and every other one like it. Cliff
---

clean_body: Why isn’t this disqualifying for any office? | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Peter, you have to wonder where these throwbacks come from. She thinks a 14 year old molested by her uncle is the "perfect example" of who should be forced to give birth. Yes, this is the position of right-wing lunatic Tudor Dixon, whom the Michigan Republican Party nominated on Tuesday as their gubernatorial candidate in Michigan. She is heartless, she is mindless and she is all too happy to torture young girls with forced birth, cause emotional anguish for women raped and impregnated and control the bodies and lives of women who just believe it's their own damn right to control their own damn bodies, not turn them over to Tudor Dixon! Dixon is also an election denier who has consistently lied, saying the 2020 election was "stolen" the kind of violence that led to January 6th in Washington. But, in Michigan, it's even more personal. You may remember a plot was stopped by the authorities that had been planned by far-right militias who support Dixon, a plot that included plans to kidnap Governor Gretchen Whitmer and other statewide officials and Democrats, and execute them. Dixon, like so many in the GOP today, is playing with fire, and we can't let her burn us all. Governor Whitmer, meanwhile, is one of the most talented, toughest and most accomplished governors in the country. Whitmer, who came close to becoming a victim of this insane right-wing plot, didn't stop, slow down, or apologize for a second. She could have let it scare her into inaction. She didn't. She could have let it convince her to walk away. She didn't. She instead has compiled a record in a key swing state--one we must hold if we are going to re-elect President Biden in 2024--that is the envy of most governors around the country. | | | | | | Whitmer enacted tough COVID prevention measures, and fought for them. She is unapolagetically pro-choice, and will fight for this position until there's no fighting left to be done. She's fought for in universal voting rights, universal background checks, bringing manufacturijng back to its incestral home of Michigan while greening the economy to prevent climate change. And this year, we have a strong chance of taking both houses of the Michigan legislature, which along with Whitmer's holding the governorship, would lead to the kind of groundbreaking and lasting change that would move the state ahead a half century. Tudor Dixon is a threat to democracy in Michigan, a threat to democracy in this country, and she intends to control the bodies of every girl and woman of child-bearing age so Michiganders live in the warped Handmaid's Tale of Dixon's fantasies. Whitmer must win reelection in 2022. It is that simple. She will protect Michigan women. She can help Democrats hold Michigan and the presidency, protecting its electoral votes from the attempted thievery of the Republican Party. Thanks as always my friends. For engaging in this fight and every other one like it. name: Herschel Walker
subject: The “N” word
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I’ll repeat what I said before: this is racist, disgusting, and sad. |
---
Peter,

Every morning I wake up, determined to get the most out of each day. I'm an optimist and firmly believe it takes more effort to have a bad day than a good one.

But I've got to tell you, MSNBC and their cast of far-Left characters do their best to ruin my day as often as they can. You might recall that earlier this year one of their regular panelists began attacking our Senate campaign.

In April, he called me an **"ignorant neophyte,"** and said that my candidacy is **"a white insult to Black people."**

Then he called Senator Tim Scott and me _**"tokens"**_ who are _**"shucking and jiving for their white handlers."** _

Now, he's back at it again, saying this about me on MSNBC earlier this week:

| _**"Walker is doing what he's told, and that is what Republicans like. That's what Republicans want from their negroes: to do what they're told."**_
---

I'll repeat what I said in April: **this is racist, disgusting, and sad.**

What's also disturbing is that our opponent, who also happens to be Black, has never once condemned any of these blatantly racist remarks. _Can you imagine if these comments were made by a conservative about a Black Democrat? The outrage would be instantaneous and overwhelming - and rightly so._

_**Senator Warnock's silence is deafening and disappointing.**_

The loudest and clearest way to push back against these kinds of disgusting attacks is to defeat them at the ballot box. **[Please help me stand up against MSNBC, reject racist commentators, and defeat silent Democrats by donating $10, $20, $50, or even $100 right now.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=1ec71f91418c4b02a19b9174493f100e&_e=FIASSSj_XSZ1rDyBHmbAk9yAc5bDtBz6IWBDKdxgwaUPI44A_wJnjXi3rPvenDFPfwfy6wtO2goaCnFT6sOFWyqe41jegBuXwDKOBCQlblJVAV3VIV9eFIbYf0VMtHmC0JXVfIE48mvYZAryBYXLBaT7lhmWui8pv7UUnHv3Ho-pTWjSIqo-A87oCjXOGKvlZl7mRtrXCtSc-kO0CAbAOmBXZZfA0yLXQWb33HsIANLl13nCYHJCHdZTayGkDR3o73p7ZP-QXOCPMO2r0dKeDETx0yf9Pq5dX54Nq8NlNgqEFm_6NvvLSf47jJmVYJ1u2PZKdXgp-6V80jPKsfUGneTv2gryEMe395ow_I-vrtIayTCvxoY_mDfLKiATioDSzj6f5y2kOjJ1LDeenThKQzzl7jVoNYx_l1ivjukMwzygiJ-QJj5OHWjJNVnTpsSQpTUSezgbCV8dmyx1JU_hI0EV_BDQFsVv8KcT6k6W7YUy5XDf3IWLNHL_b6puAoSI)**

---
|
# We need your help to get rid of Matt Gaetz and Ron DeSantis
---
| Yesterday, a GOP-backed sham candidate with a GOP lawyer used an unconstitutional law written by GOP governor Ron DeSantis to have me taken off the ballot in the running against GOP-incumbent Matt Gaetz.

All the polls and media agreed we were poised to defeat the incumbent congressman, currently embroiled in a number of controversies, including the ongoing FBI investigation into sex trafficking.

For the last two years I’ve been the thorn in Ron DeSantis’ side for exposing data manipulation by the Florida Department of Health, where I was formerly the manager of COVID-19 data and surveillance. I served as a reminder that his administration lied and recklessly got people killed during the pandemic.

The online harassment and stalking campaign I’ve endured, the death threats to myself and my family, the constant rhythm of assault-by-tweet have never dampened my commitment to truth and transparency.

The sham candidate claims to have received an application for party change while I was living in Maryland more than a year ago from an “anonymous source” online. Any change in party during the year before qualifying would disqualify me from office.

Thousands of ballots have already been cast, and I’m favored to win my primary against this sham candidate who doesn’t live in our district by about 77 points.

The legal costs associated with combating this Russian-style attempt to block my campaign, which is the last desperate attempt of a terrified governor, congressman and party who knows they cannot win this election at the ballot box, are high.

We’re appealing this egregious decision, but we need your help.

Please help us save this election from becoming another casualty of vindictive legislating and retaliation by Ron DeSantis, the most corrupt and evil governor in the United States, so that I can continue in my fight to kick him and Matt Gaetz out of office.
---

The legal costs associated with combating this Russian-style attempt to block my campaign, which is the last desperate attempt of a terrified governor, congressman and party who knows they cannot win this election at the ballot box, are high. We’re appealing this egregious decision, but we need your help. Please help us save this election from becoming another casualty of vindictive legislating and retaliation by Ron DeSantis, the most corrupt and evil governor in the United States, so that I can continue in my fight to kick him and Matt Gaetz out of office. | | | "DONATE" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | mailto:info@rebekahjonescampaign.com | | Copyright © 2022 Rebekah Jones Campaign, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: PO BOX 1259 Gulf Breeze, FL 32562 Paid for by Rebekah Jones Campaign Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or .

name: =?utf-8?Q?Peggy=20Schiller=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Jones Disqualified from the Democratic Primary
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Committee to Elect Peggy Schiller
body:
Yesterday, I became the only qualified Congressional candidate for the Democratic primary in CD01. I hope you will support me as we look ahead. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/76ab7d591229/jones-disqualified-from-the-democratic-primary?e=9c22e4067b)
---
| |
---
| | Hello Peter,

I wanted to reach out with the news that yesterday, Judge John Cooper, of the 2nd Judicial Circuit, ruled that my opponent,**Rebekah Jones, is not qualified for candidacy in the upcoming Democratic primary on August 23rd**.

As a result, an order will be issued on Monday, which**will instruct the Supervisors of Elections in the First Congressional District not to count votes cast for Rebekah Jones.**

---
| [Read More >](https://outlook.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5bfd640916a1b05d7592a2dd1&id=61925ef371&e=9c22e4067b "Read More >")
---
| As Judge Cooper stated, “anyone who puts themselves up for public office should be commended.” It certainly is not easy to run for office.

However, the laws to qualify are clear. **All congressional candidates must comply with the same set of rules to become[qualified candidates](https://outlook.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5bfd640916a1b05d7592a2dd1&id=6dba030b59&e=9c22e4067b). **

**Jones was not a member of the Democratic party for the required 365 days before the qualifying period.** Therefore, she violated her Candidate Oath.

I understand that some may not agree with my decision to file suit against Jones. However, had I not filed suit when I did, the Republicans, armed with the same information about Jones, would have sued immediately following the primary, should she have won. **This would have left the Democratic party with a gaping void on the ballot this November against Gaetz. **

**My decision to address Jones’ qualifying violation _now_ ensures the Democratic party will mount a great fight to unseat Matt Gaetz in the general election.**

I have always wanted to make this campaign about defeating Matt Gaetz, who has not delivered on his promises as our representative.**Our campaign is now laser-focused on defeating him, and we hope the constituents of the First Congressional District will unite with me in achieving this goal.**

We have an uphill battle ahead against the deep-pocketed Gaetz machine. I would appreciate any support you can give to our campaign, even if just $5 or $10.

---
| [Donate Today >](https://outlook.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5bfd640916a1b05d7592a2dd1&id=be3ed4970c&e=9c22e4067b "Donate Today >")
---
| Thank you so much for your support. I hope to have the chance to meet you on the campaign trail soon.
---
|
---
| | | | | | | [](https://outlook.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5bfd640916a1b05d7592a2dd1&id=67bbfb41fc&e=9c22e4067b)
---
| | [](https://outlook.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5bfd640916a1b05d7592a2dd1&id=5cbc4dc72f&e=9c22e4067b)
---
| | [](https://outlook.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5bfd640916a1b05d7592a2dd1&id=a6210751dc&e=9c22e4067b)
---
| | [](https://outlook.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5bfd640916a1b05d7592a2dd1&id=5e9fb8124f&e=9c22e4067b)
---
| | Paid for by the Committee to Elect Peggy Schiller
---
|
---
| **Peggy Schiller for U.S. Congress**
174 Watercolor Way
Suite 103, Box 203
Santa Rosa Beach, FL 32459
info@peggyforthepanhandle.com
[peggyforthepanhandle.com](https://outlook.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5bfd640916a1b05d7592a2dd1&id=0615b488eb&e=9c22e4067b)

body:
[1]Stacey Abrams for Governor

Derek, please
don’t delete this email.
Please don’t close your computer or swipe away on your phone.
Please don’t turn away.

Don’t give Brian Kemp — or anyone who wants to count out our campaign —
the satisfaction.

Because the stakes have never been higher: Brian Kemp and his Republican
allies are ramping up their voter outreach and trying to drown out our
message.

They know Stacey’s vision for One Georgia — where everyone has the
opportunity to succeed — resonates with voters. That’s why they’re doing
whatever they can to slow down our momentum.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1619?refcode=sa_em_220806_B3_DontDelete_S1_T1_HQ_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1006&akid=1338%2E1862389%2EdWwc0R ]We need our top
supporters like you
to help us overcome his accelerated outreach efforts.
Derek, can we
count on you to make your
first
$5 donation right now?

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1599?refcode=sa_em_220806_B3_DontDelete_S1_T1_HQ_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1007&akid=1338%2E1862389%2EdWwc0R ]DONATE

The truth about Kemp is clear — he does not care about Georgians and is
dangerously unfit to lead.

He’s doing whatever he can to undermine our campaign because he does not
have a real record to run on.

That’s why it’s critical for grassroots
supporters to chip
in to our campaign immediately, before Brian Kemp’s increased outreach
efforts persuade reachable voters.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1619?refcode=sa_em_220806_B3_DontDelete_S1_T1_HQ_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1008&akid=1338%2E1862389%2EdWwc0R ]Derek,
please don’t allow Kemp to drown out

attacks by making your
first
$5 contribution to our campaign for One Georgia now.

Thank you,

Stacey Abrams HQ
